It also looks nice in my van. Review 3: rating 5.0. Why did I not know about this sooner! I purchased this product about a month ago and my car has never been this clean. It is such a simple solution for when my kid is eating in the car. This product is also great for left over crumbs, dirt, or garbage that is left behind in the car seat itself. All I have to do is swipe it right off into the can. It also, works great for my own trash which is the real reason my car is so clean ;). On top of it all, it really protects my seats from ge... Review 4: rating 5.0. Great product Great product !!!
I got it to fix the mess my kids bring to my car
To put all the dolls and Lego parts and crayons ... love it so much ,thinking to buy another one !! It's keep the car organized and I don't need to look for nothing , it's all in one place .
It can be used as well for garbage ... but I used it for storage . Review 5: rating 5.0. Brilliant! Genius idea, helps so much whether you have a newborn or a toddler! Review 6: rating 5.0. The seat protector is awesome!! It covers 99% of the seat and ... The seat protector is awesome!! It covers 99% of the seat and the back of it, the trash can is a nice add on. I am happy that I found it to keep my new car clean. I totally recommend it.Thank you!! Review 7: rating 4.0. I love this. I use the trash can part for ... I love this. I use the trash can part for all my liddos loose items so it keeps the car look clean. Review 8: rating 5.0. Great seat protector and a must for anyone using a carseat. This fit like a dream. I believe that it will save my seat from not only what the child might "drop" but will keep from making marks in the seat from the car seat. The trash bin has been fully utilized and is a welcome addition to the protector. Review 9: rating 5.0. Best ever! Best kids car accessory invention yet!! I did wish though that the strap to buckle it around the headrest was a little longer due to the fact that our Altima headrests in the backseats are completely connected/built into the seat to where there are no metal parts showing. Other than that though, its a great product! We actually use the trash bin for whatever my son decides to throw or spill (like toys or snacks) and it ends up right in there until i have to clean it up, it... Review 10: rating 5.0. Great product & exceptional value Looks and works great. Just wish base was little wider for better protection and back was little taller to accomodate large SUV seats. Little snug fit even with headrest strap pulled out all the way. But, overall this is the best car seat cover in the market as I have tried three other brands and they dont come close to matching exceptional quality (material) and value offered by this product. Review 11: rating 2.0. Bought this new, however it came with white rub ... Bought this new, however it came with white rub marks. See picture, I think this has been used before. Review 12: rating 5.0. Great design! So awesome to have a trash can right below my toddlers chair!
Not gonna lie it has already functioned as a very convenient barf bucket when she got sick unexpectedly. My brand new car was very thankful for this seat protector and trash basket! Review 13: rating 5.0. Five Stars It has a built in trashcan!!!!! Review 14: rating 5.0. Seat saver!!!! This thing is a seat saver!! We bought a new car two weeks ago and as soon as the paperwork was done I ordered this seat protector. My daughters car seat was only on my seat for two days and when I removed it I already had little indents on my seat. This thing will help preserve the life of your seats. I wish I would have taken a picture of the seats in my old car they were permanently dented from her car seat. I also LOVE the little trash bag. It comes with a couple b... Review 15: rating 4.0. Darn good! Almost perfect. This fits both of our cars perfectly with the right amount of room to mount the car seat with the metal clips. One thing I didn’t consider was with the NuNa Pipa car seat is that the front trash part is basically useless as the balancing pole on the base covers it. If I feel I really need it, I may poke a hole in the slack to route it through. Otherwise, a future enhancement could be a slot for car seat bases that have a front pole. As these are standard i... Review 16: rating 1.0. Not durable Trash can part of protector tore before it was able to be used. Great idea, just wish it was a better quality.
persona: This customer prioritizes functional reliability and safety in baby products, especially those that prevent accidents and support early development, but is sensitive to perceived value and durability, often comparing alternatives and willing to accept minor flaws if the product performs well in critical use cases.

The picture seems to just fade as you use it daily anyway, kinda like no way to avoid it from happening. We love the bottle but just wish the picture wouldn't fade since it's so adorable. Review 12: rating 2.0. Two Stars Looking The Photo, I thougth that was The bottle and The plate an forks Review 13: rating 5.0. We love them. My 18 month old can open and ... I have several of the Owl and Lady Bug bottles. We love them. My 18 month old can open and close hers by herself and they rarely leak when closed, unlike most sippy cups. I have not had an issue with them getting scratched or looking badly and we use the dishwasher to clean them, other than normal wear ours look the same as they did 7 months ago. I have not even used the spare straws that were sent with the cup. I did drop one on my... Review 14: rating 5.0. The best straw sippy... And we have tried them all. This is a great sippy. It's easy to clean, sturdy, and doesn't leak.

When you put it together after washing, make sure you pull the soft straw through the hole in the lid and pull it hard before you put in the stiffer, plastic straw. If the softer straw is not all the way in, it might leak a bit. With the straw in correctly, it doesn't leak a drop.

My son really only likes straw cups and we have tried a ton... Review 15: rating 5.0. Perfect for SCHOOL! I was searching for a good water bottle for my kindergartner and this is IT! The bottle is easier to assemble than the well known brands (such as Gerber or NUK).
The straw has a special tip that allows it to actually reach all the way to the bottom AND it comes with an extra straw!
The strap is a GREAT way for a chil... Review 16: rating 2.0. bed acsess. Tubule dangerous for a child! It can bite and swallow e. Comfort ceases to be unnecessary when overtaking danger. No buy! THESE LEAK!!! There is a hole at the very top of the bottle, so when they turn them upside down or they are laying on their side without the cover being pulled down, water pours from them. Needless to say... after the twins using them for all of ... Review 19: rating 4.0. NOT top rack safe. These ARE not top rack safe.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Great for wide ac adapters! Great for baby-proofing outlets with wide ac adapters plugged in—this was the only one that worked for us! Review 2: rating 5.0. Perfect baby proofing for wide adapters in outlets. Why is this the only product made for outlets with wide adapters?! I’m so happy I found this product. I’ve been searching for so long and almost resorted to buying a cover meant for 4 outlets, which likely wouldn’t have installed correctly. This works perfectly and was so easy to install. I’ll be buying at least 1-2 more of these and sharing with all my mom groups.

There is one opening at the bottom that can be switched t... Review 3: rating 5.0. For larger plugs and kids that can take off cheap cap plug covers It's easy to install. I had an issue with everyone of the other plug covers I have tried. But this is big enough to fit larger plugs. Review 4: rating 5.0. easy to install and holds well It was extremely easy to install and is holding up well to my baby pulling up on it. Review 5: rating 5.0. Effective Great for bulky cords and outlets. Protects active inquisitive toddler. Review 6: rating 5.0. Good box for transformer service The box was large enough to hold the power transformers for my Ring alarm. It protects from accidental unplugging.

It is well ventilated to keep the transformers cool. Review 7: rating 5.0. If your looking for a large outlet cover look no further It works very well and is large enough to house any size plug, which is what i needed, just be sure to carefully read the instructions for not only appropriate install but also, and especially, how to uninstall. I struggled to remove mine but the manufacturers customer service was extremely kind and helpful. I can honestly say this company provides exceptional customer service and are very diligently working on continuously imp... Review 8: rating 5.0. Very Easy to install Easy to install, is the only thing that fits around different types of plugs and so far, still has a strong hold on the wall. I am buying a second one for our living room. Easy and quick These are perfect. Fast and easy to install while your baby is getting into all the other hazards in your house. My older MacBook Pro plug barely fit but everything else fits great, even the three wide plug extender I have in the nursery. Easy to get to the outlet too. Love it. Review 11: rating 5.0. The only cover I've found for baby monitor plugs I have an 18 month old. He likes to unplug things. This would not be an issue, if not for the fact that the plug for the baby monitor camera (Infant Optics DXR-8) is massive. I have not been able to find an outlet cover that would fit it; almost none extend past the outlet plate, and the plug is much wider than the plate.

This thing works. Unlike most covers, it doesn't replace your outlet place or screw into it or whatever.... Review 12: rating 5.0. Just what I needed Perfect outlet cover for larger things that need to be plugged in (like all new baby monitors and such). It is big but not sure how you’d get around that. Review 13: rating 5.0. Easy to Install Perfect size cover for the big plug connected to our camera in our sons room. Review 14: rating 5.0. Exactly what I needed I have cats that continually unplug things, this works perfectly. Great for larger plug extensions. Review 15: rating 4.0. Needs cord holes on both sides, otherwise awesome so far! I was disappointed that the cord openings are only on one side though. I needed at least one on each side. Right now the cord has to be tucked along the outside of it. See pictures. Debating if I want to try to cut holes on the other side,... Review 16: rating 5.0. Great outlet cover Big, but exactly what I needed for the weird large outlets in the baby's room. Easy to install. Review 17: rating 5.0. Easy install - fits wide AC adapters I was having trouble finding a cover that worked for our baby monitor due to the size of the adapter, but this worked WONDERFULLY! Definitely buying for other places in the house Review 18: rating 5.0. Awesome product Very easy to u stall and it works perfect Review 19: rating 5.0. Would buy again Only one I could find big enough to fit the plug for my camera. Love how easy the install was. Review 20: rating 5.0. Large enough for transformers This was the only cover I could find which would easily fit over multiple size transformers. Easy to install using 3M tape to wall and installation is more secure than other covers which only use outlet cover center screw.

Review 1: rating 5.0. Two paws up! Cute & Functional- a hit with my favorite cool cat. Sent this is a gift to one of my favorite kiddos, and he loved it! He's about 18 months old, and the size and weight is perfect in his hands. The push button is really easy for him to use, and when snapped close his Mom reports no leaks in her purse. This will be a must buy for upcoming kiddo birthday gifts! Review 2: rating 5.0. Perfect Sippy In Every Way! Munchkin nailed it with this one. This is THE best straw sippy out there and a huge bonus is that it’s also stainless steel. It’s super easy to wash and has only minimal parts to take apart. There are no inaccessible nooks or crannies for mold to hide (huge problem with many sippies). The flow rate of the straw is perfect for my one year old - not too fast, not too slow. The handles make it super easy for babies to grab on their own. It’s leakproof and ke... Review 3: rating 1.0. Leaks Disappointed, this cups is leaking badly Review 4: rating 3.0. This cup is perfect in every way, except that it leaks all over the place when left on its side (which my 1 year old has a tendency to do!). Also, even after I wash it (hand washed) and tip the cup upside down to dry, the next day it smells like sour milk so I have to wash it again. I do like how the drink stays cold. We only use this cup for water because there’s a small section of the upper part of the straw that is really hard to clean and rinse thoroughly. Once in a while she will bite the silicone straw, but the straw seems thick and sturdy enough to go up against baby bites. It’s a great product! Review 10: rating 4.0. Great cup, buy two! Pros: keeps milk cold in heat, easy to clean, not plastic, easy for my toddler to open and close

First, it is hard to clean the straw, but I appreciate that because it also does not spill easily. He can throw this one on the ground and no water comes out. I hope Munchkin continues to make them. I also wish that Munchkin sold straw replacements. If you puncture the straw with a straw cleaner, it destroys the ...

Overall nice unit, sturdy (and looks good). All other bassinets look terrible in my opinion. This is a nice sturdy base. Review 7: rating 5.0. Five Stars lovely and served its purpose Review 8: rating 5.0. lovely, sturdy, modern We wanted a new bassinet for our son to sleep in our room for the first couple of months. We looked at many and were drawn to this because it isn't frilly looking or bulky.
We absolutely love this one. With a four year old at home we needed something sturdy that she could look into at her baby brother, but wouldn't risk tipping easily. This would take a lot of force for her to tip, but she's rather gentle and tall and can easily look over the edge.
It... Review 9: rating 5.0. great bassinet I bought this bassinet for our newborn and she loves it - as do I. Style wise, it's very European with clean lines and it is not clunky - good if you are short on space. We don't use the "rocking" function as much as we do the sound, which we use practically every day. She loves her little bed and has no problems sleeping in it. Putting it together was a bit of a challenge, but I was 9 months pregnant, so that doesn't really count. I like that I was able to easily remo... Review 10: rating 3.0. This is a beautiful, well designed bassinet This is a beautiful, well designed bassinet. It is small, but appropriately so. Fits perfectly at bedside. The rocking motor is absolutely silent, even on the highest setting. Unfortunately can only give 3 stars bc my baby wouldn't sleep in it. I wanted a bassinet with motion, but ended up returning this to get a more traditional sleep swing. Review 11: rating 5.0. Great bassinet. Great design. I haven't been able to officially use this yet as the baby isn't born yet- but a couple of things I loved right off the bat:
- great design- it's solid and easy to put together
- the canopy does fold back and out of the way
- the mattress is surprisingly thicker than I thought it would be. I really think the baby will be fine laying on this with just a sheet over it.
- the rocking option is completely silent- literally!! It rocks by... Review 12: rating 3.0. Better than a cheap vibrating rocker i suppose Not sure how this item was rated so high. persona: This customer prioritizes product functionality as described, especially core features like motion mechanisms, and is willing to troubleshoot technical issues themselves when expectations aren't met; they value authenticity in product performance and may reconsider purchases if key advertised features fail to work as intended.
reference_output: rating 4.0. If it doesn't sway, open up the motor Was originally going to rate it 1 star because after we put it together and put fresh batteries in and took it off of demo mode the bassinet did not sway back and forth like in the description. Was pretty disappointed about that since the main reason why we bought the bassinet was because of the swaying motion. I didn't want to wait on a response from the seller to replace the motor so I opened it up the motor and realized that the belt was not wrapped around it, just the large weight. Once I fixed that, and put it back the bassinet was swaying like it was supposed to! -1 star for the inconvenience of that and because assembly was not so clear on the instructions.

reviews:

I'm going to attempt an exchange through Amazon and keep my fingers crossed that I have better luck ... Review 4: rating 2.0. Not secure Easily opened. Definitely not secure. Review 5: rating 5.0. Gate Don't like the fact you have to unlock every time Review 17: rating 1.0. reference_output:
rating 1.0. Need a extra wide half wall? I’m not gonna lie this thing is quite possibly the worst product that made it all the way through production.
Let me say I am an in home childcare provider which means some of my space gets used for work during the week and home life on the weekends. My playroom has a large opening so a traditional gate with a door might not have been safe.
This thing is sturdy which is awesome!
Can I use it and carry a kid out of the room? Absolutely not. Takes both hands and a leg to open it! I had to add a shelf so I can put my trays down or a child and unlock get to the other side and Houdini it closed again.

I bought this because I bought a Frenchie who I do not want to puppy teethe all my toys. I definitely didn’t want her little head picking through any metal gates that’s not a trip to the vet I want ever.

So when puppy is on the outside and I have a kid who needs to potty it is a total ring a round the doggie, dodge and latch.

So if you need a small half screen wall sure it will do. Bu5 if you need t9 move through it even 2 times a day that is 10 minutes you will never get back.

That !38!( said I have accepted my doom and will keep it until it breaks or I move.

Review 1: rating 5.0. Finally, a teether that doesn't gag my small mouthed baby! My daughter is 3 months old, but she started teething early. Its the only one she will put in her mouth by herself. Review 2: rating 5.0. Teether Ordered as a gift and sent to another address. From all reports, the baby love the teether! Would order it again. The nubby prong-like arms going out in more than one direction was the main reason she took to it so early; since most other teethers are flat when baby is too young to know to rotate their wrist in order to get something they're holding into their mouth, this was the only one that really worked for her.
... Review 4: rating 1.0. Very unsafe teether Pathetic product as it used to get in to the baby's nose or eyes while chewing one end !

He ended up with 4 fingers in his mouth and he would burst out crying even while sleeping, still eyes closed. I've given him differen... Review 1: rating 2.0. seat belt adjuster uncomfortable My grandson kept taking it off so it then stayed off and was not needed in our case. reviews:
Review 1: rating 2.0. Not Worth It Only reading we ever get is 97.3 with a rare occasional 97.7. That includes times when my kiddos have had high temps and been in the 100s for real. Review 2: rating 1.0. This simply does not work This supposed to be a one button device. Hold the button and get your temperature. Instead, you hold the button and it wants to switch back and forth between C and F. Hold 8 seconds, instructions claim, and it will reset. But it NEVER, EVER returns a temperature result. Just three dashed lines. NO TEMPERATURE is measured with this device. It is a total scam. Review 3: rating 2.0. Not Reliable or accurate It does not measure temperature accurately. We compared to a normal oral thermometer multiple times after using and thinking we didn't have fever but did. It was off by degrees... plural. Not reliable source for temperature. Im just sorry my need to use was past the cutoff date to return so I guess it will go in trash and mark up to a lesson learned. Very disappointed. If companies, schools e.t.c using these for Covid screening, alot of people may be i... Review 4: rating 1.0. Does Not Work It looks great, but this item did not work at all when used according to the directions. We have never had a successful reading of a temperature even with fresh batteries. Review 5: rating 1.0. Unfortunately it doesn't work It doesn't work. It powers up & all, but never actually gives a reading. There are "possible reasons for measurement errors" on the instruction sheet but they are mot relevant (possibilities are holding it yoo far away - I wasn't; environmental temperature issues - I am in my NYC home, its room temp here; target temp exceeds range - I tried it on my kid's head and my own head). rating 4.0. Good product, some installation problems and service..... I got this product a long time ago, but had/have some issues, mainly customer service, so, gave a lower grade. I installed the corner guards to see what the product was like. They worked perfectly. But.......installing the longer piece/pieces is different. The corner guards have the tape on, you just peel it off, and press on the corners. Great. The tape is not already on the longer roll. I had it all over my fingers instead of the roll. On the enclosure, it says it's made by a small family run business. I contacted there-mail address for some guidance, but not heard back in almost a week. So, I am disappointed because it shoukd have been on long ago, but it's sitting here.

I wanted to get more. Not so sure now. The product itself is perfect tho, for what it's intended......saving small heads and bodies some bruises.

rating 2.0. Not Good for using in a pack n play I wanted a better mattress in the pack and play. This is not a snug fit for it. If thats what you want don't buy this. Otherwise it seems ok.

Editing to add that this is def. not a good mattress to put in your pack and play especially once your children start moving. I am having to take it out because there is a gap down the side as it is not quite large enough. My boy got his arm trapped down there when he rolled on his belly and got himeself stuck. This should NOT be used in a pack and play.

It is now going to be a bed for my cocker spaniels.

Review 1: rating 5.0. Amazing This was an amazing product it worked with my son's front facing car seat through MSP (Minneapolis/St. Paul) airport and MCO (Orlando). So many people asked if I custom made this strap and as tempting as it was to take credit I told them the truth. I had at least 20 people approach me and ask me about it and so many people in the distance stating that that's an amazing idea or they wish they did what I did. So yes I am waiting for my advertising royalties lol. Overall amazing...

Review 2: rating 5.0. Great product I bought these as an affordable and space saving option for traveling with 2 suitcases and 2 large pieces of luggage. I have a britax click smart seat and a diono seat. Very different in size and bulkiness but the straps (I bought 2) worked great! It did take two of us to get it clasped as the cat seat needed to be raised off the floor in order to have the latch attach but I'm guessing that is I had adjusted it to be longer I wouldn't have had that problem. They were su...

Review 3: rating 5.0. Very convenient and easy to use!!! Great product. Very easy to use. Fit around my suitcase and my rolling my hand bag

Review 4: rating 5.0. Five Stars Item worked just as it said it would

Review 5: rating 5.0. This product is amazing! Super simple to use and extremely durable This product is amazing! Super simple to use and extremely durable! Made traveling with two kids by myself super easy! I was going to get carseat trollies but could not figure out how I would pull the trollies and my suitcase all at once. Came across this and it is awesome! I will be getting another for my sons carseat if we happen to fly again and my husband is with! Definitely recommend this product for traveling!

Review 6: rating 5.0. Perfect and neccessary accessory for the airport I used this belt to attach my toddler's car seat to her umbrella stroller instead of a suitcase. It worked well and I didn't have to carry 2 pieces to the airplane gate because of this belt. My toddler sat in her car seat while it was attached to her umbrella stroller and I pushed both pieces together. It was a great idea by another reviewer below which also showed pictures. A life saver for the airport.

Review 7: rating 5.0. Couldn't be happier! Great for travel! great car seat. We have a maxi Cosi that I have in my car but it was too heavy to travel with, so I purchased this one as an extra car seat and for travel. He loves it. It fits very well and does not move at all! It's great!

Review 8: rating 5.0. ... car seat to my umbrella stroller and it worked great. For such a simple device it made travel ... I also used it to connect the car seat to my umbrella stroller and it worked great. For such a simple device it made travel with all my gear and the baby being myself so doable.

Review 9: rating 3.0. Does what it says. It does the trick, but you really have to tighten the thing around the luggage to make it effective.  Ultimately, just went with the $5 cart to carry all the luggage to and from the car.

Review 10: rating 5.0. Ordered this in hopes it would help better manage all the crap I had to cart around ... I flew with my hyperactive 2-year-old on my own for the first time a few weeks ago, and man oh man was I nervous about it! Ordered this in hopes it would help better manage all the crap I had to cart around the airport. Happy to say, it performed beautifully! I found it a very user-friendly product and plan on traveling with it again next week.

Review 11: rating 5.0. Great buy Worked perfectly for us hauling 3 children and 3 car seats through the airport.  We were able to set other items on top of the suitcase and it not bother the car seat adjustment.

Review 12: rating 5.0. Works great Did it's intended job. Ive only used it twice for a roundtrip flight. I traveled with 2 carseats one huge luggage and smaller luggage. I strapped one carseat to the larger luggage and wore the other carseat in a backpack made for it. Definitely made navigating thru the airport immensely easier.

Review 13: rating 5.0. Amazing! Cheap solution to car seat travel. I order these straps in liu of getting a car seat carrier. They were much cheaper, and much more useful. I was able to use just my carry on instead of having to pull two different things. I did not have my child in the seat during use, although I do think it would be possible.

Review 14: rating 5.0. Perfect for traveling! This strap saved the day!! It does exactly what it says it does and is super easy to use.

Review 15: rating 2.0. Loose thread Loose thread at first time use. It won't work for our luggage as instructed. Maybe because my luggage is too slippery it won't hold in place.

Review 16: rating 5.0. Worked amazingly!! We just used this on our trip with the family. Worked amazing even with it heavy britax car seat. It's definitely the cheapest option for transporting a car seat through the airport.

Review 17: rating 5.0. Five Stars Awesome! Got 2 for 2 seats. Will not be traveling without them in the future!

Review 18: rating 5.0. Five Stars Traveled solo with two kids and two car seats, this helped make the trip easier.

Review 19: rating 5.0. Definitely a necessity when traveling with car seats! I am a single mom who recently just took my crazy toddler to Disneyland! I had to travel with a big stroller, carry ons and his car seat! This belt was probably the best thing I bought for my vacation! Easy to install and it made my trip easier and hassle free. I would recommend this to every one! Such a great buy!

Review 20: rating 5.0. if they are nice, the stroller will be stowed inside the plane ... This thing was a lifesaver! I recently travelled with my two and a half year old for the first time ALONE! I was able to strap her carseat onto my rolling suitcase, as pictured, and have a free hand to push her stroller through the airport. I sat my carry on bag on top of the rolling suitcase, and I wore a cheap backpack as my "purse". That's how you travel with a kid folks! Check the stroller at the plane, if...

reference_output: rating 5.0. Five Stars Works great!!! Even for my carry on it fit perfectly

reviews:
Review 1: rating 4.0. Works well, but no drain I bought this because my daughter grew out of her infant tub. I was a little skeptical because there were no reviews, and it appears that my skepticism was well placed. So far, it's a good tub and I like the little pockets to put toys and soap, but there's no drain! Since I can't pull a plug at the end of bathtime to drain the water, I have to wait until after I take my baby out and get her dressed before I can dump the whole thing. It's a little bit heavy wi... Review 2: rating 5.0. I really like it! My baby is 6 months old and she is already enjoying it. I think it can make shower time really cool and for sure I will take it on vacations next week. Review 3: rating 2.0. Super Slippery!!!!!!! This product inflated easily enough, is adorable and is easy to store (i just put a command hook in my shower and hung it up). However, it is EXTREMELY SLIPPERY. We used it last night for the first time with my 8 month old son and he was sliding everywhere. We did not have this problem with the safety first tub we'd had for our older son. I will have to buy a bath mat to put at the bottom of the tub and will need to be even more alert that I was previously, ... Review 4: rating 1.0. Too slippery! First of all this tub is a nightmare to inflate, I blew it up by mouth and it took forever and was very awkward. Next filling it up with water was difficult because the side came out too far from the spout and I ended up having to use a cup to fill it with water. When I put my son in it I immediately realized how slippery the bottom was and I could barely keep him sitting up. Every time he would start moving around he would slip from one side to another and flip over on... Review 5: rating 2.0. Pops holes too easily! It would be great if it wouldn't pop a hole and leak after only a few weeks of use! All of these blow up tubs do this. Review 6: rating 2.0. Too small! This tub is way to small for a toddler...too bad b/c it's adorable. Better off ordering the one from "One Step Ahead." Review 7: rating 2.0. Not what expected Not quite what I expected. On the small side and shredded upon inflating it. Had to return for a refund.
Not interested in ordering another one. Review 8: rating 3.0. Nice for traveling, but baby slides around in it a lot. I always bring this with me when we travel with our son because you never know what products were used to clean other peoples/ hotel room bathtubs. It's definitely useful for traveling, but you better keep a constant hold on your baby because their little butts slide all around on the flat bottom of the inflatable and can whack their head on the sides of the bathtub. I don't use it at home for that reason Review 9: rating 3.0. Some reservations I purchased this inflatable tub when our previous one started deflating constantly. This one is cute (with Elmo and Cookie Monster) and seems to be of good quality. It fits into our standard tub, and our baby enjoys bathing in it. My only complaint is that the pillow takes up a lot of room and is not removable, so our baby will grow out of it quicker than tubs without a pillow. Our baby is currently 15 months old and about 32" tall. She fits in it fine for now.... Review 10: rating 4.0. Good for Travel I purchased this inflatable tub for travel. My family is constantly on the move, my four month old has already stayed in 3 hotels! I read through other reviews before purchasing because overall it was a great item.
After using it I would definitely say its a must have.

Pros
The cubbies/pockets were great for holding the shampoo and wash cloth while bathing.
Deflates quickly for travel.
Suction on rear was great to hang dry in the hotel... Review 11: rating 5.0. Strong Material and Baby Loves it!!! I've used another of these tubs for over 2 years and just got this replacement, after the first one developed a slow leak. My 3 year old loves it and the bottom of the tub stays cushy and filled with air for years, which is amazing, because the baby is "Really Rough" on it. Purchase rounded bath toys for this item, as "anything" with even a "slight" edge or point will end up puncturing it when the baby's "exuberant... Review 12: rating 5.0. perfect transition to the tub My daughter is on the larger side for her age (7mo). This inflatable tub is perfect to move her from the hard plastic countertop tub she has out grown. I love the temperature patch and that it has a few places to hold the shampoo. Review 13: rating 5.0. Great product and safe for babies Great bath tub my son loves it ...!!! The baby feels confident and safe bathing -very good product ,fits perfectly in a regular bath tub Review 14: rating 2.0. no drain. there is no drain!!! the dirty water just piles up. the pockets are cool though. wasn't enough for me to keep it. The cup holders are nice. I put a cup of water for rinsing his hair in one of the cup holders and after we were done washing (and rinsing) they became fun places for my son to shove bath toys. Review 16: rating 2.0. didnt like it it's good for traveling. we took it on a trip and it got a hole somehow so we had to inflate it every night. It does not offer good support for baby, you have to watch them super closely. It is also very slippery and baby kept going under water. Would not recommend. Review 17: rating 5.0. Perfect for bathtime! We started using this tub for our daughter as soon as she could sit up (even while she was still wobbly). She was a big baby and the infant tub was just too small for her. She is 13 months now and we still use this tub and she loves it! It really helps to not have to fill up the entire bathtub for her baths and the inflatable tub is nice is she gets a bit unsteady. I do not love the seat back...she moves around so much that is never is used has a seat and it ... Review 18: rating 5.0. Perfect for my little one This is a much better choice for my 7 month old than his hard side tub. Since he is starting to sit up, the inflated sides are a good cushion when he is a little wobbly. He really enjoys bathtime a lot more.

I'm not sure if the Cold/Warm/Hot temperature scale is accurate, though. It always says his water is cold, no matter how warm I think that it is. Review 19: rating 5.0. Absolutely perfect! I have a 13 month old that is all over the place in the tub and isn't very sure footed in it. It's not that I fill up the tub with too much water or anything but she get's uneasy and scared in the water. This inflatable tub is perfect, fits well in the tub and she is able to play in the water more to get used to it. Before this I tried giving her a bath in the sink but that only freaked her out more so this was the perfect solution. My one regret is that I didn't ... Review 20: rating 4.0. Extra features not really functional, but tub works great. Fits snug in the tub, so it won't wiggle around. However, it is a little tough to fill up because the faucet in the bathtub runs on the edge of the tub and you lose lots of the water unless you stand there and actually push the side flat against the tub to fill it.

The water indicators don't really work, but that's not much of a surprise and we don't really use the shampoo holders. However, it is soft and provide...
persona: This customer prioritizes safety and comfort for their infant during bath time, seeking products that ease resistance to water and promote positive bathing experiences, and is willing to invest in reliable, effective solutions that support their child’s development and emotional well-being.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Very safe and helpful for smaller babies or anti-bath babies This has really helped for my son. He was anti-water and anti-bath. As soon as I bought this I started using it. Now, he wants to sit in the bath all night if he could. He has become a fan of water. He splashes like a maniac and will be very animated and happy in the bath. This makes me feel that he is safe in the bath and comfortable. He is 23 lbs and we will continue to use until he outgrows this. At some point, in next 6 months or so this will happen. I have found this to be a wonderful asset. I wish I had known about this product when he was younger.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. A lightweight travel bag that folds into a nice pouch when not used A lightweight travel bag that folds into a nice pouch when not used. Fits the purpose- protecting the Maclaren stroller from dirt. Not crazy expensive in comparison with other similar products. Hopefully will last as long as a stroller. Review 2: rating 5.0. Great product, highly reccommend! Great product! I would highly reccommend. Excellent features: sturdy fabric and handle, folds up small when not in use, generous size, strong drawstring. It has only been gate-checked twice so far but still looks brand new. We have a Joovy Ultralight umbrella stroller and it fits with room to spare. Review 3: rating 3.0. Nice for a cheap stroller bag I liked that this stoller bag fit my stroller, but for us and our family who travel a lot, we thought that this travel bag was a little thin and felt like in the long run may not hold up for us. We also thought that the bag needed more padded protection for our stroller. So unfortuantly we returned this bag. Review 4: rating 3.0. basic Umbrella stroller bag Hello,
This bag was perfect for the traveling. However, the zip tie at the top does not stay locked. So this will cause the bag to reopen. It is durable material like all stroller bags say, but we did get a cut on the bag through "normal" luggage handling at the airport. For the price we paid, I can't be that mad about it.

Its an OK stroller bag for families who travel once a year. I would not recommend this for families who travel ... Review 5: rating 1.0. would be nice if it had wheels like other models would be nice if it had wheels like other models. More of a pain than a help in the airport. One more thing to carry. I used it with a Graco Breaze click connect stroller. It is a little bigger than standard umbrella strollers. It was a tight squeeze length wise, but I did not have time to take the wheels off at the gate. Very sturdy material. Would highly recommend! Review 7: rating 4.0. Not sure how durable it will be after a flight will have to see have not really used it for the plane yet. Seems to be able to serve it's purpose and very roomy. Review 8: rating 5.0. Perfect for Long Haul Travel Perfect for what I was wanting. Fits our Maclaren Techno XT with no problems, have travelled Long Haul - NZ to LAX with this twice and have checked in the stroller at check in. I'm hoping I can sew it as it ripped along the seam but disappointed that it ripped the very first time I used it. Review 10: rating 5.0. Highly recommend Product is much more durable than the lighter material red bags we used when traveling with our 5 year old a few years back. Seller is dedicated to customer service. Great product for use when gate checking a stroller to keep the dirt out! Review 11: rating 5.0. Great stroller cover for airline travel Fit our ups baby umbrella stroller well and also we used it to protect a car seat (it was a tight fit) but it kept both clean and un damaged. I put my First Years Ignite Stroller from City Chic into the bag at the gate and retrieved it from baggage claim at the other end of the flight. When I retrieved the bag, it had holes in two places. It's always come open by the time we pick it up at the end of the flight. And because of that, the handle of our stroller had the cushiony material ripped off part of it. That's why I bought a cheap-ish stroller to ... Review 18: rating 5.0. Love this bag! Received my product real quick. Just now able to use it since I received it a couple weeks ago. I have a delta children's double umbrella stroller (right around 18 lbs) and it fits in the bag just fine. I am not able to close it all the way with the drawstrings but that's ok too since I wasn't expecting for it to. I just love that it protects dirt from getting into my car, very sturdy, and real easy to use. Totally worth the money for what you pay for!
It has a cu... Review 19: rating 5.0. Fit my car seat roller accessory. Great Quality. Roomy. Strong strap for luggage tags. Strong string. Says "Fragile", not gate check. I like the ID tag built that's built in. It stores wonderfully in its storage clutch that's built in and you fold the bag into.
I used this to contain my Magna Cart hand truck. I used the cart to roll my car seat + toddler through the airport and down the plane isle (Diono Radian RXT).
The cart fit perfectly in this bag, and I stored ... Review 20: rating 3.0. Quite disappointed. Review 1: rating 2.0. Did not prevent diaper rash My husband and I have been using another brand of diaper cream since my son was born ten weeks ago, mainly as a preventative measure. I am a big fan of Burt's Bees products and their natural ingredients, so I decided to purchase this diaper cream/powder. What a mistake! Within three days of using this exclusively, my son's bottom began to turn red and irritated. When we realized we quickly turned back to the other product and it quickly cleared. I'm disapp... Review 2: rating 5.0. Perfect Combo of Powder and Ontiment Starting using this and can't do without. It is a cream and oil based ointment for babies bum.It goes on like a cream but dries clear and soft to touch, keeping baby dry. It is hard to find in stores so I have to order it and will continue. Review 3: rating 3.0. meh... The point of powder is to dry... this goes on easy enough but gets slimey when moisture hits it. While I like burts bees and the idea of it in theory, its not great, stick with their regular powder, its awesome. Review 4: rating 3.0. It's ok, but not my favorite I bought this on a whim to see how it would work. It worked ok, but my baby ended up getting a pretty severe diaper rash and we had to switch to aquaphor which works great! The most annoying thing about this cream is that it separates and if you don't shake it real well you get an oily goo at first squeeze. Review 5: rating 3.0. Not as good as the original... I wanted to like this, but it just plain doesn't work as well as the original. It does seem to keep things less moist, ya know, down there, but diaper rash just didn't clear up as fast as with the original. It is easier to apply since it is less pasty than the original though. Review 6: rating 3.0. It's definitely NOT as good as the classic diaper ointment It's definitely NOT as good as the classic diaper ointment. The texture is weak and you need to use more of the product for diaper ointment. The diaper ointment has a thick texture, this one is kind of watery and more of a lotion type product. Will go back to the classic diaper ointment. Review 7: rating 3.0. Smells nice, but didn't do anything to prevent or alleviate ... Smells nice, but didn't do anything to prevent or alleviate my daughter's redness on her bottom, even when applied with every change. But their diaper ointment. It's mich better. Review 8: rating 1.0. I think he would have been more comfortable with nothing on his bottom then this I was expecting it to dry into a powder but it did not. Easy to use, really helps my little one use the larger toilets in restaurants, stores and parks. I find if I put the toilet seat liner under this the suction cups don’t suction to the toilet, my little isn’t touching a public toilet, and all is well. Not sure how people’s kids get “pinched,” as the “seams” at the hinges close completely once there is weight on the seat. It seems like a non issue to us. Highly recommend. We take it everywhere. But, being paranoid parents, the idea of padding a crib mattress sent thoughts of SIDS and smothered babies through our mind. So we bought this mattress pad. And it worked. The cribs now has a nice softness to it, so it was closer in feel to the bassinet. The little guy sl... Dex Baby Miracle Mat This mat adds a bit of plushness to the crib mattress without the risk of suffocation. I got this for my 10-month-old and it seems to have made her bed more comfortable. I added a mattress pad which worked a bit, but I worried about the breathability. Someone on babycenter suggested this pad. From the picture, it looks very thin. Not so! It's actually a very nice thickness, added a great deal of cushion & gives me more piece if mind. Baby has begun to sleep for several hours comfortably in the crib. Review 5: rating 2.0. The main reason I got it though, is because he loves to sleep face down with his face squished into the mattress. It makes me nervous, but now I feel better knowing that his face is in this breathable pad and that he can definitely breathe through it. Review 7: rating 5.0. I am very annoyed as this was a great monitor 5 months ago and with the price of this we thought it would last years! Very disappointed. Will be contacting Motorola today ...

persona: This customer prioritizes ease of use and reliable performance in a compact, wearable device, values clear image quality without interference, and appreciates straightforward setup—while being willing to accept minor limitations like limited zoom and lack of multi-camera split-screen if the overall experience remains smooth and intuitive.
reference_output:
rating 4.0. Good product, better than previous models, but not compatible with previous models as well This MBP36S works better than MBP36: despite the fact the specifications are almost the same between both model, this one has a wider range, better signal, even with walls between camera and monitor. Furthermore, I have no problems of interference between this camera and my wi-fi router, as I used to have with my MBP36. Summing up: good product.
The monitor connects up to 4 cameras; however, each camera can be connect to one and only one monitor at a time; after pairing a camera to another monitor, the previous monitor will not connect that camera anymore until paired again (the same behavior that happened to previous model MBP36).
However, I was expecting the monitor to connect with previous models, such as MBP36, but it did not work at all. I've read some comment here at Amazon that it would work, but it did not connect to previous models, and the instructions guide let no doubt about this.
So, if you're looking for a new baby monitor to be independent of your wi-fi network (to avoid hackers waking your baby up during the night), this is a good option. But if you have some MBP36 and are thinking about expanding your "baby monitoring network", as I was, forget this.

reference_output:
rating 5.0. Wabi baby sterilizer vs. Baby Brezza Sterilizer I own both the Baby Brezza Sterilizer and dryer and the Wabi baby Sterilizer and dryer and have used both for the past 7 months. I use the Wabi at home and the Baby Brezza at my lake home. I bought both to see which was better and figured that I could take the one I didn't like as much to the lake. I would recommend the Wabi sterilizer over the Brezza for the following reasons:

#1. The biggest problem with the Baby Brezza is that unless you are drying just bottles and nipples (and only 6 bottles, at that) you'll find yourself playing a game of stack 'um up each time you try to load this thing. I like to sterilize my pump parts each day, and there really is no good way to put them in the Brezza. I like to wash bottles/bottle parts, pacifiers, and pump parts all together at the end of the night, and so that leaves me with a lot to sterilize and dry. The Wabi utilizes a big basket that you can throw everything into, much more convenient. I feel like I can comfortably fit about 50% more items in the Wabi vs. the Brezza, and I can just throw them in the Wabi vs. having to carefully stack them in the Brezza.

#2 The lid on the Brezza can be hard to put on if you have anything hanging over the edge of the unit. With the Wabi, this is not an issue because of the bucket style. I LOAD the Wabi up with a ton of nipples, rings and pacifiers (honestly, I way overload it, I put everything I can possibly fit in there) and I don't have any problems with everything getting dry. You just can't do this with the Brezza because of the design. I have overloaded the Brezza more than once and when I take the top off, nipples, rings and pacifiers are falling all over the counter.

#3 The Wabi is more versatile - it can be used with the bucket only, or you can put the bottle insert into the bucket. There is also another insert that holds plates, silverware, etc (I have not used this yet as my baby is still young). There is a grate type insert that sits on top of the bucket to hold smaller items such as pump valves and pacifiers.

In response to 1 and 2 star reviews: I have not had ANY difficulty with my Wabi, so I can't speak to the effectiveness of customer service. However, I think that it is worth noting that you CANNOT overfill the Wabi with water. I always use the measuring cup and I put a little less than the top line in the machine. I found out the hard way that if you overfill it, it can leak onto the counter (just a small amount, however). I use this sterilizer very frequently, and it continues to run like a champ.

The one downside to the Wabi is that it is a bit more expensive, however, it is very much worth the extra money. While the baby Brezza will get the job done, if you have the extra cash, spring for the Wabi.

I researched convertible car seats for days before I decided to buy this one a... Review 16: rating 3.0. Safe, but not comfortable We purchased this for the grandparents' car. Love how easily the straps rise by using the handle at the top for when they grow a little.

reference_output: rating 5.0. I love the stroller and 100% recommend it.

reference_output:
rating 5.0. Extremely Useful I have an Uppababy Vista and this works great. I was looking for just a cup-holder, but I didn't want to buy a cup-holder that goes on the outside of the handle. I always see people bumping into things or things getting caught on those types of cup holders. This item works well because everything is on the inside of the handle bars. It doesn't fit as well when we have the bassinet in the stroller, but works perfectly when the car seat or regular stroller seat is in.
I love the pocket with a zipper to keep my wallet or keys in and the extra slots for quick access to my cell phone or burp cloths. It's nice because it has two deep cup-holders, so I can put a baby bottle in one slot and my drink in the other. The cup-holders are best for water bottles and can fit large coffee cups with lids. It's true that since the Uppababy Vista's handle bar is at a 45 degree angle, it can be difficult to get the caddy to sit upright, but with a little adjusting of the straps, it can be done. The caddy is super easy to strap on and is made of a washable nylon fabric. I'm really glad I purchased this product and would highly recommend it!

rating 2.0. Quality is terrible I normally get the Mama Bear Best Fit diapers which are wonderful but lately they have not been available and I’ve had to get these.

reference_output:
rating 5.0. Best. High chair. Ever. I absolutely love this thing. I feel like I've gotten away with something spending only $25 on a high chair. The full size high chairs are impossible to clean, take up a ton of space, and aren't sturdy when baby is crawling and subsequently toddling around. This chair addresses all of those problems. In fact, I'm buying a second one to keep in the car.

We rarely use the tray insert, as our daughter kept pulling it off. But we put the tray itself in the dishwasher nightly with no ill effects. I even put the whole seat in the dishwasher once, and if I hadn't melted one of the strap clips on the heating element, that would've been fine, too (I was able to steal a clip from another item around the house).

So many baby things are expensive disappointments. This is a rare purchase that actually brings me glee on a daily basis.

reference_output: rating 2.0. I really dislike this product First of all, item arrived with a broken cap and had leaked all over the shipping box. Irritated my kid's skin worse. Eczema soaps and lotions shouldn't have added scents because it makes the condition worse not better!  And it isn't even a nice scent. Think really old lady perfume. I ended up getting the Aveeno Baby Soap and Shampoo as well as Babytime Soothing Cream for a lotion and the combination of those two cleared up the eczema.

Review 1: rating 4.0. Awesome! This is well worth the money. It makes bathing my son a whole lot easier. I wish it was slightly longer though. Review 2: rating 2.0. The padding is very thick and made me feel more comfortable with this purchase, which at the time seemed more of a luxury than a necessity. Review 9: rating 5.0. The Velcro strap works great to hang it on the towel bar so it can dry out. Suction cups work great as well and prevents the unit from moving around. Review 10: rating 5.0. Definitely does what it says! My family of 3 lives in a smallish house from 1945, so we only have one bathroom. reference_output:
rating 1.0. BROKEN in so many ways, DOES NOT soothe baby... in fact it does the opposite The modes do not work on this. It progresses between modes, rather than staying on the one selected (as described on the product packaging.) So if you want to avoid the bright lights that keep baby stimulated, this doesn't work. It worked to entertain my baby, NOT soothe him and certainly not put him to sleep!
I posted a question for the manufacturer/seller, and did not receive a response...although I did receive responses from others saying that their glow soother did the same thing. I tried to return it, but would have to pay partial shipping to do so because all of the amazon lockers in my area were full on all the days that I checked.
So I kept it.
And now it's broken. It shuts off part-way through the progression. I changed the batteries and it still shuts off randomly.
I've been so happy with my amazon purchases, but with this one...I'm very disappointed.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Great Bath Thermometer + Mom's Peace of Mind Love this baby bath thermometer! So easy to use, gives up to the second temp readings with color indicator. Blue = too cold for comfort, Green = good, Red = too hot/unsafe for baby. It turns itself off right after you take it out of the tub, but I love that you can change out the batteries too if needed. Good water seal, not a throw away item.

I started using this thermometer when I was pregnant to ensure that I wasn't bathi... Review 2: rating 1.0. Don't buy This stopped working after three months. Thinking it was just an off one we purchased another which stopped working in less than a month. Very cute but don't buy. Review 3: rating 5.0. Monika Very good product (for now). It shows you the temp very fast and clear. I used different company before and it didn't last for too long so I'm really hoping this one will last a bit longer... Review 4: rating 2.0. Was bigger than expected. Worked well for a few ... Was bigger than expected. Worked well for a few months, then the screen got messed up somehow and it stopped working. Review 5: rating 5.0. Great bath thermometer! We use it every bath time and it works very well. I love that it displays the actual temperature and changes colors when the water is too cold, to hot or just right. We keep it in the tub the whole bath, so that we know if the water is cooling off. Its also adorable just as a little toy. To prolong the battery, once you're done, just take it out and put it vertically so that the water drains out and the light turns off. Review 6: rating 5.0. Good for the money So far so good. Nice to see what temperature the water is at. Haven't pulled out another thermometer to check how correct it is, but so far the water has seemed a good temperature when we put our hands in and the baby has been happy. We did double check the battery compartment seal when installing the batteries to be sure it was intact after reading reviews of others having issues with it.
Digital readout and different color backlights for cold, acceptable,... Review 7: rating 1.0. One Star Stopped working after three months. Review 8: rating 5.0. I worry unnecessarily. I figured that this was a small price ... I ordered this thermometer bath toy for my new baby, because (let's face it) as a first time mom, I worry unnecessarily. I figured that this was a small price to pay for a little peace of mind.

First off, this is a great product. Not only does the turtle accurately display the bath temperature, but the temperature display is also back-lit with red, blue, or green to let you know with just a glance whether the... Review 9: rating 1.0. Disappointed after some usage :( It's super cute. Now I don't have to worry about the temperature being too hot or too cold. Sometimes I don't realize that the water is getting cold becuz I'm too occupied playing with my daughter, but with this, I red really catches my eye and reminds me bath time is over. She loves the turtle too. It's soft and cute. Doubles as a bath toy.

UPDATE- after a week's usage I have to say I'm really disappointed in the product. The temperature ... Review 10: rating 1.0. Poor Quality It lasted about a week before the temperature readings were so far off the device was useless. Review 11: rating 1.0. Pass on this product! We are new parents of a little girl and had no idea what the safe range was for the baby's bath. I love this product because it clearly shows what the temperature is at all times while our child is in the infant bath tub.
I highly recommend this product to others.

Update 4/22:
Less than two weeks into the usage of this product it broke. It will only read the blue 00.0 F display. I'll be returning it back to the manufacturer.

As ... Review 12: rating 1.0. Be really nice if it worked Worked for a few weeks before you could no longer read the numbers as water must of gotten in from somewhere! Be really nice if it worked. The kids loved it and so did I... one of those I wish I could return. Review 13: rating 2.0. It was good but stopped working after a month... we bought the turtle a few months ago. at first it was great, though we would have preferred it to be able to change from Fahrenheit to celzios, but the lights indicating if the temperature is right were good so we had no problem. BUT after a few weaks it started sometimes not to work. we thought it was the battery but changing it didn't help...
after about a month it stopped working.
although it's not that expensive, there a... Review 14: rating 1.0. Leakage Issues! After about one month, condensation started to build up inside and shortly after it stopped working completely. When I opened it up and it was all rusted inside. I'd recommend a different brand. Review 15: rating 3.0. Love this guy, but have already replaced once due to sensitive sensor Mr. Turtle, as we call him, is a staple of bathtime and has been since our now 1-year-old was born. We've had already replaced him once because we liked it so much, but the fact that it needs replacing is why it gets 3 stars.

Pros:
1) Great fun for baby. He's chunky and cute and has nice feet for teething gums to gnaw on. She would squeal with delight watching him float around in the tub.
2) It... Review 16: rating 1.0. It worked for a month and a half This expensive baby thermomether just worked for a month and 13 days, I use it every day to prepare the bath of my baby. But not for longer than 5 minutes. And now has water inside and you can't read the temperature. Don't buy this thing , is a waste of money. Review 17: rating 1.0. Used 1 time now the LCD screen doesn't show temp ... Used 1 time now the LCD screen doesn't show temp, just portions of undecipherable numbers. The color coding system randomly blinks between red and blue as it floats around around the tube, even in very cold water. Would not buy again. Review 18: rating 1.0. Unsafe product! We got this product to replace a different bath thermometer that stopped working. With it being a safety product I verified the temperature prior to using it with my son. Part of what I do for a living is instrumentation calibration and I used a calibrated Fluke temperature meter/sensor to test it so I have no doubts in how accurate my test instrument is. The first bath thermometer was a little over 5 degrees F out from my meter. Considering the "just right... Review 19: rating 4.0. Otherwise it's a great product, cute Works as claims. My only complaint is that it doesn't have an on and off button (I used to have one with an off button) so it stays on all the time. Even if the bath tub is "empty" if this is touching the bottom, a little bit of water gets trapped under it and it will stay on until I turn it upside down. Otherwise it's a great product, cute, and works as expected. Review 20: rating 1.0. Dont bother It broke after two months.. contacted amazon they replaced it for free abs it got it fast... but the new one did not work when. I got it out of the box.. just gave up
persona: This customer prioritizes functional performance and reliability in household products, especially those impacting daily routines and child care, and is willing to overlook minor flaws if the product delivers clear benefits, but is frustrated by inconsistent operation and inefficiency.
reference_output: rating 2.0. I love this device I love this device, made me realize I was previously washing my son in water that was far too cold. Poor baby. BUT this thing is so fickle. Sometimes it just doesn't activate and I need to sit around and wait for it to decide to turn on. It ends up making me waste a lot of water.  I have no idea why sometimes it will start and other times it wont.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. It's a cupholder. Serves its purpose; easy to install. Like other reviewers have said, we do not use the grey silicone topper. My daughter who is almost 2 (average size) is able to grab and place her sippy cups from this holder.

Review 2: rating 3.0. Wouldn't buy for kids under 2 I bought these for my two Britax carseats.  They are okay. My 20 month old twins have not figured out how to put their cup back in the holder.  I hope this will change.  I also have a graco that has a built-in cupholder and had much better luck with them actually using the cup holder on that seat.

Review 3: rating 2.0. Does not fit the Britex Advocate The hook on the cup holder has to slide into a seat belt slot.  My toddler has issues getting his cups out of because of where the cup holder attaches.  He can't reach it when he's belted into the carseat.  Somehow the cup holder was pulled off the carseat and caused the plastic on the carseat to stick out.  This was not a good purchase.

Review 4: rating 5.0. Fits inside FJ Cruiser cup holder and keeps bottles in place. So happy with this item. Great product. I own a Toyota FJ Cruiser and the cup holders are so shallow and big in diameter that any cup or water bottle fly out at each turn or stop. This fits inside the holder and the top grips the water bottle. Answer to my prayers.

Review 5: rating 2.0. Waste of money Never could get this to properly install on our boulevard click tight. Ended up switching him to the frontier from big brother.

Review 6: rating 2.0. For such a smart company, they really should have re-thought the dumb ... Nearly impossible to get the two pieces together. For such a smart company, they really should have re-thought the dumb design of this expensive piece of plastic.

Review 7: rating 1.0. The cup holder clip will not stay on the car ... The cup holder clip will not stay on the car seat. It continues to fall off and it does not attach well.

Review 8: rating 1.0. Poor Design The cup holder broke after just a few days of use. =(

Review 9: rating 1.0. Should never have bought this This cup holder constantly gets disconnected from the car seat. It's very easily removed which for a 2 year is great fun and it has turned into a game with him. I wish I hadn't even wasted the money on it. It's on the ground of the car more than it's attached.

Review 10: rating 5.0. Love their car seats and accessories Britax rocks. Love their car seats and accessories!

Review 11: rating 1.0. One Star Never stays attached to car seat.

Review 12: rating 1.0. Bad made There is something wrong with this product. The plastic part comes off. The place for is not easily reachable for short toddler arms. Don't like it

Review 13: rating 2.0. Can easily be pulled off by child haven't Can easily be pulled off by child haven't; had much luck with it; not worth the price

Review 14: rating 5.0. Five Stars Works great on the car seat.

Review 15: rating 5.0. Five Stars This works much better than the one that came with our carseat

Review 16: rating 5.0. Awesome cup holder Awesome cup holder! I was hesitant based on some of the reviews, but it was super easy to install on our Clicktight model. I like that its fits a large variety of cup sizes (even her Camelback water bottle fits if you take the rubber top off). Overall, this is a great cup holder I just wish it would have come with the seat in the first place :)

Review 17: rating 2.0. not impressed When I purchased this, I had grand visions of my child no longer tossing his cup onto the seat next to him and then promptly screaming that he wanted it back. I now have a child who screams because his cup wont come out of the cup holder. The cup holder is supposed to fit on both sides of the car seat but we could only get it on one side. The top grey portion of the cup holder is obviously to keep the cups in without falling out but, it grips too tight to the sippy cups...

Review 18: rating 1.0. Very difficult to assemble without breaking. Plastic is not ... Very difficult to assemble without breaking. Plastic is not staying together after two weeks.. Does NOT stay attached to seat.

Review 19: rating 1.0. You'd think for making such awesome carseats, with great install I can't get this to stay on our Clicktight to save my life.  You'd think for making such awesome carseats, with great install, they'd be able to figure out how to get a darn cupholder to install correctly. I bet they are all just sitting back and laughing at us...suckers!

Review 20: rating 1.0. Horrible design! Do NOT buy. I'm so disappointed with Britax on this one!  How did their design team mess up so badly?  We have purchased 6 Britax car seats and love them all but this cup holder is horrible when fitting it on to the Marathon Click Tight.  I actually thought I'd take a chance and purchase a second one after the first cup holder broke in about a year's time. What a mistake! This cup holder won't stay in place on one side and we can't get it to slide on to the other sid...
persona: This customer values functional, practical products that meet basic needs effectively, prioritizes ease of use and reliability over aesthetics or premium design, and is willing to accept minor flaws if the product delivers core utility at a reasonable price.
reference_output:
rating 1.0. You have no other option The cup was a bit difficult to install, but I eventually got it in. As simple of an installation it could be, you have to position the clip in a certain way so it doesn't get jammed along the shell of the car seat. It is hard to believe that a Britax car seat has no cup holder.
The second issue is that cap comes off to easily. My son would set his cup in, and the cap will come off with the cup when he takes it out. It is frustrating that this is the only cup holder that fit a Britax car seat. I would tell you to avoid it, but you have no choice.

reviews:

Review 12: rating 2.0. it said it was 110 volt but there was no ... it said it was 110 volt but there was no plug to plug it in with just a usb cable. Review 13: rating 4.0. Nice product At first I was disappointed with mainly the song choices it came with, but the company made it right, changed the music and issued a full refund. Thank you! Review 14: rating 5.0. This is perfect for a birthday gift This is perfect for a birthday gift! I gifted them to my little nephew and immediately all the young adults and babies began to gather in one place where the baby light was. Can be used in a party by using silent mode. Review 16: rating 4.0. 5 month old LOVES it Purchased july 14th after purchasing 2 different lights similar to this one and so far so good. The lights are still working as well as the music. The only thing I dislike about it is the fact that its now starting to make a grinding noise when it rotates. Im hoping it wont get any worse as my 5 month old loves it and falls asleep to it. Review 17: rating 2.0. Disappointing I do not get all the great reviews. The batteries run out every other night and we only play for roughly 45 minutes. This is a cheap product. The first night light I was sent would work for a couple minutes then freeze & shut off by itself. I contacted the seller & they requested me to send back the light and they would replace upon its arrival.
So the second night light I was sent a week later worked for a couple weeks, but then alas the same problem. I will have it turned on with the music playing and select a light for my son to sleep to and its almost like the... Review 20: rating 3.0. Rotating Feature Defective - the reason I got it Rotating function doesn’t work, but everything else does. The buttons are labeled but in a dark color that’s hard to read. Colors and music and timer functions seem ok though.

I decided to keep the water free rings and my dog still plays with them.
