reference_output: rating 5.0. These are some of my favorite teethers! I love how many you get with ordering them through amazon! Definitely worth the price. I have used these teethers with soon to be all 3 my babies!

reviews:
Review 1: rating 3.0. Not for tropical weather I bought it but didn't think about its usage in tropical weather, turned out that my baby is very uncomfortable sitting in the carrier because the material is too hot. However, the product is very easy to use and feel perfectly safe. Review 2: rating 3.0. Three Stars I wish this could have more back support. Review 3: rating 1.0. One Star hard to fit on all shoulders Review 4: rating 5.0. So useful and easy! Perfect for any mom! I love this product! I have a toddler and a two months old. The bjorn allows me to do outings while having my baby against me. It stops him from crying and I can focus on my toddler in parks etc. It holds babies upright, and has a neck support as well. It feels secure and only takes a couple of seconds to put in. Daddy can also walk baby around with it. If you have a baby and need to be able to use your hands, get this! :) Review 5: rating 5.0. A must for babies I bought this for my sister-in-law because it was something that I felt every mom should have. I had a different brand carrier, a cheaper one and didn't like it. A friend gave me her bjorn and I loved it! I think it is definitely a product well worth the money. My son rode in the bjorn for a long time, about 9mths. I used it more than my stroller because he liked to look around and was much easier to take shopping because he was happy in it. My son could spend... Review 6: rating 1.0. Waste of Money - get the ErgoBaby! This is the 3rd type of carrier that I've bought - I was really happy with it until my daughter got to be over 10 lbs. She's 6 months old, 13 lbs. (which is really small for her age) and it gave me severe back pain to carry her less than 1 mile. The ErgoBaby is designed to spread the weight evenly and I'm now going to spend another fortune for the Ergo. Advice to all expecting parents: DO NOT get the Bjorn. Get a Moby or other wrap for the newborn a... Review 7: rating 5.0. Review after 10 months use I really love the bjorn, It made my life a lot easier and I have no regrets. Here's my 10 month use report. However, at this point my daughter is approaching 11 months and 22lbs and we can no longer use this, she's simply too big and heavy and this isn't functional for us anymore. Keep in mind she's in the 90th percentile for height and 50th percentile for weight, I, her mom, am 5'6" and 120lbs.

Months 1-3: My baby would not sit in this at al... Review 8: rating 1.0. Not convenient at all I am not sure why people recommend this carrier so much.
Even when my baby was a month old I found it extremely uncomfortable to carry him as it hurt my back.
My baby is taller than average. Taking a newborn in and out of this thing is a task in itself.
I would not recommend this product to anyone, there must be other carriers that do a better job. Review 9: rating 2.0. Shoulder pain Don't like it. There is no waist support at all. My baby is 3 months old at 13lbs, and it's hurting my shoulders after 20 mins. I HAVE adjusted the buckle on the back as low as I can but not much difference. Returned it. Review 10: rating 3.0. If You're Large-Chested, Find Something Else I bought the Baby Bjorn mainly to use when I was on maternity leave so I could get some things done. My car seat turned out to be way too heavy to drag around for errands, and some stores don't have buggies or aisles wide enough for strollers. My baby was also one of those who cried pretty much every time she was put down and never slept longer than 30 minutes, and I really needed to find a way to get some laundry and dishes washed every... Review 11: rating 2.0. Loose spring in the Head support buckle is loosely attached with the Head support knob ... can't support baby's head The item was purchased on 05/14/2014 but, less than 9 months, its upper left head support buckle became loose that can easily pop out from the head support knob. I was walk with the BabyBjorn holding my baby. All of a sudden, the head support buckle popped out from the knob. I thought that I'd not buckled it properly. So I buckled it back on and tried to pull the strap... Review 12: rating 5.0. Babybjorn Original versus Ergobaby Performance with newborn insert: Bjorn for newborns, Ergo for older infants & toddlers! I had bought an Ergobaby (Performance) with newborn insert before because I was told that it's the best. While the Ergo worked for my now 10 week old baby boy, we didn't feel comfortable using it with the newborn insert. It gets pretty hot in summer, I felt like I had to hold the head all the time since it was very far down and I was worried the baby would suffoc... Review 13: rating 5.0. Some people are picky... I have owned 4 separate carriers, this one, a sling, the amazing Ergo everyone is raving about here, and a camping one for long hikes. To all new moms out there trying to decide, it all comes down to preference. And know that no matter what, the baby carrier will hurt your shoulders. I don't know why some people wear theirs in the house, that seems unnecessary to me when a child can be in a play area within eye shot. At least there they are letting out energy... Review 14: rating 5.0. Easy and streamlined baby carrier This baby carrier is so amazing. It is simple and streamlined, the baby can face in (he sleeps in it that way now) and out (after 3 months when he could hold his head up). The bottom strap allows it to get longer as the baby grows. It goes on quickly and is very easily adjustable for different sized wearers. We've washed the whole thing in the washer and dryer with no problem, but it also wears well and doesn't show dirt too much. The only complaint ... Review 15: rating 3.0. Depends on what's important to you... I initially bought the Baby Bjorn Original carrier, trusting the brand and liking the low price. It is very easy to use and put on by oneself, and is fairly comfortable (I only ever wore it for 20-60 min at a length). We ramped up using the carrier when my kid got enough head control to face outward, which is his preferred mode for carrying. When we made this transition I read up more about hip dysplasia and became concerned that this product was... Review 16: rating 1.0. So this carrier is not good for anything It hurts your lower back. I 100% guarantee that it will hurt your lower back, no matter who you are, because it has no back support and puts tons of stress on your back.

It also holds your baby in an unhealthy crotch-supported position.

So this carrier is not good for anything. Even for free, would you want to hurt your back and your baby's crotch? Review 17: rating 3.0. It's okay.....but it's hot! I wish I could be the mom whose kid loves to ride in the Bjorn, but she just doesn't. I can get maybe 10 minutes in there, but it doesn't hold her the way she wants and so she's fussing and I'm stuck with this contraption on. It's good quality and looks nice, but it's also hot in the sun. I have tried both the Bjorn and the Baby K'Tan and I'd pick Bjorn over K'tan--but it still doesn't replace good old fashioned holding the baby :) Review 18: rating 5.0. Love it! My son and I both love this carrier. We tried quite a few different kinds and ended up sticking with the Baby Bjorn in Black/Pinstripe. The black with pinstripe inside is a very classic pattern and will pretty much match anything that you're wearing. It's also good for daddy since it's not a feminine color. It's also very easy to use! I put it on by sliding the shoulder straps on, then clipping the bottom of the straps to the body of the carrier. I then take my son and place... Review 19: rating 5.0. Comfortable & easy to use The BabyBjorn is a great system for parents, both male and female. We are using this with our daughter and have found it easy to carry and have with us for the unplanned usage. It is also a help around the house when we want to do housework, yet our daughter wants to be held. Review 20: rating 1.0. Bad for babies hips Hurt my back. Bad for babies hips. Go with an ergo, tula, lillebaby, or kinderpack instead.
persona: This customer prioritizes functionality and practicality in baby products, valuing ease of use, durability, and effective performance—especially for soothing infants and simplifying caregiving—but is also sensitive to packaging quality and product reliability, with a willingness to purchase repeat items that deliver consistent, real-world benefits.
reference_output: rating 4.0. Great product Very easy to assemble. Very snug fit. My newborn loves it and it calms him down when he has colic.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 1.0. May cause diaper rash I think this product gave my child a diaper rash. Review 2: rating 5.0. Great value! Work so well! So far we have only tried these in the newborn size. They seemed really thin and cheap at first compared to the Pampers diapers we also had but we have been so happy with them and they hold up well overnight no leaking whatsoever they’re super absorbent and I like that they’re thin so they’re not so bulky under clothing I love these and we will continue to buy them in the next size and update as we go. I also love that there’s no scent and there’s no irrita... Review 3: rating 2.0. Quality is unsatisfactory. Leak and barely any absorbency. These diapers are poor quality. They don’t fit correctly or stay on well. They leak and feel damp even with only a little amount of pee. Review 4: rating 1.0. Leaked Leaked constantly and I know we had it on correctly Review 5: rating 1.0. Not worth the savings Sometimes the diaper sticks to the baby like a band-aid......poor baby. Review 6: rating 2.0. Not worth it We love Pampers swaddlers and tried these in comparison and we were not happy. They sag and the wetness indicator doesn't always work. We smelled pee before it turned blue and we never smell pee with Pampers Review 7: rating 4.0. Comparable to the top diaper brand These were a pretty good buy. I tried this brand as well as a couple other name brands and generics and these were the second best. The price is good, also they have a stretchy waist band which is totally clutch, it minimizes blow outs, and on a newborn offers a snug, comfy fit. Thr top brand we tried also had this, wheras the others we tried did not, making for a poor fit and more leakage. The only con on these is the blue stripe to indicate wetnes... Review 8: rating 1.0. Stick to butt Gave baby diaper rash because they stuck to his butt.
Might be good for different baby though as all babies have different sensitivity. Review 9: rating 1.0. Tabs Scratch Baby The front of the diaper doesn’t extend very far beyond the tabs so the tabs can ride up and easily come in contact with baby’s belly. The tabs on the diaper are made of a thicker, hard material that scratched my baby’s skin significantly. We will be returning these and using Target’s Up & Up brand instead. They are much softer and fit better. Review 10: rating 2.0. They leak bad We were running low and unfortunately diapers are in low supply right now and I don't want to go to ther store if I don't have to, these we're the only ones that could get here fast enough that weren't overly expensive and the reviews were pretty good. Unfortunately they leak something terrible on my boy. everytime I check him or when I hold him his saddle or clothes are wet. It's awful as a new mom. Really bummed I bought a 4 pack since I'll have to try to make due wit... Review 11: rating 1.0. Poor absorbency Always damp. Gives my baby rash. Would not recommend. Review 12: rating 1.0. Caused diaper rash and terrible fit! These diapers did not fit well! They leaked terribly! They are also very thin and papery and stuck to my daughter’s butt and gave her terrible diaper rash!! I do not recommend these diapers! Review 13: rating 2.0. Good. Not great. These diapers are very thin. They don’t seem too absorbent. They are good in a pinch but I wouldn’t buy them again. You get what you pay for. Review 14: rating 2.0. Super small and ill fitting These diapers are super small. My twins are only 8lbs and they don’t fit. Review 15: rating 1.0. If only they didn’t leak that often... We experienced leaks often with these diapers Review 16: rating 1.0. What changed? I used tonactualpy like these, but this last order I made changed my mind. They sag terribly as soon as it's wet like they are soggy and they are so thin. Review 17: rating 1.0. Not great Diaper continues to stick to my baby’s bottom. It doesn’t absorb liquid well which results in more blow outs. Review 18: rating 2.0. Not Good for my Preemie These gave my infant a rash--twice. I stopped using them to rule out the cause of the first rash and after reintroducing them she got another rash. She's a preemie and all babies are different but I'm personally not happy with these diapers. Review 19: rating 2.0. Not great, not terrible These are good for sensitive skin, HOWEVER, I purchased these on the premise of they were like the previous version. The older type was more absorbent and less cheap looking. My son had leaked out of these many times. Review 20: rating 5.0. Our preferred newborn diapers! We have tried three different diapers so far for our newborn (size N) and these are our favorites among Pampers, Huggies and Amazon’s in-house brand, Mama Bear.

Good absorbency, elastic in all the right places and soft feel, but most importantly, these simply seem to fit the best of all.

I ordered several packs of Size 1 as well, so will update the review if it’s also not the same feedback there.
persona: This customer prioritizes reliable leak protection and functional performance, especially for frequent urination, and is likely to switch brands if consistent leakage issues persist despite price or convenience factors.
reference_output:
rating 2.0. Mysterious regular leakages These diapers leak (especially pee). My daughter manages to regularly pee out of the diaper without getting anything in the diaper itself. So far she has only gotten poop out of them twice (which I usually expect a little bit of leakage so I don’t fault them for that). We are however having at least one and up to
three accidents a day where we are either peed on or the surface that our daughter is laying on has an obvious wet spot that wasn’t there when we put her down. Most of the time, when this happens, the diaper itself is completely dry. I will not be buying these diapers again.

rating 2.0. Mysterious regular leakages These diapers leak (especially pee). My daughter manages to regularly pee out of the diaper without getting anything in the diaper itself. So far she has only gotten poop out of them twice (which I usually expect a little bit of leakage so I don’t fault them for that). We are however having at least one and up to
three accidents a day where we are either peed on or the surface that our daughter is laying on has an obvious wet spot that wasn’t there when we put her down. Most of the time, when this happens, the diaper itself is completely dry. I will not be buying these diapers again.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 4.0. Great for a toddler I ordered this product for my toddler's room. It is great because it is very sturdy and I don't have to worry it will fall over on her. With the open bins, I can actually get her to put away her toys. Review 2: rating 4.0. great for organizing This product was great for organizing all my child's toys. It fits books too but they have to lie flat. It looks cute with all the pastel bin colors. It's heavy enough where she can not pull the unit down on top of herself. The only downfall is that my 15 mo old wants to take all the bins off the shelves. We have just been teaching her to leave them alone which works most of the time. Review 3: rating 5.0. Makes ckeaning up easy! This organizer enables you to teach your little one sorting techniques, but makes it easy to clean up if you are in a hurry! Easier to locate items since their not all in a big toy-box. Review 4: rating 5.0. Excellent Product! This is such a great way to help teach kids easy organization. My daughter not only loves playing with her toys, but now also enjoys putting her toys away in all the different color bins. The company is also great with returns! They had sent us the boy color organizer and rather than having us return the wrong shelf, they let us keep it! We ended up giving it to a friend who also loves it. I highly recommend this item-my daughters room looks so much cleaner now :) Review 5: rating 5.0. Great Kids Toy Organizer This organizer was super easy to set up, it looks great, fits a lot of toys and my kids can remove and put in the buckets all by themselves. A must have for a little girls' room that has way too many little toys! Review 6: rating 5.0. House Less Junky Thanks to Honey-Can-Do Edit: August 2016 Update - 5 years on and the Toy Organizer is still going strong. It's held up to years of use and abuse with no visible signs of wear or tear. Toys and knick-knacks have come and gone but it has maintained its tidy-up usefulness.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------

Product arrived quickly. Lightning-quick, a nice bonus.

It came in a massive outer box but wa... Review 7: rating 5.0. Awesome for toys with pieces We got the pastel version of this for my daughter's third birthday. It took my husband and me about 15 minutes to put together (and much of that was just because we were tired...I think we could have done it quicker.) It took only one screwdriver, and was super-easy to assemble. It's fabulous for her. She can put things away where they go, enjoys sorting, and has to always have one empty for "pretend dirt" to build sand castles. It holds just the right am... Review 8: rating 5.0. Just what we needed A perfect fit for storing the " little" toys that you don't know what to do with. Sturdy - good construction. Overall - very pleased. Review 9: rating 5.0. Perfect!! I've been looking for one of these both online and in stores but I thought they were too expensive. I kept checking back on Amazon and finally got it on sale ($47). It was shipped super quick and was very easy to put together (just needed screwdriver). Very sturdy, pretty colors and held more toys than I expected, which was great! I could see this being used for many different things for both kids and adults, but we used in my 4 yr old's room. Perfect way to organize her to... Review 10: rating 1.0. Damaged goods Package was not sealed when received. One of the plastic box was broken. Obviously, this was returned item with defect. How can Amazon treat customer in such a dishonest way! Review 11: rating 5.0. My Kids Needed This! This is exactly what I've been looking for! It arrived quickly and was in excellent condition. You would be surprise what a difference it makes. I can see the floor now! Toys are in bins...SWEET! Review 12: rating 5.0. Does the job. The product was easy to assemble and does the job. Toys and books are visible to the child and easy to access.
I would recommend this product. Everything is in plain sight. Review 13: rating 5.0. Awsome product!!!! I love this item. My three year old loves picking up her toys because she has so many drawers. It makes organizing easy. It is also easy to put together. Review 14: rating 4.0. honey Can Do toy organizer This product is great for children. Teaches them organizaation and makes them want to clean up. Plus keeps the house cleaner when there is a place for all the toys!
Very easy to sssemble. Review 15: rating 5.0. great product! Love the color! Love the big bins! Installation was straight forward, very easy to setup. I've purchased 3 other disney princess ones, and installation on those ones took a bit more time. This one is also the right size; the disney ones are all so small in reality (hence, I had to buy 3 of 'em to fit all DD's toys!).

This one matches well with the pastel book sling as well.

Overall, very happy with this. Review 16: rating 4.0. Pretty and sturdy This was quite sturdy and made from quality material. The colours are very pretty and matched our decor without standing out too much. Really pleased with this buy. Review 17: rating 5.0. Storage After reading some of the reviews I was a bit skeptical about purchasing this for my 5 year old daughter's room, but I REALLY needed something to get the clutter up. I have to say this product met and exceeded my expectations. It is sturdy and the bins were large enough to hold her Barbies, kitchen accessories, and other miscellaneous play items. I have another baby on the way and I will definitely be purchasing at least one more. Review 18: rating 4.0. great product got this in the mail yesterday and put it together in about 30 minutes it is a wonderful product except for one of the metal poles to hold the bins would not take the screw... i basically stripped the nail trying to shove it in there when i call the honey-can-do customer service they told me they would send me a new one free of charge! GREAT CUSTOMER SERVICE! it is not put up in my daughters room and i love it!!! would def recommend to anyone! Review 19: rating 2.0. Needs design improvements for bins! This is my third of this style organizer bins that weve had and this is the first to NOT have the notches on the bottem of the bins so you can sit them ON the bars instead of slanted. I like the option. My other 2 brands (dont rememeber which brand) but they had small little notches that had them rest a bit more secure and also gave you the option to sit flat. If you sit flat then you can label the bins for the kids (which I like). 2 Bins arrived... Review 20: rating 2.0. Needs design improvements for bins! This is my third of this style organizer bins that weve had and this is the first to NOT have the notches on the bottem of the bins so you can sit them ON the bars instead of slanted. I like the option. My other 2 brands (dont rememeber which brand) but they had small little notches that had them rest a bit more secure and also gave you the option to sit flat. If you sit flat then you can label the bins for the kids (which I like). 2 Bins arrived...
persona: This customer prioritizes safety, durability, and ease of use in products designed for young children, favoring reliable, no-frills solutions that withstand toddler exploration and offer long-term functionality, while valuing practical features like easy installation, compact storage, and secure design—though they may be dissatisfied with products that require frequent adjustments or have limited functionality.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Cute And Durable! The plastic bins are way more durable than I thought they would be.  My 18 month old has been flipping them upside down and standing on them since she was about 11 months old and they have never bent or broke.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 2.0. these diapers suck! My daughter hasn't been wearing them an entire ... I have always used Huggies Little Snugglers. Well, my baby is a lot more active now that she is walking and I thought these slip on Huggies Little Movers might be slightly easier to get on her wiggly butt. #1: they really aren't. #2: these diapers suck! My daughter hasn't been wearing them an entire week and we have had more blowouts in that time that we have had in the entire last year!!! These diapers are not as... Review 2: rating 1.0. Scared our child - literally This item scared our child!! The band on the sides is rigid and rubbed into you little baby skin leaving a scar. Terrible that they would put this product out without testing it. When we consulted the company all they told us is that they would send us a gift card!? Thx Kimberly Clark 👎🏼😖 Review 3: rating 1.0. Hated them I did not like these. They did not fit my son well, the legs were tight and the waist was too big. Hard to slide them up on a 1 year old. They also sag horribly and left a rash on his hip where the Velcro is. I like little movers, do not like these pull up style ones. Review 4: rating 1.0. Be careful, pre-fastened tabs cuts my baby skin in ... Be careful, pre-fastened tabs cuts my baby skin in both sides. I'm trying a different brand, sorry because I always have use Huggies. Review 5: rating 4.0. Makes diaper changing much easier because I can slip these on like pants. My little dude insists on standing up ... Bought this for my very wiggly 2 year old who isn't potty trained. Makes diaper changing much easier because I can slip these on like pants. My little dude insists on standing up during his diaper changes. Review 6: rating 4.0. Not a bad product just didn't think the "pull up" concept through. Runs bigger than normal Huggies. Didn't think this one through. To have pull up diapers you have to take shoes and pants off to put on a new one **face palm**. I originally bought these because my son likes to take his diaper off and this was my solution. No tabs to pull = not taking diaper off. Well, it worked except when he's fully clothed I have to completely strip him down to put on a new one. I also have a very ... Review 7: rating 1.0. Not the Same. Beware of Rashes Highly allergenic, smaller diaper. Will never use again. Review 8: rating 2.0. I like that it is a slip on diaper and the ... I like that it is a slip on diaper and the fit is very good. But, it has caused rashes around the area where the belt and elastic touches my toddler's bottom. I would find a way to post a photo without exposing too much. I wish I could return the rest of the package because I wouldn't give it away to someone else if it caused similar rash on other babies' skin. Review 9: rating 1.0. Not easy to use, scratches to blood Terrible. Would not recommend. Scratches baby's skin. Review 10: rating 5.0. The only reason I buy them instead of other good choices I know of is because of the convenience ... The only reason I buy them instead of other good choices I know of is because of the convenience with potty training....but they're also absorbent, comfy, soft, overall a very good diaper. Review 11: rating 1.0. Great diaper--UPDATE What changed? I really enjoyed these diapers I never had a leak, and for a very active boy they worked great to sip them on when he did not want to slow down for diaper changes. Huggies has been the only diaper to not leak during bed time, I have only gotten 1 leak since I switched and it was very little.

I bought these for my first son and loved them, however with my second son they seem different, first they do not last a night or even a 2 hour nap t... Review 12: rating 2.0. Pain to put on! Not at all what I expected. The little guy likes to pull the sides apart, which means I have to try to put the sides back together which isn't easy. They don't stretch much so pulling them up without pulling up the "boy parts" with them is difficult. Also the backs don't go up very high and they don't seem to fit very well at all. Wish I could return the whole box! Review 13: rating 1.0. Worst decision I could have made These are horrible. They are so itchy that they cause rashes, are extremely difficult to pull up, and they fit small. They also just tear apart (this is supposed to make changes easier but that's if they stay on your kid long enough for you to change them). Review 14: rating 1.0. ... 4 in the little mover slip ons would work great. Size wise they are way smaller Since I usually purchase size 4 in the huggies little movers I figured size 4 in the little mover slip ons would work great. Size wise they are way smaller. Have to order another whole box =/ Review 15: rating 5.0. Best out there for movers! We've tried so many different diapers. Pampers, The Honest Company, Luvs, store brands, & of course, Huggies. I have to say, for the new babes, pampers swaddlers are amazing!!! I don't think I'd go any other route. BUT... If you have an active kiddo -- like I do -- then you gotta advance to the big leagues. My little guy was waking at 8 months, and hates diaper changes. We did the little movers for a while, and those worked perfect with his activity level. ... Review 16: rating 5.0. ... won't sit still for a diaper change these are amazing quick and easy When your kid won't sit still for a diaper change these are amazing quick and easy. Review 17: rating 2.0. Chemical Smell They work great, but I will never buy another box. They have such a strong chemical odor to them. I would recommend them if it weren't for that. Review 18: rating 4.0. Leaks Love these pull-ups like diapers, but they do leak more than regular little mover diaper, especially they don't hold very well for overnight, I'm considering use regular diaper for overnight and those can be for the daytime. They are easier to put on if you have a super active baby who hates to lay down for diaper change, and fits pretty well for my 18 month old Review 19: rating 2.0. Great idea...poor execution I bought these for the convenience of being able to pull these up since my little one likes to roll around and stand up. These would have been great but the back is way too short (they fit just like normal underwear would) that poop coming up the back was common place. We also had a few incidents when the diaper shifted and my little one peed outside of the absorption area. Needless to say we had a puddle to clean up. We had to use other diapers at night a... Review 20: rating 5.0. Brilliant Design I love these diapers. These are probably the best diapers out there , especially for travel. My baby doesn't stay still for a moment and it was extremely difficult to change his diapers while he tries to move around or crawl away; and did I mention he HATES with a capital "H" being changed in a public bathroom changing table or in the tiny airplane toilets. All I need to do with these diapers is simply slip-on the diapers (he is able to bear weight on his leg...
persona: This customer prioritizes consistent performance and comfort in diapers, willing to overlook minor fit issues due to strong brand loyalty and satisfaction with overall quality, and values reliability enough to continue reordering despite slight discomfort.
reference_output: rating 4.0. A bit too snug but still worth buying A little too snug. My son is a skinny 31 pounder but his valley be peekin'. I want to say no to crack but we like these diapers the best otherwise. We plan on re-ordering these until they become too hot for tv.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Seem better than the last brush I purchased at Target Quick shipped. Seem better than the last brush I purchased at Target. Review 2: rating 1.0. Not the same quality as one Dr. Brown's Brush purchased on its own. Package of 3 means poor quality, apparently. We have purchased Dr. Brown's brush before that looks exactly like this. When we purchased the package of 3, the quality was far inferior to that of the single brush we had before. Very disappointing. The bristles are flimsy (and only about 50% as many as the other brush), the handle is flimsy, and it does not have the straw-type brush built into the handle that the other ... Review 3: rating 3.0. We seem to go through these pretty quickly and are now trying other brands We seem to go through these pretty quickly and are now trying other brands. After daily use and about two weeks the metal at the base of the bristles breaks rendering the brush useless. Perhaps we are too vigorous in our bottle washing. Review 4: rating 1.0. Love that there is a holder for this brush Love that there is a holder for this brush. The brush overall is way too flexible and if you need to scrub at all does not work. Review 5: rating 5.0. Good bottle brush. The best bottle brush in my opinion. I buy the 3 packs because I like to replace mine ever month or so as they get gross after a while.
I do wish it came with a better attachment to clean the nipples and other Dr. Brown bottle parts but as I said I like this one the best out of all that I’ve tried. Review 6: rating 2.0. Three Stars Not the best, doesn't clean the bottles well. After one month use the top broke and wasn't useable. I'm comparing this scrub to the one we received with Dr.Browns bottles which I prefer better. Review 7: rating 1.0. Easily broken Scrubber part bends and breaks off. Not very sturdy. Review 8: rating 2.0. Spend the extra few dollars for the deluxe model I bought these as the Dr Brown bushes work best with the Dr Brown bottles since they have a smaller opening. I didn't realize the brush we bought from the store was the Deluxe model. These things are so cheaply made. I don't imagine one will last longer than a week. I'm saving them for when we go away and need a disposable brush because that's about all these are good for. Review 9: rating 1.0. The sponge is too big and floppy and the bristles ... The sponge is too big and floppy and the bristles are too soft and there’s nor enough of them. Review 10: rating 2.0. The sponge is horrible to actually use The bristles and sponge are really soft. The sponge is horrible to actually use. It constantly comes off, I can’t get the bottom of the bottle clean because the sponge floats toward the top. They are being returned. Review 11: rating 1.0. One Star One of the three brushes was not a Dr. Brown brush, but rather a Munchkin brand brush. Review 12: rating 2.0. First one was great but second two break within a week I bought one of these and loved it! It lasted 6 months before breaking. Then I bought a 3 pack and the first two broke within one week and within two weeks. What the heck? The wire breaks where it meets the base and the blue sponge comes out. Ugh. Where are the good ones I was used to? Did they change how they're made / fulfilled? Really a let down. Review 13: rating 2.0. These brushes do not last very long due to the ... These brushes do not last very long due to the sponge at the top of the brush breaking off early. Other than that they cleaned bottles! Review 14: rating 3.0. Good cleaning brush, but sponge part breaks apart easily Unfortunately, I'm a slave to buying these every month or two. I'm not a fan of the bristles, so that's why I don't purchase other bottle brushes. I really love the sponge part at the end. It definitely makes cleaning my baby's Dr. Brown bottles faster, but the sponge part breaks apart so fast and so easily. I've tried finding separate sponge parts to just replace it instead of buying the whole brush, but it doesn't seem to exi... Review 15: rating 4.0. Not bad for a Dr. Brown product I'm not normally a Dr. Brown fan, I think they make terrible bottles. I use the MAM ones and LOVE THEM. But this bottle brush isn't bad at all. These seem to hold up pretty well and don't fall apart easily, they are also affordable compared to others. These also do not scratch my bottles. Review 16: rating 2.0. Don’t waste your money I use to love these bottle brushes about three years ago with my first son, but now it seems like I go through these like crazy! The sponge either breaks or constantly falls off...I’ve gone through about half a dozen of these within a month! Review 17: rating 1.0. Sponge comes apart within days These are just terrible. The top sponge part came off on all three of them within the first two days of use. I have purchased quite a few different brands over the last 5 years, and these are by far the worst! Review 18: rating 1.0. Breaks after 1 week Usually love these brushes. Used them with my daughter 2.5 years ago. First brush out of the pack did not even last a week before breaking. Now on to the second. Review 19: rating 1.0. Cleaning the bottles with stable sponge The sponge came off after using it just few times after cleaning the bottles Review 20: rating 1.0. Poor quality Will never purchase again. We usually use the munchkin brand and they work well but we thought since we have Dr browns bottles this would work better. Total waste. The sponge portion starts to detach after on a few uses and the metal came disconnected from the base.
persona: This customer prioritizes effectiveness and practicality in baby care products, especially for proven solutions like diaper rash treatment, and values high-quality materials and functionality, but is deterred by design flaws, poor usability, and insufficient product volume, indicating a preference for reliable, well-designed, and generously sized items that deliver tangible results.
reference_output: rating 2.0. Research the best bottle design, this is not it The sponges on the ends fall/slide out. There is no nipple cleaning brush on the other end

reviews:
Review 1: rating 4.0. Title for my review This is a good seat. It's for my currently 1 year old son.
I bought 2 of them. One for my car and one for my wife's car.
I could have had just one seat and moved it back and forth between the 2 cars as needed.
It is possible. However it's heavy enough that it's not very easy or quick to do this.
A push button latch design (like with a car seat) would have improved things and made it easier to attach or remove.
Regarding the recline func... Review 2: rating 5.0. Great seat! This seat lasts and it has all the needed features. My wife is a cop and has been to a lot of training specifically related to child seats (yes I know that sounds boring), but it means that she knows what she is talking about when she says it's the best seat around. The seat is really easy and you can't beat the cup holder and the little pockets in the armrests that my son likes to store toys in. It's a really handy. The seat is sturdy and easily washable. We just boug... Review 3: rating 5.0. Great car seat that will last a long time! I read lots of reviews online before purchasing two of these car seats (one for each car). I have two kids, one and three years old. My son the one-year-old just outgrew the graco snugride infant seat. My daughter was still using her Britax Marathons that we bought when she outgrew the graco. We moved my son into the Britax seats, which are designed for babies up to 65 pounds. First we tried the Graco turbo booster but that was too big ... Review 4: rating 4.0. Graco Nautilus 3-in-1 Car Seat We have had this car seat for 3 years now. We purchased it when my son was 3 years old, and he still fits in it now that he is 6. We chose it for the great reviews it got, because we would be able to use the latch-system and harness for a long time (and still do), and because it was aircraft-compliant as we were going on a trip abroad at the time.
My son likes the seat because he is able to keep toys and treats in the cubby holes under the arm re... Review 5: rating 4.0. Was not sure what to expect I hate buying carseats. Its like buying jeans, its a pain, there are too many to choose, something is always wrong with them and the kids outgrow them.
When my daughter got too tall for her convertible I had to get something that would last us longer. I researched for a long time and finally came down to 2. What really sold me on this one, was the customer ratings. I scan those on Amazon all the time to hear what other moms say so after I read both ca... Review 6: rating 5.0. Fits side by side with twins, but tight. I was originally worried at the width of the Graco Nautilus seats that they would not fit in the same way our convertable car seats did. They are a little wider but our Hyundai Tucson was able to handle them. This is great because it will leave room for an adult back there for a short, and slightly squeezed, trip. We went on a long trip with some luggage strapped in beside them (drivers side rear passenger seat is open) and the luggage had no ... Review 7: rating 5.0. By far my favorite car seat. I have 2 boys, a 40lb 5 year old and a 35lb 3 year old. Both are too tall for the typical convertible seats, but there is no way I'm taking them out of the 5pt harness until I absolutely have to! This carseat is perfect! We've been using it for my older son for over a year and I am very happy with it. He's never complained about discomfort, and it's easy to install in both my Ford Explorer and my husband's Subaru Impreza (a bit tight on legroom in thi... Review 8: rating 5.0. Great car seat Bought this for my son when he was 2 and a pink one for my 3 year old daughter. I have had them for a couple of years and they are easy to adjust and easy to clean. Review 9: rating 5.0. Great for big kids My grandson is big for his age, but we still feel he needs the safety of a car seat rather than a booster seat. At 45 pounds he still has grow room in this seat. My only frustration is getting to the buckle on the seat when he is in the seat. The cup holder is great. We took him on two vacations this year traveling about 3000 miles with assurance of his comfort and safety. Review 10: rating 3.0. very hard to take apart and put back together I have had this carseat for about 6 months. My daughter who is now almost 3 1/2 threw up in this carseat last month. We had to take it apart to take off the fabric and wash it in the washer. It took one hour to put back together, and even then, I don't think we did it right, and now the straps won't extend enough to fully close. We have tried everything - we've spent hours taking it apart and putting it back together but cannot get the st... Review 11: rating 5.0. Great car seat This is a great carseat! I found it easy to assemble and install using the LATCH system. The straps are easy to adjust, and I really wanted a carseat that used the harness up to 65lbs. Review 1: rating 2.0. Difficult to use I am a breastfeeder. But, every now and again, my husband gives our baby a bottle of breastmilk. We are past the point of sleep deprivation, so I don't blame the use of this product on not enough sleep - it really is very confusing to use.

The directions are quite unclear and the chart used to tell you how much water to put in is even more unclear. Several times, we have put too much water in, and the bottle gets way too hot, which is dangerous!
It does not consistantly heat up the firmula, despite using the proper amount of water Review 7: rating 5.0. Great Product, Would Buy Again I bought this bottle warmer based on the reviews I found here. This is an amazing product! Heats up the breast milk super quick - less than a min - and works with glass bottles. It's a little tricky at first trying to figure out how much water to pour in, but with trial and error (we tried twice) we got it. Note: Glass 4 oz bottle users, fill water up to the #4 line. Review 1: rating 5.0. Five Stars Wonderful entertainment for our first grandchild. Excellent quality. He loves watching all the faces go by. Review 2: rating 5.0. He loves it... Our grandson loves it...he's three months... Review 3: rating 5.0. Very cute My baby loves this. It is adorable and has so many songs. It was a great purchase. Review 4: rating 5.0. Very cute, good quality- highly recommend ! Adorable! This mobile exceeded my expectations. I searched for days on etsy, all the baby stores and just couldn't find anything I liked and for a reasonable price. Quality of the plush toys is excellent ... Songs are very short snips of popular nursery , classical music and Disney tunes. Sometimes the pace of the song is off, but my baby doesn't care, nor do I :)

Overall very pleased Review 5: rating 3.0. I like the look of this mobile and the music selection I like the look of this mobile and the music selection. However, my mobile stopped turning after only 4 nights of use. I have replaced the batteries, but it won't spin. Review 6: rating 5.0. This is incredibly beautiful design, music is wonderful and it plays for ... This is incredibly beautiful design, music is wonderful and it plays for so long without repeating, baby gets so excited when we play it, she loves to see this mobile from different angles ( from crib or when she is held from up!) and it is another device that made my life easier, I can do something ( I am single mom so this is so important that I have chance to eat thanks to devices like this) Love this pro... Review 7: rating 2.0. The mobile is nice in that it has so many songs The mobile is nice in that it has so many songs, however, the mobile is too heavy for the cheap plastic arm. I was afraid that with the 3 pieces of the arm together it would break off into the crib. The center piece airplane is so big it looks slightly awkward. Maybe if that was made a little smaller it wouldn't be too heavy for the arm. Also this barley fit on my crib. I had to force it onto the side of the crib. Ultimately I returned ... Review 8: rating 5.0. Good quality For some reason most of the mobiles sound really annoying to me. However, this one has a very pleasant sound. Our baby loves it. Very happy with purchase. Review 9: rating 5.0. I absolutely love that it places so many songs I ordered this because the price was right. I absolutely love that it places so many songs, including Disney songs! I love the automatic timer but I wish we could select the time, 30 minutes isn't long enough somedays. My little girl loves looking at the stuffed animals. I cannot say enough good things about this product. It shipped quickly too. Review 10: rating 3.0. Very cute but not very sturdy. Great selection of music, very cute, and it works well. But it the arm is so tall, it starts sagging so that it isn't straight up. It drives me nuts because no matter how well I have it attached, it looks constantly bent. Review 11: rating 4.0. Four Stars I love the tunes. I wish there were lights. And it is either too high or too low. Review 12: rating 2.0. Holder does not fit my crib I give this only 2 stars because for that prize I honestly expected a more standardized arm holder. The mobile it self is cute also the songs are very cute. My crib has a wider frame so the holder can't be applied on it. I'm very disappointed since I can't even improvise to make it fit, I tried kind of everything, so I guess I will have to find a different holder and pay again. Review 13: rating 5.0. Excellent mobile! Really great mobile! This was my 1st pick but I went with a tiny love mobile which I returned. I ordered this and I'm so glad I did. The music is really soft and continuos and very delightful. The dolls itself are just too cute to look at. It even came with a mini screwdriver! Review 14: rating 5.0. Well made characters, good sound quality [[VIDEOID:ea6d49ffed82f4ccd03c895f48dd6330]] I am impressed with this mobile. The quality of the stuffed animals is excellent and it looks great both up close and far away. The music is mostly from cartoons, such as Lion King, My Neighbor Totoro, and Aladdin. There are also some classic lullabies like Green Sleeves. The mobile does spin slowly; the spinning mechanism is inside of the music box. Takes AA batteries. Review 15: rating 2.0. I really like this toy I really like this toy , i was about to get second for my sister, but shipping takes so long , and i put one day delivery. Review 16: rating 5.0. Five Stars What can I say. It's cute. Review 17: rating 5.0. My baby loves this mobile so much. I turn ... My baby loves this mobile so much. I turn it on in the morning and it actually buys me 30-45 minutes. He'll just stare at it for ages and sometimes even talks to the little figures. I turn it on when I nurse before bedtime too and I think it helps relax him to sleep. Review 18: rating 5.0. Every baby should buy this. My baby loves this mobile! I've been using it since he was born and it is the perfect distraction when he needs to calm down during a changing or when fussy at night. He's three months old now, and while Dad and I know the order of the songs at this point, baby doesn't seem to mind. It plays a small snippet (maybe 30 seconds?) of a song before moving onto the next. There has to be some major copyright violations, but thank you, China. Volume and rotation b... Review 19: rating 3.0. Three Stars It looks exactly as expected, but the structure and music box are flimsy and unstable. Review 20: rating 4.0. Very pretty and colorful mobile Very pretty and colorful mobile. Plays so many songs but I don't think they are all nursery songs. Very high though so need to make sure your crib is compatible with it. It kinda wavers a little when attached to our crib. Would be worried if it falls over and hits the baby. Otherwise a very pretty and fun mobile.
persona: This customer prioritizes functionality, quality, and value in everyday baby and household products, frequently seeking items that deliver reliable performance, thoughtful design, and long-term durability, while also appreciating pleasant sensory details like scent and softness, and is willing to recommend products they find genuinely effective and well-made.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Love it!!!! We absolutely love this baby mobile!!!!! We have a boy so we ended up changing pink toy with the giraffe. It’s so easy to change the hanging toys and this mobile honestly has the best music selection, even my husband said so. We are extremely happy and would highly recommend!

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Wonderful and Easy to use We just received these this evening along with a pack of another brand of wall decals. These were my favorite of the two. The colors are thick and bright. With the other pack the colors were so thin that when I put them on the mirrors in the bathroom they looked like ghosts. lol. This set was not like that. They came off their sheets very easily, even the big ones, and went on and off the walls with ease when I needed to rearrange them. Love these and once w...

Review 2: rating 5.0. Easy to apply Perfect! Easy to apply and removable without damaging paint looks super cute for my 5 year olds room. I bought another set to do his bathroom in just now. Only complaint is it doesn't glow in the dark much as it says. But doesn't matter to us at all

Review 3: rating 2.0. Two Stars They don't glow in the dark like it says

Review 4: rating 5.0. She loved these. Some of them even glow Bought these for our 8 year old for Christmas. She loved these. Some of them even glow, which made her even more excited. These things are awesome. Stick them up, and take them down to put some where else on the wall, and they'll actually stick again! I'm so glad we bought these.

Review 5: rating 2.0. Shipping Product as described however it did not come on the guaranteed ship date. I needed it for a birthday party and I had to go there with no gift. Such an embarrassment!

Review 6: rating 5.0. a BIG hit with our 4 year old My 4 year old grandson LOVES these decals.  He asks to have them re-positioned all around his room almost daily, and the decals have held up amazingly well for for being taken on and off the wall repeatedly.  He even sticks them on his shirt sometimes, and has taken them into the tub with him.  And they are still functional!!!  When they finally wear out, I have a feeling I will be ordering another set.

Review 7: rating 2.0. Not pre-cut like they should be My 3 year old loves Toy Story.  These are very cute cutouts.  My complaint is that I wasn't able to peel them off easily.  They are supposed to be pre-cut for easy peeling. Most of them were not cut.  I had to cut each out with a scissor and then peel the back off.  Very time consuming.

Review 8: rating 5.0. Big hit at Baby Shower My newborn nephew had a Toy Story themed baby shower, and I used these as decorations. EVERYONE absolutely LOVED them. Afterward, we put them back onto the sheets they came on and gave them to my sister for his room. Fantastic product :)

Review 9: rating 1.0. They don’t glow They don’t glow at all. I would like a refund

Review 10: rating 5.0. Thanks, Amazon! My 5-year old nephew is going to LOVE THIS, his Mother told me! I like it, too! He's a big fan of Buzz Lightyear and that stick-on is nice and big! Can't wait to see his room in the dark, since the stickers  are supposed to glow in the dark. He will love his Auntie forever when he gets this and his other Toy Story items I bought to go with it!

Review 11: rating 2.0. If you're not putting them on a white wall, BEWARE! We bought a larger RoomMates Buzz and Woody that are awesome, great quality, clarity and color.  We figured these little guys would be the same.  We were wrong.  The difference between the two is the larger cousins are printed on white vinyl so the color of the characters really stand out (not faded by the background wall color).  These smaller guys are printed on see-through vinyl so the color of your wall dulls the characters.  We...

Review 12: rating 5.0. Just as described in pictures 😁 My little one loves them and so do I they are so vibrant with color and so easy to unstick peels right of and doesn’t leave any marks on the wall I can just tell they will last a long time!I strongly recommend these if your little one is a toy story fan😊

Review 13: rating 5.0. These are SO Great!!! I bought these for my son's room as he is a Toy Story fan and they are SO easy to use!  They stuck beautifully to his wall with a flat paint finish and they are easy to peel off and restick in a different position!  I would HIGHLY recommend these!  They are so full of detail and are so bright and colorful!

Review 14: rating 1.0. missing 4 stickers so when i open it! is missing 3 alien stickers and 1 pig! is it used or what??? can u pls send me another one!!

Review 15: rating 1.0. Delivery was really fast Did not stick the wall my son was disappointed .....

Review 16: rating 4.0. Fantastic I purchased the decals to decorate a window.  They work wonderful.  The only trouble I forsee is when I go to take them off the window and back onto the original sheets it will be a bit difficult to line up, but not a big deal.  My only complaint is when initially purchasing trying to figure out how big they are.  Woody and other main characters are about 14-16 inches tall (I did not meeasure precisely).

Review 17: rating 2.0. Be ready to cut these out Decals look great!! Super easy to install once they are removed. Have not fallen off wall once. As other reviewers have stated, get ready to use scissors or craft knife to cut some of them out due to them not being fully pre-cut.

Review 18: rating 5.0. Fun, easy decoration for my son's room! My 2-year-old is obsessed with the Toy Story movies and that is all he will watch on TV now and we watch them over and over.  A few weeks ago we were at the store and he saw some Toy Story products and got so excited and started yelling "Woody and Buzz!" so I decided these wall decals would be perfect to decorate his room.  I live in family housing on campus so I can't paint or do much to decorate here and I hate plain white walls.  I had been ...

Review 19: rating 2.0. It doesn't glow in the dark. Not worth the ... It doesn't glow in the dark. Not worth the price. Other than that the stickers are big enough and stick well to the wall.

Review 20: rating 4.0. The little boy who got these for his birthday just ... The little boy who got these for his birthday just loves them. Mom loves that they're reusable and don't damage her walls. It's only a four because apparently the glow in the dark didn't really glow. His mom didn't even notice and seemed surprised they were supposed to when I asked about it. Not a big deal. They came kind of folded and some of the stickers were bent up a bit. Over time they flattened, but should have been sent fl...

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Great purchase Came very fast ! And my baby girl is almost 5 months and LOVES it!

Review 2: rating 5.0. Great purchase Came very fast ! And my baby girl is almost 5 months and LOVES it!

Review 3: rating 5.0. Very nice and convenient product! My 4-month old loves to grab the toys and play with them. Mostly puts them in her mouth since she’s teething, but it’s a pretty great product. She hates being in the swing now because she can’t sit up. When we lay her down she constantly tries to pull herself up. So hopefully it will encourage her to sit better and independently in a few more weeks. :)

Review 4: rating 5.0. Great gift for 4 month old 4 month old loves sitting up and observing in this seat!

Review 5: rating 5.0. Love this seat! Love this seat for our 5 month old! He has outgrown his bouncer, and doesn't like to hang out in the rock and play anymore. We had a bumbo, but it wasn't the right fit for him. This is PERFECT! He can sit up and enjoy time with the rest of the family too!

Review 6: rating 5.0. Mom Win! Definite win! Now I can do my laundry without a baby on me! Saved my mom soul for sure

Review 7: rating 5.0. Love it! My 5 month old loves this and helps them not to lean to far forward before they’re strong enough to sit up on their own.

Review 8: rating 5.0. Worth the buy My daughter loves her seat

Review 9: rating 5.0. You definitely want to make sure your baby can hold their head up I love it so glad I decided to go with this

Review 10: rating 5.0. Worth it! I went back & forth forever trying to decide if I need this for my babe since we have the bumbo already. There’s no comparison, it holds his head perfectly and I can comfortably do the dishes or whatever while he’s sitting in it. The toys on it are a extra bonus!

Review 11: rating 5.0. Perfect gift for my niece I’d been looking everywhere for this particular pattern and I was thrilled to see it come back in stock. My niece is just three months now and she loves it. Perfect set up for her and safe, with no risk of toppling over like with other designs.

Review 12: rating 5.0. Great Another great baby item.  Folds up for easy transport and storage.  Washable.  Baby loves it.  Cute colors.  Gender neutral.  Would buy as a baby gift and would recommend

Review 13: rating 5.0. Love PERFECT for my 3 month old who is tired of laying in her back all the time. Easy to put together. Very light and easy to transport. Also super cute!

Review 14: rating 5.0. Happy baby My almost three month old loves to be held up in the sitting position at all times, this did perfect. Perfect for babies who have no problem holding their heads up.

Review 15: rating 4.0. Used item? Easy to assemble, parts seemed used noticed discoloration and signs of use while putting parts together. It was not disclosed that this was a slightly used item. Required cleaning.

Review 16: rating 5.0. Great for little baby holding their head up I love this!!! It's perfect 👌 my daughter can sit around everyone without laying in a chair. She is only 2 months old. It's deep so there is more support for the chest and up! 👍

Review 17: rating 5.0. Daughter loves it My 2 month old uses this daily. It's a great way to get "tummy time" for babies who hate being on their tummy. She loves being able to watch me do stuff without laying in a swing or rocker.

Review 18: rating 3.0. Better than the bumble Ergonomically I like better than the bumble, but it definitely larger. Wish there was a retractable overhead hang toy rather than toys hanging opposite baby on the arm rest.

Review 19: rating 5.0. Perfect little seat! This seat is adorable! My three month old son has been wanting to sit up more lately, and I put him in this and he just loves it! It is perfect for him! It was very easy to put together, and I like that it folds down so you can take it somewhere also! I didn’t have something like this for my first child, and I wasn’t going to get it for my second, but I am very glad I did! Now I regret not having it for my first!

Review 20: rating 3.0. It could have been perfect This is beautiful and I like how it doesn’t take up much space at all BUT the leg holes are so small. It’s a struggle putting my 3 mos in and taking her out- her legs are always stuck when I take her out. It’s pretty frustrating. If it wasn’t for that, this would have been absolutely perfect as she loves sitting in it.
persona: This customer prioritizes functionality and usability in baby products, particularly ease of use and proper fit, and is dissatisfied with designs that compromise on assembly flexibility or child accessibility.

We're also short on space in our small home, so this play mat was the best of both worlds. It's small enough to not take up much room and at an affordable price. The other mats are just too large and bulky for a 900 sqft home.

My daughter loves this mat and spends a few hours a day on it. She especially enjoys the rattle and mirror. We've had it... Review 10: rating 5.0. persona: This customer prioritizes compact, well-designed play products with durable construction and engaging features that support early development, and they consistently choose trusted brands known for quality and functionality.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Cute and compact play gym Sweet little play gym that fits easily in the crib or pack n play. My baby loves the toys. Much more manageable than some of the other gyms available. Another quality product from Fisher-Price.

Review 1: rating 5.0. Little doggie containment We use two of these to corral a chihuahua in a hall and bathroom area when we are out. More space than that and the little guy has too much to guard, and freaks. These are the best gates out there, I am convinced. Easy to install, work smoothly, positively, look "professional" instead of like some sort of tacked on kludge. We use one of these to keep the dog out of an area that he "marks" if he gets into the area, every time, so we have to... Review 2: rating 3.0. Great gate, mediocre attachments. My headline kind of sums up my feeling about this gate. The gate itself is high quality and attractive. The wall attachments, not so much.

First of all, it broke on installation. (One of the plastic parts snapped off). Now I should premise this by saying that my husband and I are not carpenters, but we should also not need to be in order to install a baby gate. We recently successfully replaced drywall, insulation, carpet padding, plywood,... Review 3: rating 4.0. Would have loved if it fit... This was one of the more expensive gates, but the reviews were positive when I purchased. I bought it for the top of my stairs as a safety feature for baby coming soon. Unfortunately I started to install the gate, but had to abort the process. The attachment for the gate has to slide down from the top, and my bannister was in the way; the handrail of my banister protrudes several inches. You can't install this under a banister, the wall or installation s... Review 4: rating 5.0. Excellent, heavy duty gate Excellent, heavy duty gate. It withstands a toddler attacking it while closed. Spend some time and make sure when installing it you align everything correctly so it snaps closed easily. Review 5: rating 5.0. Best Gate Ever! This is the only gate I have found that my Dog can't eat or break! Thank you for such a quality product! Review 6: rating 5.0. Probably the best-looking baby gate We live in a trendy loft and let's be honest, most gates are ugly AF. Also we have a tricky situation where we only have a wall on one side to mount a gate to, and a metal railing/staircase on the other. The solution was this Munchkin gate, which we installed about 4 years ago. We ended up spray painting a 2x4 board gray / silver and mounting it to our staircase, then we mounted the Munchkin gate to that. It works beautifully! We had a gate for whi... Review 7: rating 2.0. After getting it completely installed, those little caps won’t go back in, no matter what I do. I’ve had other people try. I even tried hammering them in and nothing. It won’t lock in place making it completely useless. Very frustrated and annoyed. Review 9: rating 2.0. A Let down. I’m giving it two starts because it LOOKS attractive however even my handyman wasn’t able to install this gate well. It an hour including the time to watch the YouTube installation video twice. The gate is flimsy and doesn’t close on his own you really have to work with it each time to open and close it. Seems cheap and flimsy to me.
Update half year later : still looks great but my son is able to lean and pull it open already Review 10: rating 5.0. And it stuck out like a sore thumb A very well-made and attractive solution. We had a different model pet gate for a few years but it had a metal bar extending across the bottom and posed a trip hazard. And it stuck out like a sore thumb. This is sleek, neutral and slides completely out of the way . It's used to contain pets, so I can't comment on child safety aspects, but everyone who's seen it loves it. Review 11: rating 4.0. Only complaint is the fit. I was unable to install as is due to the screws that hold the brackets in sticking out no matter how perfect i fit them in. The rubber tube in the gate and the inserts would not pass by the screws when sliding them into place. I eventually removed the tube and everything fit well. Review 12: rating 4.0. Review 20: rating 1.0. DO NOT BUY - DEFECTIVE DESIGN Heeding the warnings of folks saying that installing into drywall is a horrible idea, I attempted to install this gate into a nice solid wood door frame.

It won't fit properly, the slide-in aspect has zero room for tolerance and the screws provided won't fit flush.
As such, it won't install safely or properly even into wood and I'm now having to take apart my wall and doorframe in order to detach it so that I can return this immediately.<...
persona: This customer prioritizes safety, durability, and ease of use in baby and toddler products, willing to invest in higher-priced items that offer reliable performance, especially for critical applications like stair gates, and values clear functionality and peace of mind over price, while also seeking well-designed, aesthetically pleasing products that integrate seamlessly into their home environment.
reference_output:
rating 5.0. Spend the extra money and buy this (especially for stairs)! We have used several gates on the top of our staircase. After my dogs destroyed the wooden one (they wanted to be where the people were), we were looking at some sturdier options. My husband bought one type of gate, and we quickly said no. I then found this one. We were hesitant to almost drop over $150, but the reviews sold us. The breakdown:

1. So easy to use! Some baby gates require a Mensa I.Q. to open. No issue at all with this thing of beauty. All you need is adult dexterity and strength. You literally squeeze the top and bottom button and open. If your child is able to open the gate, I would say they are probably advance enough not to need a gate.

2. The swinging option is the bomb. You can either pull this gate either direction when opening. Nice if you need to block escaping children or if you need to just run back upstairs.

3. It will self close if you push it! No brain power required. Just push the gate towards the middle and it will re latch itself. Very nice when you have your hands full.

4. The design is very nice on the eye. My dogs' anxiety have actually dropped because they can see what's going on downstairs (R.I.P. wooden gate).

Don't be a fool like us. Just buy this gate.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 1.0. Do not waste your money on this gimmick I was sure it's not going to work but decided to give it a chance, and as predicted it doesn't have enough suction power so you find yourself using the Dyson 500 horse power, JK, but really it is not worth the money. Not as good as it seems We purchased this thinking it would be as good as the mouth sucking nose frida, but the suction power was not that great. It stopped sucking after about 2 weeks of maybe once a day use. The collection cup is very small and it is hard to keep the boogers out of the sucking chamber when baby is really sick. Don’t recommend spending the money in this. Review 5: rating 1.0. Doesn’t work Not a strong suction. Broke after first use. Review 6: rating 1.0. No suction, wouldn’t recharge after two uses I was SO excited for an electric baby Frida, but it’s so disappointing. Not only is the suction terrible, it stopped working after two uses! While my son still hates this and it takes 12 people, a goat, and a human sacrifice to get him to sit still for the dreaded snot sucking - this saves so much time over a manual sucker that it’s totally worth it! Review 8: rating 1.0. Not worth it. I love Frida products, but this isn’t it. Just get the Nose Frida. It takes a little more effort but it will get the job done for half the price. Doesn’t do anything, can’t return, don’t waste your money! Review 10: rating 1.0. Poor suction I was so excited to try this because I was tired of having to do the manual labor of sucking out snot. But I was genuinely disappointed in the suction.. or should I say lack there of. It did absolutely nothing at all. So back to manual labor it is. Review 11: rating 2.0. Not worth the price! I had such high hopes for this. My little will fight whenever something comes near his nose and I thought this would be a much faster alternative to the original Freda..... I was wrong. It takes MORE time trying to get it just right in the nostril of a flailing screaming child just so it can get the correct amount of suction. If you're not paying attention, while trying to wrangle your wiggly little, the snot can be sucked into the actual Freda making it impossib... Review 12: rating 1.0. Faulty battery Did not hold a charge , could not even turn on. Review 13: rating 1.0. NOT what I expected My 9-month old recently caught a cold, and before purchasing this item, I was utilizing the basic nose Frida. However, my son absolutely HATES anyone touching his nose. Hence, he puts up a fight EVERY TIME. He'd pull on the tube a lot- very inconvenient.
Therefore, I decided to purchase this item out of desperation, without looking much into it, but I thought, "well this basic Frida works good, just need something more convenient (no tube and quick)"
Hug... Review 14: rating 1.0. Didn’t work I got my nose frida it didn’t work once, I’ve been really busy with a new baby and forgot to return it now I’m outside of the window when I went to try and I’m out money for something that never worked Review 15: rating 1.0. Get the manual one. Nice idea but not worth 3x the price. Did not suck a single boogie out when my baby was sick Review 16: rating 1.0. Waste of Money Poor suction. Barely sucks anything out. Waste of money - stick to the manual boogie sucker. Review 17: rating 1.0. Suction sucks Works best for newborn suction not so great Review 18: rating 1.0. Giant waste of money Definitely opt for the original, much cheaper version! The suction power doesn’t match what you can do if sucking with the original; my kids can’t see the “distraction light” if it’s in their nose (poor placement); I hate having to charge something when the original is always at the ready… and the price is just not worth what you get. I’d pass on this one. Review 19: rating 1.0. Who knows what the suction really is? It is hard to know what the suction is because the silicone nose comes do not stay on. reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. REVIEW OF MUNCHKIN FOOD FEEDER I REALLY DO LOVE THIS PRODUCT. I'VE HAD NO PROBLEMS WITH THE NETTING BREAKING WHEN MY GRANDSON OR GRANDDAUGHER USED THIS PRODUCT. I GOT A COLOR FOR HIM AND HER,NEVER MIXED UP. IT'S MESSY BUT IT OFFERS THEM A GREATER VARIETY THAN THAT TASTELESS JARRED FOOD. I WISH THIS WAS AROUND WHEN I HAD MY KIDS. THE PRODUCT WAS SHIPPED IN A FAST AND TIMELY MANNER,RECEIVED BEFORE THE DATE INDICATED. Review 2: rating 1.0. One Star There is no possible way to completely clean. Review 3: rating 5.0. Happy i bought it Hard to open slightly but you dont want the little one to open it so its a good safety feature. Also people comment on the hard to clean, but i just turn the net inside out and let it soak in a soapy bowl of water and clean it w the bottle brush just fine. A little work to give your little one a safe and entertaining time to eat or help with teething Review 4: rating 1.0. waste of money It is a headache to clean these. U will never end up cleaning them well and eventually throw them. Don't buy Review 5: rating 2.0. Good idea but... The idea is good , but the not as good as another style.
the button is very hard to open and not easy to clean . Review 6: rating 2.0. Hard to open and close Found it hard to open and close. I know it's not supposed to open easily fort safety, but thought it could be designed better. Other companies make these so I would suggest trying one of those. Review 7: rating 5.0. These are great. Best thing we have found to put in them is watermelon. It doesn't make the mesh all nasty like bananas and strawberries do. Review 8: rating 2.0. Munchkin Feeder. Fruits get stuck in between mesh which makes it difficult to clean. Feeder has prior food residue stuck in mesh. Although I put in dishwasher. Looks great on photo. Received packaged in perfect order. Wouldn't purchase again. I used it once and never again. I feed her with my fingers. Now that she's 10 months old she feeds herself. Review 9: rating 1.0. One Star My son won't use them, he hates it. Hard to clean food as well! Review 10: rating 1.0. Food gets stuck in lining. Waaaaay too hard to clean.... my baby loves it. But no matter how hard I scrub the food is still stuck in the lining. Even when it's been soaked in soapy hot water. Would not recommend this product. Review 11: rating 1.0. asked for blue... Asked for blue and green got yellow and pink ! No use for the pink I have a son and no way no how his dad will let me use the pink one and I don't know any one that has a girl so .... Review 12: rating 2.0. Not his favorite My son didn't like this very much. It seemed very cumbersome to put a piece of fruit into the net. Often times the fruit would be too small and it moves around in the net too much and hard for the baby to eat it or the fruit would be too large and it won't fit into the net. I almost have to cut it up perfectly so it's snug and baby can get to it easier. Review 13: rating 5.0. Very helpful for teething We love these! My son will not hold any of the frozen teethers because they get his hands cold but he loves these! I put an ice cube or frozen fruit in and he's happy as a clam! He spent a majority of hot summer days sucking/chewing on ice cubes! Review 14: rating 2.0. Awful for bananas. These things turn into awful black mold factories if you put bananas in them. You literally cannot get out the black old food stuffs. No washing will cleans these. Try the plastic versions. Review 15: rating 2.0. Hard to clean These are good in theory, but I found them difficult to clean. Food would get into the hinge, and stuck in the mesh. I found it was easier just to serve chunky purees with a spoon. This is a great way to introduce independent feeding. Review 16: rating 1.0. Disappointed I really thought I would be able to clean these better, nope, they are a one, maybe two use product. Disappointed Review 17: rating 4.0. Very easy to clean My 5 month old loves these for his strawberrys and pineapple. Very easy to clean, a little hard to open the clasp sometimes though. Review 18: rating 2.0. The kidsme feeder is better and is easier to clean The kidsme feeder is better and is easier to clean. I ended up throwing one of these away because the banana just ruined it and I couldn't get it clean, even threw it in the dishwasher which only made it worse. Review 19: rating 2.0. Kid chews on the handle, not the mesh. ... Kid chews on the handle, not the mesh. A pain to clean. We put strawberries in the mesh and it became mush and took way too long to wash. We stopped using after a few tries. Review 20: rating 1.0. One Star Hard to clean and start to smell.
persona: This customer prioritizes durability, functionality, and trust in product performance, especially for baby care items; they value reliable design, effective features like moisture retention and secure fit, and are willing to overlook minor drawbacks if the product delivers consistent, long-term value and safety.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Love using these Love using these.  They are difficult to clean but only with bananas.  Using oranges or any other fruit is super easy.  Bananas are not worth it though!  Also do not microwave or sterilize, the little closing piece melts!

reviews:
Review 1: rating 3.0. Not bite proof but better than others we’ve tried “Bite proof” is a real stretch on the durability of these in real life. My 2 year old tore through a couple of them in just a couple weeks. Overall no soft spout cup is indestructible. So the cost isn’t terrible to replace but I really wish I could find a cup that lasts more than a month or two. Review 2: rating 1.0. Hard to suck I don’t know if I got two bad ones but my son isn’t able to get the drink out. I also tried it and it wasn’t coming out. This is my first bad review I was really excited for these the only great thing is it really doesn’t leak Review 3: rating 2.0. Not bite Proof For the most part these are pretty good I guess but the “bite-proof” claim is false.
They aren’t bite proof in the least bit. Review 4: rating 1.0. Started leaking after a week This is definitely not leak proof or bite proof. My 18 month old for whatever reason always likes to hold his sippy cup upside down. At first this sippy cup was great then after about a week it started to drip everywhere! Looks like I have to continue my search for another sippy cup. Review 5: rating 1.0. Leak like crazy! Don’t buy! They leak every single time. Review 6: rating 2.0. Not recommended for the aggressive chewers I was super excited to try this product because my child choose through everything. I have gone through so many sippy cups and these are yet another to fall prey. He chewed through them within about 3 weeks but maybe less. My toddler is extremely oily fixated so he constantly choose but considering this is supposed to be bite proof I had higher hopes. Review 7: rating 1.0. Leak proof yes, but very hard to drink from This product is definitely leak proof because you can’t get any liquid out of it. It was very difficult for my baby to suck, and even I had a hard time getting any water out to drink. So it is leak proof but it’s also suck proof. Review 8: rating 1.0. Don't waste your money! Don't waste your money! I bought these for my nearly 3 year old and was quickly disappointed when I discovered that he could not get any liquid out. I tried and could barely get a trickle of water out - even then you must bite and suck simultaneously to get any fluid out.

That being said, the secure click lock is a brilliant addition to the easy to handle shape of the sippy. Review 9: rating 2.0. Don’t. Buy. Dude. Where do I start? Leak proof? Absolutely not. Easy to clean? Heck no. Left one in my car for a couple days and it collected mold in places that were impossible to clean. I had to use my fingernail to get in the crevices. My toddler left his laying on my bed and the entire thing leaked. (And yes I clicked it shut, the milk came out of the nipple) Yeah don’t buy these. Review 10: rating 3.0. there is a design flaw in the nipple, babies are unable to get the Liquid out I understand that the design of the nipples to prevent babies from biting on it and spilling the drink but it also prevents them from being able to drink out of it to begin with! Both my boys could not get anything out of these cups. We had to take small scissors and open up all the holes including the vent hole just for liquid to be able to come out. Which kind of defeats the purpose of a no spill sippy cu... Review 11: rating 2.0.
