reference_output:
rating 5.0. Saved our Disney trip with 3/4yo I just returned from a week at Disney World with this in tow. It literally saved our trip. My lo just turned 4 and has been potty trained for over a year, however the auto flush public toilets have been the bane of my existence.
We took a trip to visit family last October and had a lot of issues. So I sought out a travel potty for our Disney trip. I used this potty in conjunction with XLdoggy pee pads and a roll of 8 gallon trash bags and the good nites we had saved for emergencies. While st the parks we used the companion restrooms and put the potty on the pee pad and lined with 2 trash bags with the goodnite diaper inside. I should also note we covered the toilet sensor with a super sticky post it.
My lo had no trouble sitting on this to potty and made no fuss, the pee pad kept the potty and my lo clean from the floor and I wrapped the tied bags in it when done.
If autoflush potties are keeping you from living your life I recommend this potty. We also used it in our car without issue, do double layer your bags and pee pads in the car.

persona: This customer prioritizes functional reliability and battery life in baby products, but is deterred by bulky designs that hinder practical use, indicating a preference for compact, space-efficient solutions that deliver consistent results.
reference_output:
rating 2.0. Very bulky, did not work to calm/put my baby to sleep Pros:
- vibration is strong
- batteries last
- very very rarely, if my baby was already drowsy, the vibration would encourage her to sleep. But it only did the trick once or twice in over a month. We stopped using it.

Cons:
- very bulky as others have stated. Cannot be put under crib mattress without keeping it way lifted. I ended up putting it on the mattress at the foot of the crib and I've also tried it in the car seat when trying to go on stroller walks
- The idea of gradually lowering vibration until shutoff may sound good on paper but if baby is not in deep sleep, she would wake up when it stopped
- There is no option to keep it running for prolonged period of time. It shuts off after half an hour and baby wakes up if you start it again as it's very powerful when it first turn on.
- Lastly, for my 1-2 month old baby who cries when put in crib or car seat, this item did not help to calm her down or put her to sleep 99.9% of the times we tried it.

But every baby is different so it doesn't mean it won't work for others

persona: This customer prioritizes natural, safe materials and skin-friendly products, especially for sensitive infants, and values effective performance and comfort over brand familiarity, while being willing to research ingredients and fit thoroughly before purchasing.
reference_output:
rating 3.0. Super runny! This seemed awesome at first but as we used more and more it’s started to lose its “solid” form. It’s super runny. It’s only 70 degrees in my house and this is not near the vents or anything. It sits in a cubby with diapers 🤷‍♀️ It’s so easy to over use because it’s all melted. I could not imagine this in the summer if this would go on a camping trip or outside for any amount of time or left in the car while you ran into the store. I would be worried that it would leak.

It’s great for bottoms, smells great. But it’s not worth it for how runny it gets once you use a little bit of it. I know I could probably refrigerate it maybe to help gain it’s form again but I’m using it up and trying a different balm. I know it’s got oils that tend to melt easier but this doesn’t even try to harden again haha.

Review 1: rating 5.0. Must have in your diaper bag ;) It's a great sling. My son was 9 month when we start using it. I wish I knew about it earlier. I went thru quit few carriers till I found this one. It's great! So easy to use, no crazy wrapping. And It doesnt take much space in diaper bag, just perfect for traveling too. I recommend this item to my friends) Review 2: rating 2.0. Its ok It's a nice wrap, but not something that is super easy to put baby in when you go out. I only use it around the house, it's just not convenient otherwise. Also the sizes are drastically different, a small & medium have an extreme difference so getting the correct size is hard. Review 3: rating 3.0. I want to love this wrap but after washing and drying this it ... I want to love this wrap but after washing and drying this it seems to fit too loose. I bought a small and I wear everything medium typically. I used their sizing chart and it told me to get a small. I am 5'6" and 155 pounds but muscular build. My baby is 9 pounds and this wrap doesn't fit snug enough where I feel comfortable hands free. She starts off ok but ends up sitting really low to where I cannot kiss the to... Review 4: rating 4.0. Good so far I just purchased this carrier and also received the boba wrap carrier from my baby registry. I will say (so far) I prefer this carrier as there is no wrapping involved. The material is breathable and has just enough stretch to it and still keeps baby snuggly close to me and doesn't sag with time. My baby is 6 weeks and he doesn't seem to comfortable in the newborn hold. His legs seem squashed up and he keeps trying to stretch them, so I'm placing him in the kangaroo posit... Review 5: rating 5.0. My go to carrier I have a colicky 1 month old and this carrier has been a lifesaver! It is easy to use and baby loves it. We have 4 other types of carriers, but this is my top pick lately.
At first I thought it was too small (I'm 5'5" and 138# and I ordered small). It is snug at first and it took me a few tries to learn how to put it on, but once I got the hang of it we both fell in love. It is quick to put on and get her in and she immediately calms and eventually falls as... Review 6: rating 5.0. ... wife bought this for our newborn and they both love it! She is 5'5 140 lbs and the ... My wife bought this for our newborn and they both love it! She is 5'5 140 lbs and the small fit her well. She loves how it keeps the baby happy and comfortable when she needs to get things done around the house and the baby wants to be held (especially when I am at work). We live in Arizona and my wife says that the material is light and breathable and does a good job with keeping her and the b... Review 7: rating 3.0. 'Active' version much better I like this wrap holder better than any other brand... but this specific version has two different types of materials and that bothered me. I ended up buying the 'active' and like it much better! Review 8: rating 1.0. Sizing is wrong I followed the sizing instructions but it was still too small. My baby hated being in it. I returned it and got an infantino sash carrier (mai tei style) and my baby loves it! Review 9: rating 3.0. difficult to wear/put on, but nice and soft this carrier is just OK. It is basically 2 heavy weight fabric loops that are fastened together in the back. They are soft/comfortable feeling fabric. It is quite hard to figure out how to get it on, at first. there are various ways you can position it, depending on the age of the baby/size of the baby and how you would like to carry the baby. Unfortunately, if you have a colicky baby like I have, who fights and cries, this carrier may no... Review 10: rating 2.0. Not comfortable I got the small according to their specifications and it was WAY TOO SMALL. my baby barely fit in it. I am 5'4 and weighed about 130 pounds when I ordered it. My baby was about 11 pounds. I returned it and did not order a bigger size. It was confusing to put on and uncomfortable over my shoulders. Review 11: rating 5.0. wish had it for all my kids I own a conventional wrap, this is definitely an improvement because 1. not so long...you don't have to worry about the wrap touching the floor /ground especially when you are outside, 2. much more compact...it doesn't occupy much space as the other wrap does...besides, the part of the carrier converts into a bag, 3. the material is good quality, 4. this breeze version indeed allows much more air flow and suits the weather in California, 4. it is much easi... Review 12: rating 5.0. It is so much simpler than other wraps like the Boba and pretty comfy too I wish I would have had this a lot sooner! Granted my baby is only 4 weeks old but I could've used this a lot earlier. It is so much simpler than other wraps like the Boba and pretty comfy too. My baby fell asleep almost right away when I put her in it. This will make walking the dogs and other chores so much easier. I will recommend this to everyone, and it would make a great baby shower gift. Review 13: rating 2.0. XS too tight; small too loose for newborn I decided to give the Baby K'tan Breeze a try, because the Ergo I have gets super hot, especially with the infant insert. Initially, I bought it in XS from a local store, because that's the size that is supposed to fit me based on the sizing guide (I'm 5'2 with a very slight build), but it was way too tight after putting my 9 lb newborn baby in it, so I knew it wasn't going to work. Additionally, it was uncomfortable on both my back and shoul... Review 14: rating 4.0. Like it but.. I love how simple it is to use! It's well made and baby loves it. HOWEVER, I don't think sizing takes breast size into account. Per k'tan's size recommendation, I went with a size small. It is really really snug around my breasts (size 36D). Unfortunately I cannot carry baby in kangaroo hold because it's too tight for me to be comfortable. But it's fine for other holds. I decided to keep it, returning and exchanging for a medium seemed like too much of a hassle. I do re... Review 15: rating 5.0. Fantastic!! My colicky baby fell asleep within one minute. This is a fantastic baby carrier! I have a baby bjorn, a moby wrap, an ergo360, and a Tula. The more structured ones (Tula & 360) are great for hikes, but I wanted something sold and comfy that I could put my colicky baby in around the house so I could actually use both of my arms. This was PERFECT! My seven week old fell asleep in about a minute after putting him in it, and slept comfortably for a good amount of time. I... Review 16: rating 2.0. Size choice is probably more critical than expected. Others have sworn by these, but my wife and baby didn't like using the unit. Just couldn't get it set up right or comfortable for mom or baby. Maybe the size is wrong for our mom and a big baby. The different positions it allows were all tried with no success. Review 17: rating 5.0. Very easy to use I borrowed a traditional wrap to try with my fourth child, but didn't like the long fabric. Baby K'tan is very simple to use even for one who has never worn their baby before. The size chart on their website made finding the right size easy. It's sized just for me, two simple loops, no extra material to make me hot or trip on. I can wear it around my waist until ready to slip over my shoulders and use. The baby isn't waiting around for me to wrap myself. Plus to remo... Review 18: rating 2.0. Had to return it Size chart is not accurate. I had to return it. but material seems nice for hot weather. Review 19: rating 5.0. Great product for first time moms. Out of all the baby products I bought this one is one of the most useful. It takes a little practice to get it right but once you do it's so convenient. I've been using it for two months and even though he grew out of the newborn "kangaroo" position pretty quickly, the next position I like even more. It's comfortable and so much easier than lugging a car seat and stroller around. A+
persona: This customer prioritizes comfort and proper fit, especially for use in hot climates, and values accurate sizing and stretchable materials; they rely heavily on product descriptions and sizing charts when making purchasing decisions.
reference_output: rating 1.0. Uncomfortable, Material does not stretch I did a lot of research prior to deciding on which carrier to purchase.  I ultimately decided to go with the Ktan Breeze because of the hot Florida summers.  I followed the sizing chart recommendation and ordered a small.  I find it to be extremely tight, uncomfortable and the material does not stretch at all.  The description states that you could use for multiple positions up to 35 lbs.  My baby barely fits now and he’s only 11 lbs. I had such high hopes for this product and am very disappointed.  I wish I would’ve invested in an different carrier or perhaps one of the other K’tan lines.

Review 1: rating 5.0. MBP41 Motorola Video Baby Monitor - High Quality! [[VIDEOID:44dd8213c2a311e7e0118a1c85a2a568]] This is an excellent, high quality baby monitor. I bought it last week. It's my first monitor ever and it's a great one. The video shows how I got it up and running and shows some great features as well. The best features are the intercom, camera panning, zooming in and out, night vision, 2.8 inch screen, and the fact that the remote control buttons are next to the screen (I really didn't w... Review 2: rating 5.0. High quality video monitor - best I've ever owned! These baby monitors are incredible! The Motorola MBP41 Remote Wireless Video Baby Monitors are made with high quality construction. The video image is crystal clear and the ability to zoom, pan, and tilt make this unit super convenient, especially if your baby moves around a bit, or you want to get a closer view of your sleeping child. The parent unit has a stand, and the camera and parent units both have rubber feet. I love the rech... Review 3: rating 2.0. Spotty reception and bad charging connection Thought I really liked this monitor but after about a month of use the charger connection is loose so in the middle of the night if it's just a fraction loose it's starts beeping because the battery is dying! When you're already waking multiple times a night this is the last thing you need. Also the signal is spotty and the sound goes in and out constantly even though we are right in the room next door. Also wish the volume was easier to t... Review 4: rating 3.0. Three Stars Nice product, but the monitor doesn't stay charged for more than one night or day. Review 5: rating 5.0. This is an exceptional monitor. I used it for ... This is an exceptional monitor. I used it for one month while caring for my husband during his last days of life. It is so sensitive you can even see when an individual's eyes are open when the room is dark or when breathing is irregular. Exceptional value. Review 6: rating 2.0. Good reception, no sound Help! I just started using this. I've used it 3 times so far. The monitors reception is great! Picture is good. But I just noticed it sounds like the volume is working, but it is NOT. I have it turned up all the way under the settings menu. If I wouldn't have waked right by the room I wouldn't have known the baby was crying. Anything else I could try? Review 7: rating 5.0. Love it! This monitor is everything I was looking for! Love it! Review 8: rating 1.0. This monitor is terribly constructed. We were given the monitor as a ... This monitor is terribly constructed. We were given the monitor as a gift and very quickly the power switch got stuck in an inverted position. We bought a second one thinking that was a fluke, and the second one didn't work right out of the box! The screen was black. I will never purchase a Motorola product again. Review 9: rating 5.0. Awesome Product AS described, works great, have no complaints, use it everyday!!!! Review 10: rating 3.0. Three Stars Does the job but speaker stopped working properly, sounds distorted. I guess its not a deal breaker. Review 11: rating 2.0. This worked fine the first three times we used it This worked fine the first three times we used it. The fourth and so on, we keep getting "No Signal" errors. We can be within 30 ft with a clear line of sight and it will go from full service to no signal at random. It will beep every few seconds when there is no signal which is a great safety feature but it's frustrating being woke up constantly throughout the night because of it. Review 12: rating 5.0. Love this monitor Love this monitor. It's a great price, the picture is very good, and I love that you can move the camera back and forth. Review 13: rating 3.0. No improvement from previous "older" models. I bought this product (MBP 41 2.8") hoping it would be an "improved" version of my previously owned Motorola MBP 36 PU (3.5" screen). The unit works fine "out-of-the-box" and is easy to use. Picture quality is ok even with the smaller screen and microphone works well. After all, this is not a "retina" screen :)...For that I give it 4 stars...but there are still a few issues with... Review 14: rating 1.0. worked well until it didn't work at all This monitor worked great. Then, after less than 3 months of use, the sound stopped working completely. Motorola is sending a replacement, but they will not send it until they receive our old unit in the mail, leaving us completely without a monitor while we wait (we had been using the video without sound). Review 15: rating 5.0. Best Monitor Out There By far, the best monitor I have ever had. Not only can you see your child on the screen, you can push buttons to move the camera back and forth. The second feature that is amazing is the intercom. The baby/child can be in another room and you can push a button on the monitor and talk to them directly. I would highly suggest this monitor to anyone having children! Review 16: rating 1.0. One Star Never will buy this model again. It came damaged. Review 17: rating 5.0. A very good product I am so happy with this! Seriously. Buy it if you are looking for a video baby monitor. We had it for over 3 months now and I could not be happier. It has a good range, charge is enough for 7 hours - which is what I need when I am working at home. Of course you will need to keep it plugged in for the night to ensure that it lasts. The quality of the image is decent and I like the zoom in feature - I can even see my baby breathe.
I love that the camera tilts. ... Review 18: rating 5.0. Five Stars This is a great video monitor for a great price!! Review 19: rating 1.0. The camera is good, however the battery life is terrible The camera is good, however the battery life is terrible. For example, I take it fully charged with me while I'm taking a shower that way I don't have to rush thinking that my baby is crying by the time that I get to the room and start to look for something to put on it only has a bar, so the battery basically lasts about 40 mins at most. Review 20: rating 5.0. Great monitor! No problems with this monitor. Works perfectly fine. Night vision great and it's nice to be able to move the camera from the base unit. Definitely recommend this one.
persona: This customer prioritizes functional performance and durability, with little tolerance for poor image quality, limited screen size, or inadequate battery life, and is unlikely to repurchase products that fail to meet basic usability standards.
reference_output: rating 1.0. Average to bad Really bad image, small screen, and the battery lasts less than an hour when not plugged in to the wall.

persona: This customer prioritizes functional performance and comfort for their baby, especially in critical aspects like sound clarity and mattress firmness, and is willing to make adjustments or seek alternatives if product expectations aren’t met, indicating a preference for reliable, baby-specific functionality over brand loyalty.
reference_output:
rating 4.0. Tried it out I tried this after having the Lenox monitor. The sound quality doesn't compare. Though there wasn't any static so in that respect it's good. For a newborn, I really like to be able to hear breathing, which is really tough with Infant Optics. It's a decent simple monitor with a good screen, but the sound was a dealbreaker for me. This isn't meant to say you should get the Lenox. There are other problems with the Lenox monitor (just scan though reviews) so I'm still looking for a monitor.

Update: we've tried several other monitors since this one and decided to go back to it. It's good and inexpensive enough that we've decided to use it by itself for our toddler, and with the Angelcare sound monitor if/when we have another newborn for optimal sound quality.(so roughly $150 total for both) It's been hard to find a video system that does everything we want it to for that price, so this seems to work for us. Something for customers to think about.

Update 7/2/13: We've had this monitor for over 1 year now, and still going strong! The handheld part has been dropped a few times on the kitchen floor, but no breaks.

persona: This customer prioritizes performance and value, favoring products that deliver consistent quality at a competitive price, but is highly sensitive to durability of design elements like graphics and finishes, especially when they degrade quickly with normal use.
reference_output:
rating 3.0. NOT THAT QUIET, but they do cut hair decently. My 3 year-old son has some ear canal issues. (Need to set up appt with specialist.) He thinks everything is loud.

I bought these assuming they would be silent as I (35 y/o male) have gotten haircuts with near-silent clippers before. The technology is there.

When turning these on out of the box, they are just as loud as my hair clippers I use. They say in the troubleshooting manual "Too loud cause: Blades not oiled properly". Well, I oiled them and the sound was lowered by a couple decibels at best.

Someone posted a video review on here for these where she is cutting her baby's hair while in a wrap on her chest. Baby is sleeping. The clippers are extremely loud in the video, and that is how they are in person. I have to believe that baby just got off the nipple and is in a milk coma.

Also, the cape included is nice, but it doesn't go down the back far enough. Son kept itching his back. (It is very hard to get an uncooperative toddler to sit in an actual hair stylists chair, or even one similar at home)

3 stars due to audio level being pretty high. Thankfully, my son is in "Daddy, I big boy no cry" mode. He wanted to be brave, and actually let me cut his hair properly with them.

If you are looking for SILENT clippers, shop elsewhere. IF your child can handle *some* noise, at least not as loud as standard clippers, they are a decent substitute.

4/5 for hair cutting ability

5/5 for battery life (Stayed pretty well charged for first cut)

3/5 for sound.

I DO recommend these IF your child can handle a semi-loud pair of clippers buzzing by their ears.

I do NOT recommend these if your child has autism or some other serious issue with audio/sensory problems.

reference_output: rating 3.0. Not for a petite person I have the Baby Bjorn Original and wanted to get a carrier that would be more versatile for when my baby got a little older. I am 5'2" and this carrier didn't work because it's made for a longer torso. The waist strap sat low on my hips which meant the baby was hanging really low. I'm not positive if that's how low the baby is supposed to hang, but after wearing my baby in fabric wraps and the Original Baby Bjorn, I now like my baby a bit higher. It will work for someone with a long torso, but not for a petite person.

reference_output:
rating 5.0. ... the high reviews and the notion that it was easily cleanable. I haven't used it yet (still waiting ... I bought this because of the high reviews and the notion that it was easily cleanable. I haven't used it yet (still waiting for the stork - wish they had Prime shipping), but I'm very impressed with the quality of it. I tested how waterproof it is with water and can confirm it is very waterproof and extremely easy to clean.

Now to my surprise. I obviously did not read the description or other reviews close enough as I expected it to be a hard plastic like those Koala changing stations in public restrooms. However, it is a very soft foam material that almost feels like a really nice mattress pad or sleeping bag pad - almost like memory foam. This dispels a couple preconceived fears I had (if it were hard plastic) - that it would be too cold for baby or that it would easily slide off the top of baby's dresser if he squirmed too much. The foam keeps room temperature, so as others have mentioned I'll use a soft towel on cold nights to stop baby from getting shocked. The foam also sticks to the glass top of the dresser really well.

High priced, yes. But I expect it to be worth it at 3 in the morning.

persona: This customer prioritizes product functionality and child-specific design, favoring innovative, ergonomic solutions that address real parenting challenges; they value practicality, ease of use, and proven effectiveness, especially in items that support infant development and reduce frustration, and are willing to invest in high-performing products they trust and rely on daily.
reference_output: rating 1.0. Loved it...and then it died for no reason. I loved this baby monitor. We even purchased the wide lens to get a better view of the full room for our twins. I specifically loved the pan and zoom features that many baby monitors don’t have. The night vision was good. It did a great job filtering the white noise machine. The battery was terrible, but that was fine because I never unplugged it. I was planning on purchasing a second camera for when our next baby arrived in a few months...but then the monitor suddenly died! We just used it at night and I would occasionally go into my room to check it before we went to bed, but other than that it only ever sat on my nightstand. We NEVER carried it around or dropped it, etc. It hasn’t even been quite 3 years. So it’s past the warranty, but still unacceptable that it should stop working for no reason. The blue light comes on to show it’s charging, but the screen literally doesn’t respond to anything. No sound comes out of it. It’s just...dead. I tried contacting the company with no response and I’m extremely disappointed. We’ve invested about $200 in this monitor between the unit itself and the wide lens. Two & a half years is a piss poor amount of time for something this expensive to just break for no reason.

persona: This customer prioritizes practicality, ease of use, and durability in baby products, values functional design and simple maintenance, and is drawn to affordable alternatives that match the performance of premium brands.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Really Nice Little Stroller We’ve only had this stroller since Christmas, so I can’t speak to it’s longevity, but we have really liked it so far. The back wheel locks are easy to turn on and off, and are really sturdy. It’s actually a pretty smooth ride, which surprised us, since umbrella strollers are notoriously difficult to steer. Folding the stroller up is quick and simple. The latch to keep the stroller folded up is a bit stiff, but it definitely keeps everything in place. The fabric pattern is cute, and the canopy seems durable, but we haven’t had to use it yet. Up to this point, it has been a great purchase.

Review 1: rating 5.0. Go buy it, or give yourself a headache, whichever OK, so we had another booster for our sons (13 months old) and it's not exactly a easy transport item. So in my attempt to get a booster seat that we could bring with us (since we are finally leaving the house with the boys after 13 months) I bought this x 2. Funny thing is...it was between this seat and the one we originally bought when we ended up buying the other. Don't tell him, but my husband's choice was right, mine was wrong.
Negatives: The eating tray that clicks on top of the bottom tray pops off pretty easily. Our little guys flings it off with ease, so we don't even use it. Fortunately, the "base tray" is easy to clean and works just as well. ... Review 10: rating 5.0. portable and easy Perfect for smaller babies. Our 10 month old sits in it just fine, and, its nice for grammy's house, since it doesn't take up a lot of room. Review 12: rating 4.0. Decent booster for the price It does it's job and nothing more. Secure and Easy to clean This is an absolutely excellent seat for infants and toddlers. It straps to the back and bottom of the chair so it's very secure. I'm glad I chose this booster seat over a high chair. Most of the time we eat at our counter-height kitchen table, but when we have guests we eat at a standard dinner table. Because this seat straps to the chair it works with both. When used as a booster, this seat has 3 height positions. It's easy to change between them.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. 100% mineral-based at a reasonable price, makes skin white Goes on fairly smoothly, but feels a little thick like most mineral-based sunscreen. Compare ingredients with the other boutique brands and save. High mineral content at 24% zinc oxide. We are an Asian family and it does make your skin look noticeably more "ghostly" (or is that ghastly?) Can be evened out with a bit of tan BB cream. Not a completely natural look, but in the last year  or so one of us developed a strong reacti...

Review 2: rating 1.0. Not what I expected... I have used this brand of sunscreen on my kids for years. I was excited to see they offered a more natural alternative. However, it was incredibly hard on my son’s skin. By the end of the weekend, which included 3 days of use, my son’s neck and face looked awful and were very painful. The back of his neck felt like sandpaper and was red and sensitive.  It’s taken nearly a week of constant moisturizing to get it looking normal. My daughter did not have the same ...

Review 3: rating 5.0. Great product I loved it.  My grandchildren wore it at the beach all day and no burns.  You can see a slight white tone on their skin which makes it easy to see it is still working.

Review 4: rating 5.0. Works Great This product has worked great and the price isn’t terrible compared to other similar products. It spreads easily! Great sun protection for my infant and no issues with tolerance on her skin.

Review 5: rating 5.0. Always go for zinc oxide As someone whose family spent a lot of time out in the sun when I was young, I have had a number of basal cells removed. I am now very careful outside and a bit of an expert on sunscreen.  You don't have to buy the most expensive, dermatologist recommended brand, but you do have to have a physical blocker like zinc oxide, and not a chemical blocker (which are in general no longer recommended by most dermatologists).  This one for sensitive skin won't cause an...

Review 6: rating 1.0. Wast of $ Got it today won't use it because its already open and top won't even close all the way looks like uts been used😡 wasted $

Review 7: rating 1.0. Do Not Buy The cap does not even stay on the bottle causing it to leak everywhere and making it impossible to put in the diaper bag. Poorly manufactured.

Review 8: rating 5.0. Runny, but protects baby skin well This product is a bit runny, but it covers very well when applied. It leaves a bit of a whitecast on the skin until fully absorbed. My little one did not sunburn after 1.5 hours outside (no clouds). Will repurchase.

Review 9: rating 3.0. Satisfied Although this package doesn't come with a preseal.. I noticed it was a little watery. It's been a while since I've used this so I can't compare but I wore it before putting it on my sun and had great results. Easy to spread, smells good, does the job.

Review 10: rating 1.0. Yuk! very thick and pasty, hard to spread on baby

Review 11: rating 1.0. No safety seal and looks used I highly recommend anyone with babies buy this in store instead. I wanted to avoid the stores with everything that’s happening so I purchased this much needed item because we play in the backyard/pool. It came with no safety or protective seal at all. I do not feel reassured that this product meant to be put on my baby hasn’t been tampered or manipulated with. For a product targeted for kids/babies you would think they would put some sort of protective s...

Review 12: rating 5.0. Awesome Awesome. A little goes a long way. Have to really rub into the skin or appears white. Perfect protection for my little one

Review 13: rating 5.0. IT IS ONE OF THE BEST FOR YOUR BABY! you have to rub this sunscreen in because due to the zinc which helps protect the skin will need a good rub. It will do the job!!

Review 14: rating 1.0. 4 year old broke out in hives My son had a horrible reaction to this sunscreen. Hours later he woke up in the middle of the night with hives where I applied it. It’s weird because the regular coppertone mineral baby and any mineral sunscreen he’s never reacted to.

Review 15: rating 2.0. Will dry out child’s skin Buyer beware. This sunscreen worked pretty good but it dried my child’s skin out horribly! Skin was so dry that it was scary looking and feeling. It took lots of TLC to get her skin back to normal. We did use it a lot for several days though when we rented a water slide.

Review 16: rating 1.0. Broken lid Broken bottle upon delivery. Had to dump into different container

Review 17: rating 5.0. Pricey, but it works This is pricy in my opinion, but for a mineral sunscreen I guess that is to be expected. I have family members with sensitive skin and it can be hard to find products that work on their skin. Although this still has benzoate as an ingredient, so far is has worked for my family. It is very runny so be careful when pouring it out. It comes out VERY fast and you only need a little bit to go a long way.

Review 18: rating 1.0. Recipe changed This stuff is terrible. I chose it based on the sensitive skin, water resistant, and the brand name of Coppertone. I tried it, re-applied twice through an afternoon of swimming as one normally does, and it didn't work at all. I got a bad burn, and on top of that, it dried out my skin and hair quite a bit. We also noticed it seemed to come off in our pool, and left visible a white ring around the liner. We noticed it on kids swim vests too. This stuff just is awful, and...

Review 19: rating 1.0. NO SUN PROTECTION. FRAUDULENT PRODUCT! NO SUN PROTECTION!  I got hives as I do when the sun burns my skin. Luckily I wasn’t out in the sun for more than half an hour but I am writing this to warn everyone there is absolutely NO sun protection in this product. There was no safety seal on it when I opened it. BUYER BEWARE!  My opinion is that it’s a fraudulent product.

Review 20: rating 4.0. Good protection Got this to get away from the chemical sun blocks. Works well, but difficult to spread.
persona: This customer prioritizes product safety and performance for sensitive skin or young children, values functional design that prevents discomfort or injury, and is willing to overlook minor flaws like packaging or non-essential features if the core purpose is fulfilled effectively.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Excellent sunscreen for all ages This is the first sunscreen I've used on my children's skin that doesn't irritate at all. It's a little more liquidy than other sunscreens we've used, and if it lays on its side of upside down (closed), sometimes spills. Yet, I'd give it 5 stars because we all of super sensitive skin and find summers hard because we haven't found any other sunscreens that work well and don't irritate our skin. This product is A+! (Perhaps needs better packaging)

The latch does not work properly. My 17 month old pushed on it once and it was open. She would have fell over and burst her face if I wasn't there to catch her. Very unsafe. I now have the gate tied, which means I have to step over every time I have to pass. I would have send it back except I already threw out the box. Review 4: rating 4.0. Watch for the small parts. It works well and is sturdy. If you have drywall make sure you get some anchors because I didn't have any arrive with mine. One side pulled out of the wall so it is now anchored differently. It came quicker than expected and was well packed except the screws were thrown into the box even though there was an included small baggie which was still sealed. All of them fell out onto the floor excepet for one that got lodged in the bottom of the box under a flap.... Review 5: rating 1.0. Already broken after 2 months use! So disappointed. So disappointed with this product. We have only used this for 2 months and I just discovered it's broken already! Ridiculous considering what I paid for it. Review 6: rating 5.0. Sturdy I love that it's sturdy unlike the plastic one I had prior to this.
It has a gate so no more taking a huge step over.
I use 3 to make a childproof area in my open living space. Review 7: rating 5.0. Great multi-purpose Gate! We ordered this gate to block off our family room from the rest of the house since that room acts as a play room for our daughter, and I ordered one for my mom to use as a free standing barrier to block off her stairwell. We both love this gate. I wasn't sure how sturdy it would be as a free standing gate but because it's so long you can fold up a few panels and it holds itself up pretty well. It does slide on the carpet a little bit but not hazardous at all... Review 8: rating 5.0. Real great product for active baby who loves to crawl and ... Real great product for active baby who loves to crawl and is learning to stand up. Safe to leave child while do house chores or just wanting to relax and watch tv. It's Really worth it. Review 9: rating 5.0. High in Value and Versatility, Low on Melodrama. This is a extremely versatile gate that is easy and fun to configure, especially between walls. It is built well enough, though not recommended for a maximum security prison. I felt like I received a whole lot of divider/gate for the money. The gate latch is also a good design.
Now I hate to pooh-pooh others well thought out 1 or 2 star reviews, but they are just silly. Not including wall anchors (find a stud or some excellent one... Review 10: rating 5.0. Great play yard for our needs With an active crawler and two older children, I wanted to ensure our littlest was in a safe place when our eyes couldn't be on her constantly. I put down a 6'x9' rug and set this in the center. There is plenty of room all the way around. It is very sturdy, easy for adults to open, and easy to move if needed. Make sure you use the red safety latch on the gate though because our 13 month old has figured out how to lift the lever if the red latch isn't in ... Review 11: rating 5.0. Five Stars Best ever for training new puppies. Wish I had one of these in years past. Review 12: rating 5.0. Five Stars Works great. Easy to shorten and install. Just use dry wall anchors which are not included. Review 13: rating 5.0. works like a charm because you can adjust it to fit ... We purchased this to keep our Bullmastiff puppy from leaving the living room area of our house, works like a charm because you can adjust it to fit the shape you need and it covers such a large area. Review 14: rating 3.0. Not enough wall mounts This is a great gate, just wasn't exactly perfect for our needs as a family.

They only send 2 wall mounts with the gate. But the gate has a lot of panels that can be separated, obviously you can't mount the other panels. So that is its biggest flaw. For the price I expected it to include more. But other then that it seems to be great. Review 15: rating 5.0. BEST GATE OUT THERE Best gate ever!!!! I bought two and connected them!! It's so easy to do and the gate is already assembled so set up time is like 5 minutes! Review 16: rating 1.0. but this product was a huge disappointment for me I have never left a review before, but this product was a huge disappointment for me. It does almost everything that it says. It is easily adjustable, it is lightweight, and it is easy to attach it to the walls. And it worked.... for five minutes. In the first five minutes of having it up, my twins were able to get past it. One figured out how to open the gate. The other, simultaneously, figured out how to unscrew the sections a... Review 17: rating 1.0. I bought two of these and both have been broken ... I bought two of these and both have been broken by a 14 month old 4 months after setup. They broke at the top plastic part. Review 18: rating 1.0. One Star IT WONT WORK WITH WHAT I EXPECTED TO USE Review 19: rating 5.0. Great gate We have an 80 lbs dog who gets into trouble when we are not home. Bought this to create a separate area where he can be in while we are not home. He hasn't jumped over it, he doesn't push it, the gate is great. The dog still gets into trouble but not because of the gate. The gate is easy to move around and put away. Very user friendly. The little door works well. Very happy with the gate, now just have to work on the dog. Review 20: rating 5.0. Excellent This yard is amazing. I had searched for ages to find a long enough 'gate' to use in my play area, which is about 12 feet wide from wall to wall. It was nearly impossible without spending a fortune for underrated products. I found this purely on accident and am SO glad I chose to purchase. It keeps my kids in the play area and yet is easy to open with one hand! It was simple to install on the walls and it works well free standing also. I highly recommend!
persona: This customer prioritizes clear product functionality and accurate descriptions, with little tolerance for confusing assembly requirements or missing hardware; they expect intuitive design and full transparency about installation constraints and included components.
reference_output: rating 3.0. Must remove panels 2 at a time. Gate only swings one way. Nice material, but the description made it sound like you could easily take out one panel or many. You can't. You have to remove 2 at a time and there isn't any direction on that.  If you need five panels, you have to make six fit, etc. It was highly obnoxious to try and figure this out. After I worked this out, I realized that it didn't come with mollies. So, you'll need some if you don't install it into a stud. Also, the gate only swing one way. After getting it fitted and installed correctly, it works quite well.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 1.0. Very low quality item Unfortunately, these are a low quality item that I won't recommend, at the first wash, gentle cycle by the way tear apart, returning it soon

Review 2: rating 1.0. One Star Both sheets tore along the seams within 6 weeks of purchase. Shoddy construction. Returned.

Review 3: rating 2.0. Thin & Cheap I was disappointed when I received this. It's not microfiber and was much thinner than I expected it to be. I decided to keep them because they're cheap, just for backup sheets. They were a bit softer after washing. I'm not sure why these have so many good reviews.

Review 4: rating 5.0. Super soft, neatly packed Came neatly folded in a cute bag, great for gifting. I love how soft these sheets are and how easy they are to clean. They fit perfectly on standard crib mattress. Only negative was one of the sheets has some strings that were loose and seem to be unraveling on the inside of the sheet. Could be a fluke as the other sheet doesn't have this problem.

Review 5: rating 1.0. Elastic gone after one wash I washed these sheets per the tag guidelines (delicate cycle) right after receiving them so I could use them on my babe's crib mattress. One wash and I went to put the gray cover on the mattress and there was no elasticity left. Now it's useless. Normally I have been happy with TILLYOU products so this was a disappointment. The other set I purchased (two blue covers) so far has been fine, so it might just be a defective item.

Review 6: rating 4.0. I like them, but they are very thin I bought these in gray & white, and pink & floral. The colors are very good, the fabric is soft. The only thing that I didn't care for was how thin they are. They are pretty much see-through when you put them on the mattress.

Review 7: rating 2.0. Not what was intended. Not really any softer than most basic sheets. I was hoping to get something smooth like microfiber not average cotton blend.

Review 8: rating 5.0. Comfy sheets! I bought these for the Graco 6” dual crib mattress and they fit perfect! They are super soft and comfy! My baby sleeps comfortably in his crib with these sheets. They are also easy to clean. My little one spit up and I washed the sheets in the normal setting and I either air dry it or put it on the low heat setting. These sheets have gone in the wash plenty of times and they still look new and are feel super soft!

Review 9: rating 1.0. cheap washed twice and the stitching has come out in one corner.

Review 10: rating 5.0. Great quality, would recommend These are great, especially for the price! I purchased two different 2-packs of crib sheets that were in the same price range and I returned the others and am keeping these. The quality is great, they come in nice packaging, don’t have any weird smells and you can’t beat the price. I would definitely recommend these, I’ll be purchasing another set myself.

Review 11: rating 1.0. Not very soft Not the soft micro fiber material that you see in other products. Just feels like regular sheets

Review 12: rating 2.0. I guess not washer friendly Put them in the washer one time and came out with holes :(

Review 13: rating 5.0. DOG OWNERS GET THESE SHEETS!! I HIGHLY RECOMMEND FOR DOG OWNERS looking for a sheet to cover their crib mattresses!!! As a canine behaviorist, I stoped buying dog beds years ago (for multiple reasons). I use only infant crib mattresses because they are easy to sterilize AND provide excellent joint support for my dogs YEAR ROUND (not too hot in warmer months and can be loaded with blankets for warmth around the edges in the colder months). But I really needed sheets that actually fit ...

Review 14: rating 5.0. Super soft, fits perfect! I got the grey and white set, but we're using the grey ones right now. Im 6 months pregnant so I dont have a baby to put it to the test yet, but when shes born ill give an update! They are extremely soft and fit my Graco crib mattress perfectly. Ill end up buying more of this brand! 💕

Review 15: rating 4.0. Good product Very soft, washed multiple times already and it maintained elasticity and still easy to put on mattress. Keeps baby dry.

Review 16: rating 4.0. They were just crib sheets I have triplet granddaughters and it nice to find a reasonably priced crib sheet. These did the job and I do not have to worry, I have back up sheets now. Thanks for making life easier.

Review 17: rating 4.0. It’s a crib sheet Not as soft as I expected them to be but they get the job done. Great fit on the mattress and they clean up well. It’s going to be perfect for the hot summer coming up
persona: This customer prioritizes functionality, durability, and thoughtful design in products for children and parenting needs, values quality and performance over price despite being open to budget-friendly options, and is highly responsive to product improvements and customer service resolution, often adjusting their perception and loyalty based on post-purchase experience.
reference_output: rating 1.0. Poor quality Just washed them for the first time and both of sheets are coming apart at the seams on all sides. These will definitely not last. I'll invest my money in better quality sheets. Returning.

I believe my doorway is right around 49 inches (possibly 47.5) and this fit great with the extensions in. It was easy to install by myself. I bought it for 4 and 5 lbs petite dogs so I don't even hook the handle (handle is very secure) I just leave it set closed/unlatched. I'm not sure how sturdy it would be using pressure mounted with a large dog or child. Space between bars is small enough my dogs can't get through. Review 6: rating 1.0. I now have gotten two and both can not close The gate has a gap of 2 inch on the bottom and 4 on top. The latch does not even come close to lock. Don’t buy Doesn’t even fit the bottom of my wide stair case, two of the holes to mount the gate weren’t threaded so it wouldn’t even have worked if it did fit. Review 8: rating 1.0. Hard to install and latch did not work! This gate once installed the latch did not work correctly and was not secure. Tried to install for two hour with was unsuccessful! This is going in a lake house. Review 14: rating 1.0. Flimsy, toddler already figured out how to open this gate This product became loose over time and is now not functional. Review 15: rating 3.0. We have the old regalo easy step with the handle that has buttons you pinch to unlock and it automatically locks behind you. That model gate is awesome so I was looking for one that would fit the width of our entryway and ordered this one as the other style doesn't come wide enough.

I read many reviews about it fitting particular widths and chose this one based off of reviewers saying... Review 16: rating 5.0. Attractive, sturdy gate My husband & I installed it easily. We use the gate at the bottom of the stairs to keep our small dogs from going upstairs. The gate is easy to open (for an adult), and it swings open smoothly. Review 17: rating 3.0. I read in one of the reviews and agree that each extension makes the gate overall weaker. It has a little bulge at the connections that didn’t shift no matter where I placed the extension (I tried both on the hinge side as suggested by the instructions and then one on either side). This is probably something that can’... Review 18: rating 3.0. Buy a wooden 10$ gate!! This gate would have been perfect EXCEPT if you have a 42” doorway.. it’s hard to see in the picture but I had to slant this gate to make it somewhat work. By doing so it’s not sturdy. So when my daughter starts to walk or crawl I’m going to have to buy a different gate. So don’t waste your money if you have an inbetween door size!!! Unfortunately I don’t have the patience to return this. 10/10 would not buy again Review 19: rating 1.0. Keep looking for a different gate We received the wrong color and when we opened up the box it was missing the belt necessary to assemble. Disappointing. Review 20: rating 1.0. persona: This customer values affordability, aesthetic appeal, and durability in a product, prioritizing a strong balance between price and quality, and is drawn to items that offer visible design quality and functional safety features at a fraction of premium brand costs.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Good product for price! Nice looking and good quality. Have been using this for a month now with my new crawler. It has survived my 3 and 5 year old as well! Very sturdy, nice looking, and I like the way it latches in two areas for safety. Would absolutely buy again!

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Great for small summer babies My premature daughter was too small for her car seat and the regular stroller seat -- but it was too hot to use the carrier. This product was perfect. What sets it apart is the wedge that boosts her up in the seat, and the wicker side that stays nice and cool in the summer. We are finally free to go out and enjoy the summer! Review 2: rating 4.0. Should have gotten the carseat adapter I chose this over the carseat adapter for use with my newborn, because I didn't want my baby spending too long in the car seat. Now I know better! Taking a sleeping infant out of a carseat to place in a stroller is a bad idea! This product has been good for her when walking directly from the house, so hopefully I will be able to get more use out of it before she gets too big. The insert itself is great, just consider what you'll be needing b... Review 3: rating 4.0. Great for Newborn I got this for my Uppababy Cruz so that I could lay it in the flat position to mimic a bassinet. Somehow I thought it would create a flat surface for her entire body, but it doesn't! Her legs are still bent in the sitting position, though her back is flat.

I still like it, even now that she is 9 months old! I've just taken off the head cushion/frame about a month ago and keep the rest in as a soft stroller liner. Eventually I will take the wedge out too,... Review 4: rating 4.0. Works in Rumble Seat We needed a double stroller for our nanny share, and we already had the Uppababy Vista and Rumble Seat. The babies are both 3 months old, and the Rumble seat says not to use with children under 6 months. I decided to see if this insert would work, and it did! Note: my 3mo does have unusually good neck/head control for his age, but I still say go for it. Certainly saved us a bundle not having to buy another $300 stroller! Review 5: rating 5.0. Works great with our Cruz! This SnugSeat insert is very useful when using the stroller with babies - there's a small cushion that fills the sharp angle under the baby's bottom. The fabric is very nice and comfy and the head cushion holds the head in place. Definitely worth getting it if your baby still can't sit unassisted.
Check out my detailed review + pictures at www[dot]BamboolaBaby[dot]wordpress[dot]com - Category: Reviews. Review 6: rating 4.0. Works well with Uppababy Toddler Seat Fits the UppaBaby Vista well, good quality and looks nice too. The triangular corners near the bottom tend to get folded/bent in sometimes, but really not a big deal. Definitely recommend for good lumbar and head support for your baby. Mine didn't like his bassinet and is tall, so we moved to the toddler seat fast and this snug seat made it work perfectly for him. You can remove the padded headrest when your baby gets too tall. Great buy! Review 7: rating 5.0. Infant insert perfect for small babies This insert is great for our little one - born at 6.5 lbs. She snuggles right into it. It was easy to install with the Uppababy directions. Review 8: rating 5.0. so comfortable! i wasn't going to buy this at first (where do you stop with all of the extras?!) but in the end, my son hated his car seat so i went for it. he loves how cozy and snuggly it is and now we can actually use our stroller and go on long walks together. Review 9: rating 5.0. AMAZING using this with my cruz and my baby loves it. he has used it since he was a newborn and it is soo comfy. he used to sleep in this rather than his bassinet, so happy i bought this with the cruz instead of the massive, heavy vista! Review 10: rating 5.0. Great infant insert. This is great. I bought this for my Vista as I had started to exercise and the seat was too big for my 3 month old. I had used his car seat in pram but being black is was getting way too hot in the texas summer heat and baby was ending up drenched in sweat.

This has a great moisture wicking side, and a warm fluffy side. It is super comfortable, and molded to fit the vista perfectly. The infant headrest is a little on the small side, so we haven't reall... Review 11: rating 4.0. OKAY I like the infant seat because I was able to use the stroller since my son was born. He fits better in the insert now that he's two months. He seemed uncomfortable when he was smaller. The head piece could be a little wider. My son does not have a big head and the pillow seems to sit under his head verses on the sides to keep his head in place. Review 12: rating 5.0. Because of this insert my newborn was able to fit ... Because of this insert my newborn was able to fit properly in the Cruz. When it was "North Dakota" cold, it also gave her a little extra warmth. Review 13: rating 5.0. great product! if you have the uppa baby vista and plan on using it as a double stroller with the rumble seat this would be a must have as you need to put your newborn into the seat. great product! Review 14: rating 5.0. Well made and comfortable for my little girl Well made and comfortable for my little girl Review 15: rating 3.0. Eh. Annoying to install on my Cruz. Really isn't anything special and does not make the seat "almost flat" as one review ever stated. It mostly serves it function but overall, not worth $35. If you have to buy it to put your infant into your Vista or Cruz and don't want to buy the bassinet because its also overpriced, then it's okay for what it's for. But your baby will not lay anywhere close to flat. It just lines the seat to keep them from bouncing around too much. Even the... Review 16: rating 2.0. Very disappointed. I bought this for my 4 month old to use in our Uppababy Vista since she kept falling to the side. The head support is so small that she looks extremely uncomfortable and I don't see how I'll be able to use it for more than another 2 weeks or so. Very disappointed. Review 17: rating 5.0. Works great This has been working great for my five month old. He would be swimming a little in the regular seat. This provides some nice extra cushioning. He is already way too big for the head part but you can easily leave that off. Review 18: rating 5.0. Very nice! Very nice quality!! It doesn't say its made for the UPPAbaby G-Luxe but it defiantly fits it! Only down side is it doesn't shut well with it in, you have to remove it (for the G-Luxe). I am excited to use it! I love that it has one side breathable for hot weather and the other side is plush for cold weather.
persona: This customer values functional compatibility and secure attachment in product design, prioritizing reliability and ease of use over price, and is likely to seek products that enhance safety and convenience during infant care.
reference_output: rating 4.0. We love it for our newborn and started using it when ... Compatible with the 2015 Uppababy Vista. We love it for our newborn and started using it when she was 2 weeks old. However, we also rolled up Muslin blankets on the sides to keep her more secure.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 3.0. Disappointed these appear to be replacing Amazon basics Pretty disappointing. Couldn’t figure out why we were running out of wipes and then I realized that the Amazon basics brand no longer existed so my subscribe and save was automatically canceled. Went to figure out what I could replace it with and thought these would be the same thing with a different name... definitely not! Pretty dry and kind of remind me of Huggies wipes but they don’t fall apart as easily. They are not soft t... Review 2: rating 1.0. Great wipes when they're all there! We order these wipes every month, but this month they came with only 5 instead of 6 packs. Mama Bear, we want all the wipes we can get! Review 3: rating 5.0. These baby wipes are strong and perfect art tools. Baby wipes are a staple for anyone with a butt, and for anyone who does art. I recommend them for both uses, as well as little emergencies when time is of the essence and you don't want to run to the kitchen to grab a wet rag. Review 4: rating 1.0. NOT for sensitive skin My daughter has extremely sensitive skin and reacts quickly when things go wrong.
We have been using these wipes for a couple weeks now and she broke out into a rash immediately, I’ve used every diaper cream in the books and as we continue to use these wipes she continues to get worse.
Leaves me with no option but to assume it’s these wipes with all the unnecessary ingredients that caused her to break out so intensely. Seriously, read the ingredients,... Review 5: rating 1.0. Do not buy These used to be good but since Amazon has changed their wipes these SUCK. They are super dry and rough on baby’s skin. I bought a bunch thinking they would be as good as the old ones but they are terrible now. So bad that I am going to throw them out and buy a different brand! Review 6: rating 1.0. I really wanted to love these, but within two days of us using these, he broke out in his nether regions. Upon switching back to the other products his skin began to clear again. Nothing different in our diet or routine to suggest another alternative. Also had a scent to the wipes, I was expecting no real scent, had to wash my hands afterwards. Also felt like... They are also pretty dry which i feel defeats the purpose of being water wipes. I tend to purchase the pampers pure wipes as they are the best i have come across and their package is better than the water wipes brand for on the go. Review 9: rating 2.0. Not worth the value These aren’t wet enough. And when you pull them out the next wipe is half out which then gets even more dried out. Have to use more wipes each time as a result. Review 10: rating 1.0. To many ingredients Still gave my little one a rash :( Review 11: rating 5.0. Water wipes are great I love these wipes my son does too when I first introduced him to these he seemed to calm down and I just ordered some more because how well and improved his skin has gotten from regular wipes to using water wipes Review 12: rating 3.0. Underwhelmed Was hoping these would compare to Water Wipes but they have way more ingredients & wipes are not soft. Review 16: rating 2.0. Too wet. Great wipe for sensitive infant's bottom My son is 2 months and poops a lot and the other sensitive skin wipes would cause his behind to turn very red and raw. I was constantly airing out his behind, using water and dry wipes, only for it to happen again after using the sensitive skin wipes for a few days.

So I chose this as a cheaper alternative to water wipe and its great! My son's skin is still very sensigive so these... Review 18: rating 5.0. One pack of wipes for $17 Description said pack of 6, we received a pack of 1. Review 20: rating 1.0. Ordered 2, received 1 I love this product but I ordered 2 6-packs and only received one of the orders. Annoyed because I can’t figure out how to contact Amazon about this.
persona: This customer values affordability and practical performance, especially for sensitive skin, and is willing to trade premium features for cost savings, but expects reliable functionality and durability.
reference_output: rating 4.0. Decent As far as Wipes go they’re nice my children don’t have super sensitive skin but they seem to do OK for them I couldn’t tell you if they’re great for kids who are super sensitive you do get what you pay for so keep that in mind

reviews:
Review 1: rating 4.0. Where to order replacement latch. I like the appearance and function of this gate, which I use to keep my darling Yorkies out of the kitchen. Unfortunately, I received a faulty latch with my order. It latched properly in one direction, but bounced away from the latch in the other direction, no matter how softly or aggressively the swing. I made the unwise assumption that it would probably loosen up with use. It has not, and in fact, at six months from purchase date, it reached the po... Review 2: rating 2.0. difficult to install. I have a feeling that I could spend the next two years adjusting these gates every day and they still would not close right. I hate these gates. They do close and lock though, hence two stars not one. They are difficult to use. Difficult to adjust, fairly impossible to install. Review 3: rating 4.0. Decent wide metal gate We needed a metal gate so our terrier wouldn't chew through it. It also needed to be wide and tall, for separating the kitchen from the living room but not in a standard doorway. This one works for us in this capacity. persona: This customer values practicality, reliability, and versatility in products, prioritizing functional design and multi-use capabilities over brand or price, and is likely to purchase items that solve specific everyday challenges with consistent performance and ease of use.
reference_output:
rating 5.0. Rolling my eyes at the one star reviews... We have two of these seats for our daughter, one in each vehicle. They are great, albeit heavy. I read a couple of the one star reviews before purchasing and they are just ridiculous! I would say "people are dumb" but that would probably keep my review from posting. It was easy to install, easy to adjust, and easy to get her in and out of. One minor annoyance that we've run into is that the straps do tend to twist quite a bit.

One note on the LATCH installation being complicated/difficult. The lower anchors were only included because federal law mandates it. Actually using the lower anchors was purposefully made to be difficult to encourage attaching it with the seat belt instead (which is really easy!) becuase the seat allows for a child to rear face up to a higher weight than the anchors in the car are rated for.

The cup is a hard plastic & the top has a silicone "lid" the baby sucks on to get the liquid out. It's very lightweight so it didn't bother him when he hit himself on the face with it playing. Should your baby roll around and possibly roll his head, there isn't that much cushion to protect from a hard surface underneath such as tile, etc... Review 12: rating 5.0. One of my favorite things ever I love love love this! I highly recommend this! I would even lie down with him under it and sing the songs to him! Oh how time flies :(( Review 13: rating 5.0. In love ! This gym is the best. I personally think this is one of these nicest play mats on the baby market. Its very colorful, soft, lots of hanging toys, many little loops to connect toys from hanging up top and round the mat itself. Super easy to put together and break down. Plays music, I think 3 songs but don't remember. My daughter is a newborn and she likes to listen to the music right now. reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. The best little chair! Wanted a chair for my 6 m old to sit in when going to the beach this summer. Perfect little chair to use there!! It’ll also be great to use when traveling and camping. Love that it also has a tray! Review 2: rating 5.0. So easy!! So easy to set up and put away. I bought two for my twins so they have somewhere to eat when we go to other peoples houses. Also perfect for eating lunch on the porch or at a picnic! Overall great to have especially if your baby prefers to feed himself. Review 3: rating 1.0. Very filmsy product , not durable Very filmsy
Parts are falling apart after 10day of usage.
Will not recommend this. Review 4: rating 2.0. Terrible Daughter is 10 months and 20lbs... I out her in this chair and she slouched like a limp piece of bacon. I returned it. Love the compact design but not durable Update 4/5/23: we reached out to the company and were sent a replacement cover, which we have been using for just under a year now with no issues at all despite putting up with a much more mobile child. :)

We've been using the chair for just over a week and love how easy it is to take with us on the go, but it's already tearing. I'm disappointed with the durability 😞 Review 8: rating 1.0. The tray latches broke and small pieces of plastic fell under my 19 month. Not recommended When I received this item I was excited because at first blush it seemed like a good product. I strapped it to a large chair with the included straps and it felt secure. We used it only to feed our baby and give him snacks. Even with this very light usage he turned and the fabric ripped on the side, which was frustrating but not the end of the world.

Next when my son pushed up agains... Review 9: rating 5.0. Perfect for outside! My LO and I LOVE this chair! It’s a must have if you travel or spend time outside with little ones.

My 11month old fits great in it and we will be able to use it for years to come.
The tray is awesome and perfect for meals outside or when a high chair isn’t accessible.
I also love the anti tip feet.
Very sturdy and easy to wipe clean.
Set ups and folds down in seconds and fits right back into the carry bag. Review 10: rating 5.0. Easy for 'on the go' I LOVE this seat!! I had a highchair cover with our older child and while I really liked it, this chair provides a tray area where he can touch without having to touch the table. He can still reach the table to touch it but this is SO much better as a barrier and as an area for him to eat off of without me having to sanitize every place we go. It's very sturdy for setting up on the restaurant chairs, tables, or the floor. When considering buying a second highcha... Review 11: rating 1.0. Difficult to use the security straps It is nearly impossible to push in the tabs on the straps that secure the chair. We tried and tried and hurt our hands. Also, the straps on the side don't go under the chair to meet on the other side--so short as to be useless. The picture must be misleading as it appears that straps go under the chair on the sides. Review 12: rating 5.0. Exceeded my Expectations Ordered this chair to take on vacation with us to use as a travel high chair, didn’t think I would use it for anything else. Once it came in the mail I was totally impressed, not only can it be used had a high chair for feeding but it can also be a little seat you can use on the beach or for whatever other outdoor/out of the house activities that involve the baby. Very happy I purchased this! Review 13: rating 2.0. Not of good quality!!! Not of good quality!!! The tray is difficult to take out. I used this for about 5 weeks and it completely stopped opening after being folded. Review 15: rating 5.0. Perfect travel highchair Bought this for a weekend camping and it worked great! (However, It does come with straps to be used with a chair for better stability) You do need to stay close if you have it freestanding to make sure child doesn't tip over but it is more sturdy than I thought it was going to be. Glad I purchased... Review 16: rating 2.0. I liked it but..... The tray does not remove easily. It's quite a struggle and with it being plastic, I'm sure only a matter of time before it breaks. Review 17: rating 1.0. Hopefully just a flaw in the nylon. This material poked thru the top after 6 uses..It should last longer than 6 uses.. Review 18: rating 3.0. Great for traveling, but really difficult to keep clean This chair is great for traveling, it's lightweight, easy to set up and fold back up. We haven't found a chair it isn't able to buckle to. The biggest issue is that it's really difficult to clean. The canvas material is pretty coarse, so food gets smeared into it and you can't really wipe it off easily. You either have to let it soak for a while then come back with a rag and lots of water, or use a hose/pressure washer outside ... Review 19: rating 5.0. Amazing! Love this product! It has made my life with three little ones so much easier. I was able to bring it to the park today and have my littlest sit in it while I helped the others swing and slide. We will be bringing it on vacation for the beach & balcony sitting. It helps a busy mom like me so so much! I can’t say enough good things about it! Review 20: rating 4.0. Our toddler loves this chair Overall, we're very happy with the Hiccapop Travel Booster! Our two-year-old had been getting very unhappy with his wooden high chair, saying the hard seat hurt his legs. But he LOVES this booster and continually asks for it and tries to get it out, continually wanting to practice buckling the straps. So far we've used it freestanding on the floor while we sit near him, and it is very sturdy and doesn't tip over. But it looks like it would work well as a ...

reference_output: rating 5.0. Best travel booster Best little chair for taking to friend's houses, restaurants, trips, you name it! The gate itself pops onto the anchor posts and locks into place, but there are small, virtually child-proof tabs you can release easily to allow the gate to be taken off the anchors on either one wall or both, allowing you to swing the entire gate out of the walkway, or even remove it ent... Review 1: rating 4.0. Great product with one flaw... I bought this as a mother's day gift for use with my 8 month old. The 'clay' was soft (like Play-dough) & easy to roll out, which was great considering it took 5 tries to get a decent hand print thanks to a squirming child. Be sure your child's hand is clean otherwise it will leave little bits of whatever in the mold.

The major problem I had with this was the piece of plastic you're supposed to use as a cutting ring. It is a single strand ... Review 2: rating 2.0. Very disappointed in this product I was really hoping to get a nice impression of my daughter's hand. Unfortunately, this product left something to be desired. I couldn't get a smooth finish; the rolling pin is too small, so the ends of it leave lines on the material. The impression material never fully hardened, so it will likely look worse with time. The shaping ring is actually a straight piece of plastic that can be made into a circle. The problem, however, is that in the bo... Review 3: rating 2.0. hard to use I found this very hard to use. The "dough" was very sticky and like a foam more than cement. It was very difficult to use the shaping tool to make a circle. I ended up just forming it myself. Also - once dry - it's not very hard. I can still bend the shape and it has a bend mark from when i tried to pick it up from the drying surface. Review 4: rating 1.0. Way too soft First of all, do not think you'll be able to get a baby's handprint. Most babies keep their hand balled up and will refuse to open it. Even when I forced her hand open, she proceeded to grab a chunk of the clay upon pulling her hand back off. Got an okay footprint. But even after the full drying process, the product is very soft and can be scratched easily with a fingernail. I don't see how this would last a long time as a keepsake or ornament unless you treat it ve... Review 5: rating 5.0. awwwww Very cute and easy to use as long as the baby cooperates. I've got two daughters that we've used these for grandma and I've used them at home too. It works pretty well overall. I can't seem to make salt dough to save my life, so these being a premade mix is great. The "rolling pin" really sucks tho - it needs to be at least two inches wider. When you wet your childs hand tho, we just put their hands under the running faucet, shook their hand to get excess water off, and pressed it into the mold and h... Review 7: rating 2.0. yuck. I had purchased this item in a store and had great success with it so ignored the reviews and bought it here. Mistake! It was like a totally different product, didn't work at all and looks terrible. I did the exact same thing as I did the first time so I know it isn't user error. Review 9: rating 5.0. LOVE IT! o I never write reviews but feel I must on this product. This time I bought these "Pearhead Babyprints Keepsake". This is very unfortunate because I used it for my grandson's first birthday. The material was bubbly and although you could, at first, see the imprints, when it dried you can no longer see his hand or foot. There is no way to replace his first birthday's prints, and he l... Review 11: rating 1.0. dissapointed I followed all directions per the box and it did not turn out. Once I had my sons print in it and allowed it to dry- the print almost completly dissapeared. All you can now see is the tips of where his fingers were- nothing else. I would not purchase again. Review 12: rating 1.0. Don't do it!! This is the worst thing ever! I bought it, followed all the directions and made my sons print. And when I went to bed, the print was there and drying and when I woke up, the print is gone! Your better off making the mold at home. You know the fluffy clay stuff for kids. It was soft enough to knead and get a good print, but after it sat for about an hour it became noticeable that it was "fluff... I've tried these before in the past and they always worked out just fine, but when I bought a new set to make a hand print for my new son, I was really disappointed in the results. I don't know if they changed this somehow, but after getting a good looking print and setting it out to dry, I noticed the next day that it had risen to the point that the hand print was barely visible anymore. The old... Review 15: rating 1.0. If you want a stone like texture this is not it This product is like a marshmallow. I know I'm going to love being able to see how small his hands were when he's much older. ...
