persona: This customer prioritizes functional reliability and accurate product representation, rejecting items that fail to deliver on core promises or mislead through misleading imagery, and is willing to return products despite price, especially when they perceive poor value or safety risks.
reference_output:
rating 1.0. Plastic leash slips off easily -- UNSAFE PRODUCT THIS IS NOT A SAFE PRODUCT!!! I'd like to give this 0 stars. The latch on the leash came off when my son was in the parking lot and I had luggage I was struggling to get in to car (6mo pregnant, on a west to east coast trip by myself with 23mo son -- really needed an extra pair of hands or a leash that WORKED). The problem is that the latch is cheap plastic, not even as nice as the metal pull down latch on pet leashes. Because of that, its prone to getting tangled in the plastic anchor that is on the chest band and slipping off, especially if you have an active child running around with it for a while. My son was running circles around me in the car rental store, we went to the car and I was putting luggage in when the leash slipped out and he ran right out from between cars into the parking lot while I was screaming and dropped luggage and nearly tripped trying to get him. Thankfully no cars were coming through but it was a busy lot and he could have been hit. TERRIBLE. They should put a higher quality latch on the leash part, one that does not so easily slip off.

Also, this is NOT an easy product to get on a toddler or to adjust to the size. I agree with others, the toddler in the photo has a turtle neck on, otherwise her neck would be rubbed raw. The straps do not adjust in enough places to help it fit well. The velcro is really hard to get it to line up well so that it velcros enough and is secure, snaps or a loop to loop it through and then velcro to secure would have been better.

My overall take is that this is a good product that took too many short cuts, too cheap, made too many bad decisions for cheap construction that ultimately render it frustrating and unsafe to use. I will probably just sew my own, to my liking and fit, for my toddler -- and it will be safer and better.

rating 5.0. Great safety for toddler safety; tip for those with metal/magnetic handles These are great and work well to prevent my active toddler from opening cabinets and drawers full of knives, cleaning chemicals, etc.

One tip: when I first installed, my metal knobs were keeping the locks from “locking”. I was ready to return the product. In a moment of genius (sarcasm), I moved the safety lock about 3-4 inches away from the knob and it worked perfectly.

I’m glad these worked out for us and can rest a little easier with my curious and adventurous toddler.

rating 5.0. Why is this the only one of its kind ... Omg wish I would of broke down and bought this sooner. I have an older car with no headrests in the backseat. That stupid suction mirror we got when I gave birth was always moving on its own while we drove. Not this one!!! Only time it moves is if I hit it while putting the baby in the car seat.

***update*** years later I have now passed it onto a friend. It is truly an amazing mirror. We both love it. Doesn't move, fits well with or without a headrest, in a car or truck. Worth every penny.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 1.0. Not so good This product was low  quality and I don't think it was real wood

Review 2: rating 5.0. Very happy, will be ordering more soon so all my ... Lovely gate. So much prettier than my ugly white cheap-o gate. Much more functional too! Definitely worth the money. Holds tight and withstands my german shepherd jumping and pushing on it. Tall enough so he won't ever be able to clear it. Very happy, will be ordering more soon so all my dog-free zones will be sectioned off by matching gates.

We bought it as a pet gate, and unfortunately, my 9 week old golden retriever puppy got his head stuck between the gate and the side panel in less than 3 minutes.  Perhaps in a few weeks we'll be safe, but not now.

Review 5: rating 5.0. LOVE this gate! I LOVE this gate!  We have a very hyper dog that we try to keep on the first level of our home.  This gate makes it super convenient to have the stairway gated off all of the time!!

It's also plenty wide and nice that it's tall enough for my boxer not to be able to climb over it.

Review 11: rating 5.0. Gate Looks and Works Great. We just installed this handsome gate!  It keeps my 10-month-old grand son from crawling down the hall to his auntie's and cousin's rooms which are not baby-proofed.  The door opening mechanism is a little hard for my 5-year-old grand son to operate.  It seems sturdy for now, just with our using the spring-loaded rods with rubber wall cups. It can be mounted with screws onto the wall.  I love that the rods are individually adjustable, a must with large base...

Review 12: rating 5.0. works and looks wonderful I retrofitted it into a dog gate that looks nice and it works greats.  ( see pics)  I added a 2"x2 frame extension on outside.  I had to do that in order to prevent the door knob and handle from hitting the gate.  The only negative is that the opening is a little too narrow..  A couple inches more would make a difference.

Review 13: rating 5.0. Very pleased with this gate. We have 3 different style gates in our home and this is our favorite. It's easy to install, easy to use (not so easy that a small child can operate it but easy enough that I don't have to fumble around with it to get it open), sturdy, and blends in better with our decor. I like that once my little one goes to bed the gate can stay open no problem. The gate opening is about 16.5 inches so it may not be the best option for all body types.

Review 14: rating 5.0. looks great, gets lots of compliments Fits my wall, looks great, gets lots of compliments, sturdy, did not damage sheet rock or paint.

Review 15: rating 5.0. Excellent! This gate is by far the best purchase I have made for my 120 pound malamute.  I need to keep him out of the living room, and need a gate that can be both tall enough and sturdy enough to prevent him from getting past or through it.  This gate is tall and deters my dog from wanting to jump over it.  I have the gate in a doorway that I didn't want to put screws into, so I am using it as a pressure mount gate.  It hasn't budged a bit since the day I put it in, even with my do...

Review 16: rating 4.0. Nice but could use a few design improvements. The gate is a very nice upgrade from the old wooden baby gate I've been using to keep my dog in the kitchen area. I had to move it to a smaller walk through area because even with the expansion pieces and pressure mounts, it would not extend the full amount I needed, without it being unstable. It's very sturdy in the smaller doorway, with only one expansion piece and the pressure mount screws only about 1-2" from frame. It's easy for ...

Review 17: rating 3.0. Not good for large, strong dogs It's a nice gate, but not strong enough for a large dog, once the extensions are used. It weakens the structure and allows the dog to push them right out of place.

Review 18: rating 4.0. This is a great item and works to keep my yorkie out of ... This is a great item and works to keep my yorkie out of spaces I don't want him in. The only complaint is the door is too small of an opening. I am not a large person, but I have to turn sideways to go through. A large person would have trouble.

Review 19: rating 2.0. Two Stars Not adjustable for the door frame and when we received it, the product was bent.

Review 20: rating 2.0. I would have absolutely loved this if it had been a normal width This gate is much prettier than others, but the gate walkway is SO narrow. It's only about 16 inches wide. I would have absolutely loved this if it had been a normal width. I'm by no means a large person and I felt I could barely get through the gate without catching on the sides.
persona: This customer prioritizes functional usability and intuitive design in everyday products, especially those used frequently like gates and high chairs, and is willing to overlook minor flaws if the overall performance meets practical needs.
reference_output: rating 2.0. Latching Problems Only opens in one direction.  Does not close easily; you need to manipulate the latch to lock it closed.  This may not sound too bad, but it becomes very annoying each time you walk through the gate.  You should be able to simply swing the gate closed behind you like any other door latches behind you.  The opening is very small, and I'm not a large man.

Review 14: rating 5.0. Good product!! Like other reviewers, I removed the silver top-- totally unnecessary!! Works great, though.  Just as expected!!  Super easy to install!!

persona: This customer prioritizes practicality, functionality, and durability in products designed for toddlers, especially those supporting potty training, mobility, and safety during travel. They value versatile, easy-to-use solutions that integrate seamlessly with existing items, such as car seats or changing tables, and are willing to purchase accessories that enhance usability—even if they require extra setup or compatibility checks—provided the product delivers reliable performance and long-term value.
reference_output: rating 4.0. Britax Marathon 70-G3 We love our sons car seat but the no cup holders was a big con. I was hesitant on ordering the Britax cup holder after reading some reviews that the cup holder wouldn't fit. However, we really needed something so I gave in and ordered it. When it arrived I was grateful that it did indeed come with 2 different pieces to attach to the different styles of Britax seats. Our car seat needed the black attachment to install the cup holder. It took me a little bit but I finally attach the clip we needed to the cup holder but once it was on I was able to easily snap it into place on the car seat. The seat cover pulls down just enough to cover the clip. The cup holder feels a little less secure since the car seat is so tightly secured into place but it seems to work fine. As other reviewers mentioned I also did not install the cup holder with the extra gray part that is supposed to keep the cup from moving around. I felt like it just was gonna pop off. Overall this cup holder seems to work out great. I hope this review was helpful.

After about 6 weeks, the colored lights quit working, only the "daytime" light works now. We don't use it any longer due to this. Review 3: rating 1.0. Didn’t last very long It’s very cute but unfortunately it fell apart super fast! Poorly made. The colors don’t work anymore. Only lasted fully functional for about a month. Very disappointed. Looking it up is how I found that hitting B would eventually turn it off. Sometimes hitting it hundreds of times (no exaggeration) before it turns off. Music sometimes stays on, sometimes only plays one song and stops.
Directions, power switch, and volume control would be a big help. Review 6: rating 2.0. Motor issues, and breaks easily Bought this in November 2018, 6 months in and the part that spins is broken and has stopped spinning. The colors also want to work when they want to ever since the shell broke, motor stalls out as well. Review 7: rating 1.0. Junk Fresh out of the box, the globe is smashed. Box states USB charge. There is not a USB port. There is a DC 5V port. Does not come with charging cord. Also states this package contains important information. It contains no information Review 8: rating 1.0. However if you plan to leave it plugged up it’s great! Not a fan of the music part though. Sometimes it doesn’t work. Review 13: rating 1.0. Doesn't cover the whole mattress Positive: The designs are cute.
Negative: The material doesn’t cover the sides of the mattress so you see the mattress through the crib. Not what I prefer. (Our mattress is average size and my husband doesn’t have a big hand for reference.)
Also, the material is pretty thin, but not too thin. It should last for a little while, hopefully. It’s also not as soft as most jersey knits, but it’s ok. Review 5: rating 5.0. Best baby sheets ever I love these sheets. They’re soft like a t-shirt material, and are durable. I’m not sure what other reviewers are complaining about price for, these are the cheapest per sheet set I’ve found anywhere ($22). The reviews about not fitting the mattress must not have checked the dimensions, because it completely covers all edges of ours and we even have a waterproof liner that came with our mattress and a separate waterproof sheet on top of that. When we got our sheets I discovered that one had a hole in the corner and I reached out to the company to let them know. The owner told me that this was unacceptable, not to their standards, and that they wanted to send me a replacement for free as customer satisfaction and quality were their top pri... I wanted all of the children to be able to face forward, but those kind of strollers were quite expensive.  I decided to buy three Chicco C6 strollers and bought two packages of the connectors to connect them all together.  It works fantastic.  They are very easy to put on and just as easy to take off when there's a day when I only need two of the strollers, I just disconnect one of the connectors and off we...

Review 10: rating 5.0. Worth the price It was great item to use for D.C. in the Mall area. My 4 year old and 1 year old were happy to both be side by side during our visit to the museum and train ride. I saved plenty of money not purchasing a double stroller. The strollers are small and fit in any car trunk without taking much of any space. Anyhow, back to the adaptors they work and I didn't have an issue with turning with Cosco strollers using these adaptors. Hope this helps.

Review 11: rating 2.0. Needs improvement Great idea. Does not hold up to the test of time

The connectors were loose and the clamps would come apart once I pushed the couches. The wheels would interlock with each other. I wouldn't buy these again.

Review 14: rating 1.0. One Star these are too loose to actually push 2 strollers together. They fall off all the time. I returned mine.

Review 15: rating 4.0. I like these. I like these...not 100% easy to push with but considering my daughter is about 40 pounds and almost 5 years old...I think they steer fine :)  I am due in a few weeks with #2 so used our poodle as she weighs about 10 pounds.  I was hesitant to buy a sit and stand or a double stroller as I doubt we will use it much so I opted to try these.  I have a Maclaren VOLO and a Quest with a square tubing and they fit well.

Review 16: rating 2.0. decided to return We couldn't get them to work with our first learning umbrella strollers. Maybe if we were only going straight? The inner wheels hit as we tried to turn, and it was not stable at all.

Review 17: rating 2.0. Weak and frustrating First and foremost, the connectors pop off! You can't have an unconnecting connector. Also, they failed to provide enough structural rigidity to push the strollers effectively. Finally, the gap required between the umbrella strollers required to utilize the connectors made the strollers too wide for a standard doorway, making ordinary maneuvers difficult. We got these to try and help make life easier; it only got more frustrating.

Review 18: rating 4.0. Just a life saver! Life saver! Use for travel with my two kids ALONE! Thank god my husband bought this before the trip and was amazing! Imagine... International gate(atlanta airport) 20-25 minutes walking to get the passport and costume check!!

Review 19: rating 5.0. Super Duper! These are awesome for connecting 2 umbrella strollers! I've never been out and using the connectors and not had someone ask me where they could find them.

Review 20: rating 5.0. Works great for travel If you travel with two kids this is a must have. We have a large double stroller which is not easy for airport travel, used these on an overseas trip and worked out great. Pushed as one stroller.
persona: This customer prioritizes practicality, ease of use, and value for money when making purchases, often choosing functional products that meet basic needs without unnecessary features, while being influenced by price, availability of coupons, and real-world performance over brand loyalty or premium qualities.
reference_output: rating 4.0. Now my grandmother can easily store two umbrella strollers I had been toying with the idea of buying these for a while now. Now I wish I hadn't waited so long. I actually bought these for my grandmother's house. She likes to take the kids on a walk sometimes but the older one still can't walk long distances. I didn't want to purchase a double stroller because of the cost and due to how little it would be used. We happened to have two cheap umbrella strollers so the (approx) $15 connectors did the trick. Now my grandmother can easily store two umbrella strollers, which are lightweight and easy to lift, then easily add the connectors when she wants to take the kids for a walk.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 3.0. Good bumpers, poor adhesive. The composition of the foam bumper seems to do the job. The double-sided tape used to install it leaves much to be desired. The surfaces upon which the foam was applied were cleaned with alcohol and permitted to dry thoroughly before the foam bumpers were applied. Within a couple of weeks several pieces had fallen off. Review 2: rating 5.0. excellent for safe baby excellent for safe baby, very useful Review 3: rating 4.0. Got it for our super active crawler safetly Got it for our super active crawler safetly.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Wish I'd bought it sooner! We were traveling to multiple destinations by car with a 12mo and wanted to avoid rental costs at each locations for a crib, so we bought this mattress to improve the comfort in our Graco Pack n Play. It worked! Our baby didn't fuss and it was more supportive than the pack n play's pad. Size wise, I understand what other reviewers were saying about a small gap when used within a Graco pack n play. Even with the small gap, I would have preferred this added m... Review 2: rating 5.0. Sleeping like a baby I was SO nervous about buying this to put in the pack and play go...you know, because they tell you never to use other mattresses. Well I’m SO glad I did! Baby girl sleeps so much better, it’s firm enough for her (she’s 5 mo). Fits perfectly with no gaps (measure your play yard). Regular pack n play sheets fit too! Review 3: rating 1.0. Not very comfortable!!! The mattress fit the pac and play perfectly but it added no cushion or softness to make it more comfortable for sleeping. Review 4: rating 4.0. Cozy little mattress I purchased this for use in my sons pack in play while we stay up my in laws for the summer. It seems to be much more comfortable than just sleeping on the pack n play pad. Review 5: rating 4.0. Graco Pack and Play Mattress This mattress fits the Pack and Play crib very well. It has a water proof shell. It is firm but not too firm.
Overall I like this purchase Review 6: rating 2.0. Pros: it fits my pack n play perfectly, ... Pros: it fits my pack n play perfectly, it's very light, and it's waterproof
Cons: i know infant matresses are supposed to be firm, but this thing is hard as a rock. My son doesn't sleep as well on it as he does on the full sized crib matress we have. It didn't seem too firm at first, but after about a week, it had lost any little bit of fluff that it started with. Review 7: rating 5.0. Perfect Fit!!!!!!!!!!!! It fit perfect in my Graco Pack 'n Play Playard with Cuddle Cove Rocking Seat. Review 8: rating 5.0. Use with hotel-provided Pack and Plays! So glad I made this purchase. We use our Pack and Play primarily as a travel crib. My daughter was having a lot of trouble sleeping on floor of the Pack and Play as it came, and no wonder! Pack and Plays are NOT comfy. This mattress has been a life-saver! Fits our standard Pack and Play and works with Pack and Play size/mini-crib size sheets.

Travel tip: In my experience, hotels will usually provide a Pack and Play for a child to sle... Review 9: rating 5.0. Helped my Little Guy Sleep in The PnP This fit perfectly in our Graco Pack 'N Play with Newborn Napper Elite, Vance. It seemed to help our 9 month old sleep in the pack n play, as we were having trouble transitioning him from a rock n play. It is firm, but I don't believe it is any firmer than his crib mattress. : ) We are still working on transitioning to the crib : ) Review 10: rating 5.0. Everyone that owns a play pen needs a mattress for it My grandson refused to sleep in his packnplay playpen because it was hard has a rock until we bought the mattress. Now he will take naps in it. I wish I would of ordered a mattress a long time ago. Review 11: rating 5.0. Bought this mattress for the "Pack-N-Play" Cosco Fun Sport Play Yard that we purchased at the same ... Bought this mattress for the "Pack-N-Play" Cosco Fun Sport Play Yard that we purchased at the same time. Glad we bought this mattress, because the pad that comes with the Pack-N-Play doesn't give our grandson enough cushion to sleep on - this mattress is perfect. Also bought a separate sheet that fits the mattress. Review 12: rating 4.0. Four Stars Fits well and will be comfy. However it crinkles a bit. I hope the noise doesn't wake her. Review 13: rating 5.0. Should’ve Had This All Along Not sure why this doesn’t already come with the pack n play. This is a great mattress pad for the graco pack n play set. I ordered the sheets seen on the prior reviews and they are soft and perfect. This mattress is just right. Delivered quickly and much safer than the playpen was before. Review 14: rating 5.0. Excellent padding and fitting Exactly what we needed. Excellent padding and fitting. Review 15: rating 1.0. Horrible I myself would have severe back issues if I had to sleep on this cement pad. It was rock hard and the plastic made it sooo loud! I didn't even attempt to have my light sleeper try it. We bought an off brand mattress that doesn't fit as well in my graco pack n' play but it's softer and a lot less noisy. The one pro was that it fit in the crib perfectly. So if you have a really young infant it's probably the best way to go as I did extensive research and no one else makes a ma... Review 16: rating 5.0. Safe and comfy! This is my 2nd mattress from this company. This mattress fits perfectly in my Grace Pack n’ Play. It is firm—which makes it safe—but still WAY more comfortable than the thin pad that usually comes in pack n plays. I like that it is easy to clean if there are ever accidents on it. We used it right out of the box, and did not notice any weird chemical smells that are sometimes noticed with foam mattresses. Review 17: rating 5.0. Five Stars Just received and it looks like it will be perfect for comfort at Grandma's house. Review 18: rating 1.0. Too firm for sleep I know that all babies are different, but my baby was not able to use this to sleep in. I understand why. It was extra/super firm as if sleeping on the floor. I would joke around my mommy friends that it felt like concrete.

My baby used a different firm mattress for sleep, and we used this as a changing pad instead because it is easy to wipe. Also, it's tough to find a fitted sheet for this. Review 19: rating 5.0. This was perfect. Fits into the pack'n play perfectly I had bought Graco pack 'n plays for my twin grandsons. Although the kids didn't seem to mind the very thin mattress (really the bottom of the pack 'n play) I thought they needed a sturdier mattress. This was perfect. Fits into the pack'n play perfectly. I am so pleased that I found it and the price was very good. Review 20: rating 5.0. Five Stars Great Item fast shipping easy transaction A + A + A +

reference_output: rating 5.0. Great for pack n play sleep Got this for my son's pack and play (babytrend) and it fits perfect! My boy sleeps better with this than the flat hard mat that comes in it. Definitely would recommend.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Beautiful. Soft. Quality. They're amazing! I'm in love.

I'm quite a picky person when it comes to dressing my kids. I don't like screen-printed things, I don't like polyester things, I prefer natural fibers and neutral tones... you get the picture. These bibs are PERFECT! I love that the patterned sides are not crazy-vibrant and the reverse side is even simpler with beautiful soft colors. The fabric is soft and I expect it will only get softer with washing. As othe... Review 2: rating 2.0. Runs small My son is 5 months old and is in the 75th percentile for Weight and 98th for height for his age. He just started shoving everything he can into his mouth so I thought these would be great for him! I picked these up for his Easter basket and was excited about how cute they were. However, they choke him. Not useable at all and he has no teeth. The teething description on the product is a little deceptive cause it’s really for younger babies. Review 3: rating 3.0. Cute, but after one wash the material is bunching ... Cute, but after one wash the material is bunching up at the sides and completely losing form.

Also, there was a LIVE ROACH in my packaging. Nasty. I know warehouses get bugs, worked there, seen it. But eww. I never packed one in someone’s shipment. Review 4: rating 2.0. Two Stars Super cute print.. but the material is rough, scratchy and not very absorbanr. :( Review 5: rating 2.0. Bibs will not stay on Really liked these at first, but had to return. Two stars for the cute design but after delicate washing a few times, the material became out of shape and the Velcro would always come undone. The bibs were easily torn by my 8 month old twins and would constantly be on the floor. Defeats the purpose I would say. Disappointed. Review 6: rating 5.0. The best I absolutely love these bibs. They are so cute for my 14 week boy. He’s starting to drool everywhere and needs to be wearing one prettttyyy much aaalllways. The tether at the bottom is not only great to chew on, but it keeps the bib down because it has some weight on the bottom corner. Best bibs everrrrr Review 7: rating 2.0. Terrible fastening method, comes right off. The design is cute, the chewy part is good, but the velcro should be replaced with a button. The velcro is really tiny and doesn't hold at all. My 8 month old was able to rip this right off every time I put it on. He enjoyed using it as a flag and waving it around, which is all I could get him to do since he refuses to wear it and the velcro won't hold at all. Review 8: rating 2.0. Cute but hit or miss quality I bought these for my sad teething baby, unfortunately the quality control team is slipping because the velcro part was sewn on backwards on one of them rendering it jusr about useless. I was going to just return them but he grabbed it with his fast little hands and starting chewing on it so I'll just try to fix it somehow. Other than that they seem nice, baby likes it. Review 9: rating 2.0. Don't follow the care instructions! I like the concept of these bibs, but seriously, don't put them in the dryer. Lay them flat to dry. After 2 uses, they shrunk up and were too tight to stay fastened around my baby's neck. Now they're pretty useless and for 3 bibs, they weren't cheap. Review 10: rating 2.0. Great idea, too small These are super cute and a nice material but definitely too small and shrink even more after a wash. I bought them for my 4 month old who started teething and I can’t use them, bummer. Review 11: rating 2.0. Nice idea, poor execution Poor quality, double layer shifts and bunches easily losing shape. Nice color and print. Review 12: rating 1.0. Not absorbent These bibs are paper thin. Not at all absorbent which defeats the purpose of the chewy bit at the end, there will be drool with that. Review 13: rating 1.0. Terrible durability This bibs shrink to almost half their size in the first wash and the Velcro stops sticking after the first was as well. Unless you plan to use them as a one time bib or just as an accessory, don’t get these. Review 14: rating 2.0. They shrink a ton! I loved these until I washed them! They shrunk a TON and now my baby can’t wear them again because they don’t fit around his neck anymore! So disappointed! Review 15: rating 1.0. Shrinks! Followed washing directions but one of the bibs shrunken to an unusable size. Review 16: rating 1.0. Made with cheap velcro I thought these were perfect for my teething son. Unfortunately these bibs attach with (cheap) velcro and he is able to pull them off. The bibs also fall off on their own. Not worth the money. Review 17: rating 1.0. Not good quality These lost shape and shrunk up immediately after they were washed and dried. The Velcro didn’t stay together so they easily tore off my son. Defitnely the worst bibs I’ve tried. Review 18: rating 2.0. Too small for baby's neck The fabric is great and very absorbent. However, the neck area was just too snug for my 5 month old and the velcro didn't stick together well. Would have been better with adjustable snaps. Review 19: rating 1.0. Velcro won't stay put I'm SUPER disappointed in these bibs. I like the absorbing material, I love the teether, the fabric is cute! But the velcro on the back will not stay together. When you wash them, they will connect to OTHER pieces of clothing, but when your baby is wearing -- the two sides don't stay together. Unfortunate. Review 20: rating 1.0. Velcro doesn't hold The velcro isn't very strong on these. My 6 month old baby pulled the bib off the first time he wore it, and has every time since. It just ends up in a wad on the floor because the velcro isn't strong enough to keep it on him.
persona: This customer prioritizes functionality and durability in baby products, especially features like reliable Velcro that hold up under use, and is likely to avoid repeat purchases if core functionality fails.
reference_output: rating 2.0. Weak Velcro The Velcro doesn't really work which makes the bibs unusable once your kids are old enough to pull on them.

reviews:

My son is transitioning from diapers and uses the potty during the day, but at night time he still needs protection and we wanted to give him something that functions more like underwear.  These work great, hold everything in, and last the entire night.  Although, I have ready some reviews mentioning the sides coming undone, I can assure you that we NEVER had that issue!

Review 10: rating 1.0. LO complained they were Not comfy and not absorbent These pull ups run small and we bought them for over night.  We have never had an accident in the target brand pull ups.  Two nights in a row with these and my LO complained about how uncomfortable they were.  Will not buy again

Review 11: rating 5.0. Gotta love Toy Story Mainly ordered these for my 2 year old because of Toy Story being on them but they hold liquids very well and actually last through the night unlike other brands. Will 100% buy again in the future

Review 12: rating 1.0. Poor Quality I ordered these because I wanted to get cheaper ones to save money & I have gotten these before, but thought maybe they have changed. I’m not a fan of Huggies. Review 13: rating 5.0. No nighttime leakage! Very good product.  No night leakage.

Review 14: rating 5.0. No more wet sheets. We were having nighttime wet sheets daily until we switched to these.

Review 15: rating 2.0. Hard stuff inside diapers. Some of these diapers were hard. Like a board. The absorbant material inside was very solid, and not something I would wear on myself, much less my children who have sensitive skin. It would not be comfortable in the daytime, or at night. I like this brand because it absorbs everything for overnight, but I will have to pay store price if I keep getting hard diapers from Amazon.

Review 16: rating 5.0. Super absorbent Great absorbency. I don’t have to buy diapers and pull-ups anymore now that I found these. Works great for my 3.5 year old at night.

Review 17: rating 5.0. Class leader The resealable side seam is the difference maker between Huggies Pull-ups and Pampers Easy Ups. Huggies has the superior design that’s easier to open when changing and resealable if needed. We switched from Pampers to Huggies because of this.

Review 18: rating 2.0. Terribly designed. So sad I bought a giant box of these. Super upset that I bought an entire box of these. The sides have reverse velcro, and if you need to tighten them, they have these giant flaps hanging off. It encourages my son to pull them off constantly, which defeats the purpose of wearing it. It absorbs well for overnight, but so do other 12 hr diapers.  I would not recommend them.

Review 19: rating 1.0. Not as advertised! I have order from this vendor at least 5 times but on my last order I received the regular huggies not the one listed above. I could not return as I needed diapers that day and my son leaked through the diapers over night. Super disappointed. Don’t bother sending the diapers at all if they are not the actual product!!!

Review 20: rating 5.0. Good fit, no leaking through These are great. My son had been wetting through his pullups at night. With these, we dont have that issue!
persona: This customer prioritizes reliability, safety, and functionality in toddler products, consistently choosing items that support potty training, hygiene, and independent use while also being durable, easy to use, and effective in addressing specific challenges like leaks, picky eating, or resistance to routines. They value products with strong performance, thoughtful design, and sensory appeal—such as appealing scents or colors—that encourage engagement and repeat use, and are willing to repurchase and recommend based on proven results and long-term satisfaction.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Excellent for nights. Had issues with leaks from the side with OTHER brands and my toddler and I were fed up with late night leaks. This has saved us the hassle. I noticed my toddler sleeps more comfortably as well. It is a good thick material for night even can be for traveling if you need to make a road trip possibly. I only use at night as I am potty training however this morning my toddler really grabbed this pull up and wanted to wear nothing else(I normally use cloth pull ups in the morning). He said he loves it too and ours came in the buzz lightyear design.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 4.0. Easy to use, doesn't quite puree This food mill doesn't make food really smooth, which you might want if your child is under 6 months, but it does a great job with quickly mashing foods provided they are cooked well to begin with. It does seem to separate out thick skins or pieces of a vegetable that are too hard for a baby to eat, but it's not perfect in this regard (ie. with a sweet potato, I've found bits of skin that made it into the mash, though for the most part, the skin was s... Review 2: rating 5.0. Nice product This is great for that inbetween stage..when needed more than pureed food but not enought teeth to do chunky food. Nice and portable to take when eating out.. Review 3: rating 1.0. wait! be warned!!!! I have the kidco version in white. I use it every day multiple times. I adore it but it is small and I had some anxiety that it was made prior to pbc awareness and might have bad chemicals, so purchased this second version. It arrived and looked fabulous - great color, bigger bowl - exact copy of the kidco. BUT......Wow is it not the kidco. For some unknown reason it comes apart - dare I' say EXPLODES - every time I puree. Although it twists together, for some rea... Review 4: rating 5.0. Great baby food maker My wife purchased this food mill for our 8-month old daughter and it has been a great baby food maker. It is very user-friendly, and my wife likes the fact that the blade part is made of metal. This food mill does not puree food completely; there are small chunks of food, and it has not been an issue. This perhaps may be the perfect product to make foods for those babies who are in-between eating stages. It works wonderfully with pasta, fruits, vegetables, etc. ... Review 5: rating 5.0. compared to the KidCo food mill I prefer this in almost all ways to the KidCo food mill of similar shape and function. (This is not to say the KidCo is a bad product. I simply prefer the Green Sprouts one. The one reason I can see for the KidCo might be if your baby is just starting solid foods, and this is because the KidCo has smaller holes in the grinding surface and hence makes food slightly less textured. The KidCo also came with an extra gasket, and some versions come with ... Review 6: rating 1.0. Hard to operate, hard to clean, leaks liquids, and can't handle harder foods We were extremely disappointed with this food mill. We expected to be able to quickly and easily make baby food out of whatever we were eating, but we never found much use for it. It's hard to operate and hard to clean, but we could live with that if it made good baby food; it doesn't. We also couldn't take it out anywhere, because itleaks liquid from mashed food out of the bottom. It also can't handle h... Review 7: rating 3.0. Good but leaks I like this for making baby food for my 8 month old. It makes a good consitancy for a baby that has already started with some solids. It won't get it fine enough for a new eater. The only thing I don't like about it is that it leaks out the bottom so you have to use it over the sink. I bought it hoping to take it to restaurants but I can't imagine doing that if it leaks. Review 8: rating 4.0. Good product, but really just a gadget This mill was very easy to use and clean, however, I really did not use it that much--just peas and sweet potatoes in the beginning. I used the food processor much more and didn't end up using the mill more than a couple of times. Review 9: rating 4.0. Love the BPA/PVC free aspect! I didn't want to pay $50 for a stainless steel grinder so this is a great second place.
It's super simple to put together and understand. Super easy to clean.
For first foods- avocado, sweet potato, banana... this think is great. For second foods- squash, peas, carrots...it's great. I haven't used it for meats yet, but I'm sure it would do fine mincing/tearing it apart.

I'm waiting to hear back from the customer service to see if the... Review 10: rating 1.0. Hard to I was disappointed with this product. This is my second child; with my first, we always ground up table food in a small electric blender for him. I was hoping to use this to do the same thing, but without needing electricity - especially when we eat out or travel. Unfortunately, I found this very, very difficult to use. Hard to get the disc in and out, hard to clean, and left so much of the food on the wrong side of the disc. We don't have the box and everything anymore,... Review 11: rating 1.0. Just Recycle We previously had a KidCo baby food meal. It worked great. We decided to try the Green Sprouts because it is eco-friendly. Well, it belongs in the recycling container. The blade/strainer does not stay in place when grinding foods. We have cleaned up many messes as a result of the blade/strainer popping out. The seal is marginal at best. Grinding anything with moisture causes liquid to flow down base and on to the countertop. Finally, the mill leaves a good portio... Review 12: rating 3.0. Trade-offs in this one 30 years ago I had a "happy baby food grinder" that worked great bacause it had a blade that was somewhat sharp. This eco-friendly grinder has a dull blade that does not really grind food and it requires you to put it on the counter and push with great force while turning the crank. That causes the liquids in the foods to be forced out the bottom onto the counter. Fresh fruits, even very ripe, are very hard to do. Steamed fresh vegetables are the easiest, i... Review 13: rating 3.0. works... if you have some strenght! It does grind the food as suggests, however it takes a lot of strength! I'm not kidding... it seriously takes a lot of effort. I only use it when I have to. Review 14: rating 2.0. disappointed I used a similar grinder when my children were young, and loved it. I do child care now and wanted a food mill for the infants I take care of. I read many reviews and decided to purchase this one. It works fine as far as grinding the food, and I am happy with how that works, but within a few days it became impossible to remove the grinder disk. I had read other such comments, but there were a lot more good reviews so I went ahead and got it. I am still using it, but can'... Review 15: rating 1.0. Stay away Reason of 1 star: Very hard to take the blade out and clean. So if you can keep a dirt one to use again and again then take this one. I almost give up on taking the blade out as it is such a bad design. If I can not keep it hygenic then whats the point?
I might as well press the soft food through a strainer. I don't know how people can give a 5 * to this one.... May be they work for the company ;) Review 16: rating 2.0. use and operation Did not do as well as expected, the grind mechinism not sharp at all. It seem's you are pushing through a strainer or colander, takes alot of pressure to get done even though the vegtables were throughly cooked and soft, also leaves allot under neath that doesn't make it through the top. Review 17: rating 4.0. What I expect for a baby food mill, awesome customer service! It was my first experience with a baby food mill. I didn't expect Green sprouts Baby Food Mill to work well with cooked meat (especially pork and beef). It works well for steamed chicken and salmon. For pork and beef, I had to mince the raw meat before steam-cooking it; then, they can go through the food mill easily. I used it mostly for peas, lentils and chickpeas to get rid of the skin when my daughter was under 1 year o... Review 18: rating 2.0. Wasted my money I didn't use it at all cuz when I first tried to mill the food, it didn't work as expected. I followed the instructions n with the help of my husband, we couldn't make it work. Who said this is better than any electric grinder was wrong. I had the electric blender n food processor, it saved me tons of time n work very well.
I couldn't return it cuz I bought it too early before my son can start to eat. :-(( Review 19: rating 1.0. Poor or Defective Many reviews were favorable
Unfortunately mine can not be.

It seems that positioning and removing of the strainer plate is a serious issue with this item.

persona: This customer prioritizes durability, functionality, and safety in products, especially for infants and pets, and is willing to pay for high-quality materials that perform reliably under demanding conditions, with a strong preference for items that support comfort, ease of care, and long-term performance.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Malamute Proof! So we purchased these to use with our dogs first, and if they survived that, our son second. We went away for ten days and have two big dogs; one 105 pound Malamute and one 87 pound Malamute mix. We weren't super hopeful these would keep them out of the majority of the house but gave it the college try. These things did the job. When we came back the gates were in the same spots and nothing was broken on them. Now, many people might think that the dogs may not have tested them. However, these are the dogs, that when motivated properly, can knock a cast iron skillet off the lid of the trash can and move the trash can a foot off the wall. We blocked off the majority of the house because you can dog proof homes but it is near impossible to Malamute proof homes. Thank you these worked and are still in good condition to use for our little one who just started crawling!

I cannot use these and so I requested a refund for return and did not hear back from the company at all. Poor product and poor customer service.

There are no markings on the bottom of the bottle. A store bought Medela has the safe temperature range and the plastic rating on the bottom. The bott...

Review 10: rating 5.0. Love em' Love love love these bottles!! But this does not bother me, at all, because those bottles look exactly the same as the bottles came with my Medel...

Review 12: rating 1.0. Thought these would be actual bottles and they really are ... Thought these would be actual bottles and they really are sterile collection bottles that you would get at the hospital.

Review 13: rating 5.0. Good Bottle Good bottle for the price.  Nice to have a larger bottle.  Comes sterilized in individual sealed packages.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 1.0. One Star Fast shipping! Cute but wrong color.

Review 2: rating 5.0. So soft! We ordered two of these for our daughter for a "lovey" and are extremely satisfied!  We have quite a few Burt's Bees Baby products and thsee blankies are at the top of the list.  They are very well-made and incredibly soft.  They are the right size for tiny hands!

Review 3: rating 4.0. Sweet but filled with polyester. Love this lovey, but baby was allergic to the polyester filling inside. Wish they would use organic cotton filling instead.

Review 4: rating 5.0. My LO loves this! My little one loves this bee. He doesn't like rubber teethers and prefers his hands or blankets. I like the fact that this is organic cotton and he likes to play with the bee as well.

Review 5: rating 5.0. Great Very sweet - got it as a baby shower gift <3

Review 6: rating 5.0. Perfect gift This was super cute - bought for a friend's newborn. I love all of Burt's Bees products! I think this will be used quite a bit.

Review 7: rating 5.0. Adorable bee! I love this--super soft and no weirdly creepy animal face like some other brands. It doesn't crinkle loudly enough to really keep my 10 month old's interest, but then it's also not crinkling so loud that she wakes up when she rolls over it in the middle of the night, so that's a plus. It's not her favorite toy ever, but it's safe to have in her crib and she does play with it a little when she wakes up from naps, which is really all I wanted it for.

Review 8: rating 1.0. Ruined when washed Even though I followed all washibg instructions it still got ruined when I washed it.

Review 9: rating 5.0. Perfect for a Price is right board Baby shower I hosted ! Perfect for a Price is right board !

Review 10: rating 1.0. Bad choice of color This yellow color never appealed to my baby

Review 11: rating 5.0. It's good to take on the go b/c it's comfy and ... My daughter loves her bee blanky! It's good to take on the go b/c it's comfy and reminds her of her nighttime blanket w/out having to risk losing her nighttime blanky!

Review 12: rating 1.0. Crinkly wings Don’t prefer as a snuggle toy because crinkly wings are distracting

Review 13: rating 5.0. My daughters favorite My baby loveeeeesss her bee. She takes all her naps with it. It’s adorable and it was the only safe blanket I could find that had organic fabric. I’ve washed it a bunch of times and it stays looking like new

Review 14: rating 5.0. Perfect Lovey Size, quality, softness are great. My 2-year-old still holds it against his face to go to sleep every night. Really calms him down. If he wakes up, he rubs it against his face and goes right back to sleep. Ordered two, so when one is in the wash we aren’t left without. Washes easily, too.

Review 15: rating 5.0. Adorable! My baby loves the baby bee 🐝 she sleeps with it and hugs it. :-)

Review 16: rating 5.0. Polyester filling 100% organic cotton, but polyester filling! Such a pitty it’s ruined with polyester. Other than that, great item for my little one, may get a second one as backup!

Review 17: rating 2.0. Cute but not very soft This blanket is a terry-cloth type material; like a washcloth. I was hoping for something a little softer.

Review 18: rating 5.0. Good Size Perfect topper for my diaper cake.! Soft and the colors on it are not too bold. Very subtle for baby.

Review 19: rating 2.0. Fabric look like a towel I'm not sure if I got the right product, because it's not soft as people say in the reviews. The fabric looks like a hard towel. My baby was not into it.

Review 20: rating 4.0. No crinkle wings :( I got this because I saw in reviews it had crinkly wings. Unfortunately mine did not have them. Very disappointed... cute security blanket though and I still love burts bees products. Just wish the wings crinkled :( my buddy loves crinkling sounds. He did take to this one better than others we have tried. Color it's vibrant and more plush feeling. He threw this one over his face immediately when I walked away. Took me a while to move it down from his face after he...

reference_output: rating 2.0. Bad quality Threads - choking hazard. I wish i noticed before I ripped tag of. Be aware mamas. I am dissapointed because I love burts bee products. cotton but polyester filling.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Amazing stuff for breastfeeding mommies! I suspected I had thrush, but the symptoms were never constant. Nonetheless every now & then I had some shooting pain. Lo' and behold I stumbled across this product and it's been amazing. I've only had to use it twice and it worked fast and effectively, and thrush is gone! LOVE it! I haven't tried it on his diaper rash though...stay tuned ;) Review 2: rating 5.0. miracle goo Most diaper rash products can't be used when mom had thrush because of the starches (which the year feeds off of). This product can be used and works miracles on baby's bum and moms breasts! Motherlove has the best products on the market!!! Review 3: rating 5.0. Perfect Gift for Expecting Mothers! I absolutely LOVE this product! I give it out at all the baby showers I go to for first time moms and also highly recommend it to anyone and everyone who is having issues with nursing OR a diaper rash that just won't go away/gets worse. I love that this product is all natural. I was a little worried that we'd go through it fast since it's such a small container but it has actually lasted us a really long time since you only need to use such a small... Review 4: rating 5.0. Love love love it!! When I had my second child recently we were pulling out all the stuff from the first kiddo and there was an empty jar of this stuff in there. Thank goodness I had the forethought to do that so I would remember how awesome this stuff is. They might as well not make any other diaper rash product cause this is better than all of them. Goes on well, not greasy, does not cause pain and works very quickly. I love love love it!!! Review 5: rating 1.0. The advertising that this actually helps thrush, a yeast ... The advertising that this actually helps thrush, a yeast, seems false. I was desperate enough to try it even though everything I know has taught me that such a thing isn't going to fix thrush. Sadly, this didn't do the trick. Review 6: rating 1.0. One Star Made my daughters diaper rash worse. Review 7: rating 5.0. Once you use Motherlove, you wont want to use anything else! My sis said to only use motherlove, but I was cheap and used destin. I mean, it is such a small jar and I would blow through it in like 5 uses, right? Well, after tot went to a play date, she came back and sis said she gave her some motherlove rash cream. I was amazed. Tot had a rash that was there for- what felt like months that with each change I would cake on destin, and with motherlove it went away after one use! since.... Review 8: rating 5.0. Works like magic! My son's rash had just developed but it pretty much worked within hours of applying it! Review 9: rating 5.0. Love Motherlove's Products I use this for everything from a nipple cream to my baby's bottom. Goes on nice and isn't overly heavy or greasy. Review 10: rating 5.0. Amazing! Worth every penny, I only wish it was sold in more stores locally! My 4 week old son has been battling thrush since his first week of life, which came with a painful diaper rash for him. He has been on Nystatin for over 2 weeks in hopes of getting rid of the yeast overgrowth systemically, and it was not working at all. So I also purchased and began using Gentian Violet at the same time I began using Motherlove.... we have been using Gentian Violet orally and Mother love on ... Review 11: rating 5.0. Great Product. I have used this for my baby every since he was 3 months old. And this is by far the best diaper rash cream I have ever tried. Highly recommended. Seller is super quick shipping this item. Thanks to everyone involved in the process of getting this out to me. 5+ Stars Review 12: rating 5.0. Worth it! I love the mother love nipple cream. A little goes a long way. When I started feeling thrush coming on I used this on my nipples as part of an overall treatment plan. (With thrush you need to attack it on multiple fronts. I took probiotics and also used vinegar in laundry rinse cycle). Review 13: rating 2.0. Don't buy! Made my son's rash worse!!! Review 14: rating 5.0. This is great for cloth diaper use I bought this when my son whom I cloth diaper was getting thrush rash. It worked like a charm and was safe for cloth diapers. Great stuff. Review 15: rating 3.0. So...So Keep in mind it's only 1 once!!! I couldn't believe I paid over $10 for this stuff....1 once!?
Anyway, it works fairly well. Doesn't seem to provide a "lasting" moisture. Definetely didn't keep the trush away either. I won't be buying it again. Review 16: rating 5.0. Finally rid of thrush!! I have been battling thrush for months off and on. This is a very good ointment- style treatment.
For those concerned about the size, very little is used for each treatment. It lasts forever even when using several times a day. I used this in conjunction with white vinegar solution and finally broke the thrush cycle!! Review 17: rating 5.0. Great! My babies skin started roughening up in the diaper area but this softened it up overnight! I also use it when she scratches herself and that works perfectly too :-) Review 18: rating 5.0. Incredible product This product clears up diaper rash almost instantly - my baby had a rash that was excoriating his skin and this cleared it up, we used it every day for awhile and now only occasionally. It does come in a tiny jar but you really only need a little bit. It doesn't seem like it will be effective b/c it does not coat the skin like triple paste/desitin/etc, but it works great!! even on thrush. Review 19: rating 5.0. great product this product works great for us. i love that it's all natural. i have other products like california baby and burts bee, but this one os my favorite. the only thing i don't like about it - is the price. it's really expesive for what you get. Review 20: rating 4.0. Well worth the price When my son developed a pesky yeast based diaper rash I was concerned about what prescription level of diaper rash cream his pediatrician would recommend and the side effects. A friend told me about this brand and it was great! I liked that everything was natural and safe for his skin. Well worth the price and since only a little is needed it will last until he begins potty training.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. A must have!! Oh my goodness this is fantastic! I have a pile of thermometers that don’t work and never did. I even had to exchange one three times and it still didn’t work! This is amazing! I love how fast and accurate the reading is. Switching from forehead to ear mode is so easy, just press the mode button. It light up green while taking the temperature so that helps keep anxiety down those few seconds while waiting. If it glows red then your kiddo has a fever 😢 I wish I would hav... Review 2: rating 1.0. Cheap Plastic felt cheap and seemed inconsistent. Sent This back Review 3: rating 5.0. Fast forehead temperature readings When you have a squirmy baby needing a temp reading, a forehead thermometer is fantastic. This one works VERY fast so you can get an accurate reading on the squirmiest baby. It is colored to give an instant idea of how high a temp you or your children might have.
Even when my daughter was sleeping I could check on her without waking her. Definitely worth the peace of mind.
If you prefer, just pop off the top and you can get a fast accu... Review 4: rating 1.0. Inconsistent readings I was excited to get this for our baby that is due in a few weeks. We tested it out and it said we both had a fever of 102 and higher in our ears, but 97 on our foreheads. It also wasn’t even close to what our regular under tongue thermometer read. I had trouble removing the cover that goes over the ear reader as well. Review 5: rating 1.0. Doesn’t work... This thermometer doesn’t read accurately at all. I was running a little bit of a fever last night and tried to use it to take my temp and it read 97 on the forehead and 100, then 101 then 103 in my ear. These were back to back readings. I went and got a normal digital thermometer and my temp was 99.5 which was about what I thought it was. Returning this thing. Review 6: rating 5.0. Love this! Love this! It is soooo convenient I ordered it because I have two sick kids 2 and 4 and this is so much more convenient then your traditional thermometers! If you don’t have one yet you need one! You don’t have to upset your already miserable child to get an accurate temp! I do find that the ear is the most accurate than the forehead! Review 7: rating 5.0. I love how this thermometer is quick to get a reading I love how this thermometer is quick to get a reading. So hard to have little ones sit still for very long so this one works great. It's nice you can use on forehead or in the ear. Review 8: rating 3.0. Not consistently accurate I wanted to love this as my daughter doesn’t mind using this thermometer, but it is not accurate in that the readings are variably different, when taken only seconds apart. If I am doing something “wrong”, then it is too complicated to use. Review 9: rating 5.0. Easy to Use Good thing about this thermometer its dual and easy to use. the results are fast.. Can be used for both Adult and kids..The color indicator is good to identify fever.. Review 10: rating 2.0. Read the instructions The product isn’t very precise, make sure to read all the instructions before using it! Review 11: rating 5.0. Baby Thermometer Just as pictured. Works right out of the box. Easy operation. Review 12: rating 1.0. Can’t trust the results! Attempted to use this thermometer for the first time, since my daughter just got all of her 2 month vaccinations. A series of forehead measurements: 95.3, then 97.2, then 96.6. All within seconds of each other using the exact same technique: measuring half and inch from the forehead per the user manual. What is the point of an unreliable thermometer? Review 13: rating 5.0. Perfect thermometer for kids! [[VIDEOID:df8032d825090b3c3bc926e5cd29f01c]] I love that it’s so quick and easy to use even with a wiggly baby! Review 14: rating 5.0. Accurate and multiple uses I bought this to use as my diaper bag thermometer and I really like it! I like that it’s both a ear and forehead scanner. I crosschecked it again two other temp scanners and it’s accurate. Review 15: rating 5.0. Easy to use and doesn't wake the baby [[VIDEOID:3249e710d953daec8876cf92b17449aa]] We love how this thermometer has 3 different settings for house, forehead, and ear. There is also a button on the side to turn the volume off, which makes it easier to not wake the baby. When a fever is detected it lights up red. This feature makes it much easier for sleepy parents at night. Review 16: rating 2.0. Not accurate The forehead portion seemed to work but for the ear temperature, it said I had a fever of 102. I tried multiple times and multiple ways. It did the same thing on my daughter. When I compared it to the Braun, there was no comparison. I returned this thermometer. Review 17: rating 1.0. Poor product I want to return this item because it is the most inaccurate thermostats for a baby anyone can purchase. Feels cheap and not good if you are using on an infant!!! Review 18: rating 5.0. Works like a charm. Love this item. It has helped a lot where the flu has hit our whole family. Easy to use with in depth instructions. The results are easy to understand with color changing backlight. I took multiple readings on different people with consistent results. It takes temps so quick which really helps on my youngest! Would purchase again. Considering getting one as a baby shower gift! Review 19: rating 5.0. Awesome product! Very accurate Awesome product! Very accurate. I love the fact that you can check your baby's temperature without waking them up since you don't need the thermometer to touch their skin. Review 20: rating 5.0. Amazing thermometer! Amazing! Quick and easy, which is key when dealing with a sick baby!
persona: This customer prioritizes accuracy and reliability in product performance, and is likely to avoid products with inconsistent results, even if they are inexpensive.
reference_output: rating 1.0. INACCURATE READINGS - save your money Inaccurate! This gave me so many different readings - not worth the money.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 1.0. Poor changes = lost customer We were loyal ambassadors of these wipes, however very disappointed with the recent changes, less moist and soft than before. We won’t be ordering these anymore. Review 2: rating 5.0. Best for Baby My daughter would scream and fuss relentlessly when I'd wipe her face. But she doesn't when we use these? Maybe it's the smell? Or feeling? I don't know, but she loves them. I won't buy any other brand from now on.
I also love that when you're buying "800 wipes" these in particular come individually packaged. I used to buy the bulk wipes that were for refilling the plastic wipe bins -- and I hated it. Terrible. These are 100% better. Review 3: rating 1.0. missing wipes! there was missing wipe packages! Review 4: rating 5.0. Soft & non irritating. Very soft and non irritating to the babies. Great quality and value. Review 5: rating 2.0. Not packaged as shown in original box. I received the box of wipes but not as pictured on amazon. I received 10 packages of 80 in a brown cardboard box which I didn’t expect. I usually get the wipes and they come 8 packages of 100 in the original babyganics wipes box. I was not happy with what I received. Review 6: rating 2.0. I really want to like these wipes I really want to like these wipes. But they don't remove solids very well from a toddlers bum. I wouldn't recommend them and won't be buying them again. Review 7: rating 5.0. Toys R Us may be out of business, but I still needed these wipes I first purchased these wipes from Toys R Us. Once they went out of business, I had to find a new way to buy them. The package is sturdy enough to close properly and they dont dry out. I like that they are safe to use on faces as well. They arent greasy and tough enough to do a great job cleaning. This is also a good price. Review 8: rating 2.0. Wont buy again Doesn't have the right texture for removing waist from baby bums. Also they aren't stacked so that the next one comes up through the opening, so you have to try to find the edge of each one. They can be pretty frustrating when there's a mess. Review 9: rating 1.0. Not recommended Very thin and dry feeling. Also smells weird. I like the Amazon brand sensitive wipes much better. Review 10: rating 5.0. Best Eco-Friendly Wipes We tried The Honest Company, Burt's Bees and Babyganics wipes when our daughter was born. The Burt's Bees stuck together and the Honest Company's were stiff and dry. These are cheaper and better. Their diapers are a disaster, but the wipes are great. Review 11: rating 1.0. Smell I will never bug again. They smell like mold . Not very moist . And they are smaller then other brands . Review 12: rating 1.0. Smells horrible These are NOT fragrance free. They smell terrible. They are also too wet, and sometimes feel like they've been sitting in water. Review 13: rating 1.0. Bad rashes My daughter got a really bad rash from these! Review 14: rating 3.0. Recent order had strange smell I've been using these baby wipes for 6 months and haven't had a problem until recently. I recently ordered a pack of 8 (100 ct) wipes and 2 packs in I noticed a really disturbing smell - like gasoline or lighter fluid and took me some time before I realized that it was coming from these wipes! I've attempted to call customer service four times since then with no answer. I thought maybe it was just that one pack, but since opening the remaining four pack... Review 15: rating 2.0. the wipes aren't stacked so that they pull out of our wipe dispenser easily the wipes are just stacked on top of one another so when you pull one out, the next one doesn't get pulled out behind it. We have to leave our wipe dispenser open when it gets low because we can't reach our fingers far enough down into it to pull the next one out. Too bad! The quality of the wipes is good, but I won't order these again for that reason. Review 16: rating 2.0. like the texture but already second time when arrived almost completely dry I used to love these wipes. We were ordering it since my daughter was born. I love the texture. But recently was very disappointed because two last orders arrived almost completely dry. I had to actually pour some water in the freshly opened package in order to be able to wipe my baby up. I even called Amazon to complain about that and they suggested to return the product. Well by that time we used almost al... Review 17: rating 1.0. Skin reaction This gave my baby a horrible reaction on her face that lasted hours. I don’t know what the ingredient is that makes her so sensitive but she has never had an issue with any of the other brands we have tried. We have tried pampers pure, huggies and Kirkland. I will be returning these. Review 18: rating 5.0. Simply the best! Best organic diapers I've ever used! Review 19: rating 2.0. Quality has gone downhill in early 2019 I have been buying these baby wipes consistently for 4 years. They have been my absolute favorite considering quality and cost. They must have done some rebranding and reformulating because I don’t think I’ll order them again. The new shipment (received 2/1/19) contains wipes that are really dry compared to how they have been, so I need three times as many wipes to get the same mess cleaned up. There goes the value! I have always liked water wi... Review 20: rating 5.0. Good for face Love these wipes. I feel comfortable actually using them on baby's face unlike other wipes.
persona: This customer prioritizes natural ingredients and effective cleaning performance, especially for sensitive areas like a baby’s bottom, but is cautious about product suitability for facial use and values clear, honest product labeling to avoid adverse reactions.
reference_output:
rating 3.0. Great for butt TOURTURE ON FACE DO NOT USE ON BABIES FACE!
So we've been looking for a good wipe that is natural and cleans face and butt really good. Our baby has never had skin allergies to any other wipes or food nothing. These work amazing on her butt they clean her mess off much better than other wipes I've used. BUT when I used these on her face she instantly broke out all over red and splotchy. Shes never had a reaction before to anything and it didnt happen to her butt. We had a friend and her baby come over who has also never had allergies and she used one and the SAME thing happened.
With these being face and baby wipes I think they are unsafe. And the seller is blocking my review

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Great product Best potty covers I have used this far. I have tried a few brands and these are great. They don't slip off Review 2: rating 5.0. Great product!!!!! They come in seperate wrappings so you can carry all or just one with you. I love the added length because I don't have to worry about my little one touching any part of the toilet. I saw some people say the cover doesn't stay, I haven't had an issue with it staying on. If you place it on the bowl properly and lift your kid up and PLACE them on you really shouldn't have a problem. I choose these o... Review 4: rating 5.0. Gives Peace of Mind This is a great product. As a grandmother this is a wonderful item to have with me when my grandchild uses a public restroom. Review 5: rating 5.0. Perfect for little ones I LOVE how this toilet cover covers where their little legs are touching the front of the potty. YUCK! There are no other seat covers that I have found that offer this extensive of a cover. Thank you! Review 6: rating 5.0. Great coverage I love that these toilet covers are individual wrapped. So I can grab a couple and throw them in my purse or bag. I am also able to give my little one some independence in a public bathroom knowing the toilet is fully covered. My only request for improvement might be to have them be a little thicker. Otherwise, these are absolutely wonderful! Review 7: rating 5.0. Great product!!! I love this product because it totally covers the front of the toilet so my 3year old's legs don't touch any part of the gross public toilet. I just wish they were a little less expensive. Review 8: rating 5.0. Potty Clean! Took a chance on the product for my grandson. Have thoroughly enjoyed the convenience and take them everywhere we go. They have sped up the potty training process since we don't have to go back to diapers when we leave home. I actually shared the potty covers with my sister for her grandson. Excellent product for travel and convenience. Was pleased to find it! Review 9: rating 4.0. they cover everything! I love these because they cover the whole toilet seas and the bottom part too. That way my kid isn't sitting on paper and having his pants and legs on a dirty seat. I give it 4 stars because it's too expensive for so few, and also because it often slides out of place. Review 10: rating 5.0. Good for adults too. Works great in public bathrooms. Review 11: rating 5.0. I cannot recommend this product enough I cannot recommend this product enough! It provides maximum protection against germs as stated on the cover, especially when you have a little one who has to sit on the toilet. The front piece ensures that no part of my little one's skin, underwear or pants touches the toilet. I use this cover on top of the toilet seat and place the PRIMO folding potty on top. Both of these products combined ensure 1) no part of my little one touches the toilet ... Review 12: rating 5.0. LOVE THESE!! These are great for traveling and I tell everyone about them. I will continue to buy these for sure!! Amazing product!! Review 13: rating 5.0. Best product of all This is the best product I've found for my toddlers. I have at least one or two of these packages everywhere... in my car, my purse, my backpack.... I can't describe how useful these are. I'm not so concerned about my boys touching the public toilets. Just love it. Review 14: rating 5.0. Excellent covers Very generous in size and cover the toilet so that you baby doesn't touch any surfaces. Also quite durable. Wish they were less expensive though. Review 15: rating 5.0. Love, Love, Love these!!! These are the best potty seat covers. There is no part of the potty that my child can touch with these on. My daughter was scared to use public restrooms so I had to buy a travel potty seat but the public toilet seat was still exposed. These take care of the problem...neither my travel potty seat nor any part of my daughter touch the public toilet. Review 16: rating 4.0. Wished they flushed These are perfect for germaphobe moms. Review 17: rating 5.0. great invention! like this a lot...had to restock 3 more pkgs...

it does slide a little bit when the child sits down on it..so gotta watch on on that

also, it takes a bit of an effort to open up...when you have a child who HAS to go really bad, it's a bit nerve wrecking to keep telling her to wait, wait for mommy to open this thing up...

but other than that, works great... Review 18: rating 5.0. Great product I have been using this product for a long time and don't leave the house without it. The only disadvantage is that it is not flushable and you have to find a trash can to dispose it in and you have to be careful not to touch part of the used cover. Review 19: rating 5.0. Excellent product for my 2 yr old! I have only positive things to say about this product. I didn't have this when my 15 yr old was a toddler. I'm extremely grateful to have found it now, right after my 2 yr old was potty trained. I am very vigilant when going to public restrooms (places I abhor!) and I was dreading having to do this with my toddler. This seat cover is perfect! No matter how haphazardly my daughter sits, the entire toilet is covered & her hands touch only the seat co... Review 20: rating 5.0. Love it This product really covers the toilet set well. There is no part of the seat exposed even the front cover.
persona: This customer prioritizes functional, durable products that meet the specific needs of young children, values practicality and ease of use over aesthetics, and is willing to pay a fair price for reliable, long-lasting items that simplify daily routines, especially those related to feeding, hygiene, and portability.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Essential for anyone with small kiddos These are a lifesaver. Other toilet seat covers do not compare to this brand. Public bathrooms are disgusting so I fell in love with these the first time I used one with my three year old daughter. They come in a slim plastic covered package that is easy to throw in your purse. Since you have to hold your child on the too big seat they almost always reach for the toilet seat or kick their legs. The seat cover completely covers anything yucky they would have touched. Awesome. This product is worth it for all the germ phobic mommies out there.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Good quality I am so glad I purchased this. Just got a toddler bed for my son for Christmas with these sheets as he is obsessed with Pj masks. He loved them! I loved them. They are good quality, vibrant colors and cool designs. Would recommend. Review 2: rating 5.0. Perfect! Perfect fit for a toddler bed, my son loved it! Review 3: rating 5.0.
