persona: This customer values thoughtful design, durability, and functional aesthetics in baby and parenting products, prioritizing quality and reliability even at a higher price point, while also appreciating cute, visually appealing items that enhance their daily routine and impress others.
reference_output: rating 5.0. I've seen what they do to regular bags and unfortunately those horrible videos of even pets being mishandled We used this for our Britax Marathon convertible car seat and it fit perfectly. When you invest in a car seat the last thing you want is a baggage handler tossing it around. I've seen what they do to regular bags and unfortunately those horrible videos of even pets being mishandled, so I wasn't taking any chances. We didn't use the backpack feature because we checked the bag (usually for free depending on the airline). But the car seat and the bag were both in great condition after our four flights. So, money well spent :)

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Best Sippy We've Tried! Before trying this Playtex sippy, we must have gone through 5 different brands, and these hands down are the best. Our sippy cups were green and blue, same as we have found in stores.

Unlike a Nuby sippy cup we tried, these caps screw on nice and easily. There is a little indicator on the side to tell you if they're on enough to prevent leaks.

They really don't leak much at all...in fact never from around the seal. The only time they leak... Review 2: rating 2.0. tough to drink from It takes a strong suck to drink from these, and while your kid tries to quench his thirst they will leak where the lid screws onto the cup. Maybe if you fill them less-full it will work better, but so far, I'm not impressed. Review 3: rating 5.0. Best sippy cups we have tried We have found the Playtex cups in any style to be far superior in sturdiness, lack of spilling, and drinking ease to any other brand that we have tried, particularly Nuby. The Nuby cups broke when dropped and leaked when left on their side (although they were easy for our daughter to drink from). These Playtex cups are much tougher when dropped/thrown, they almost never leak (as long as you remember to put in the seal valve correctly), and are similarl... Some of the paint has come off of the lids because of her chewing on them, but other than that, they are still in great shape. The... Review 5: rating 1.0. Well sure enough they changed the cups and you can squeeze them and watch them leak!!! Horrible! Returned them!!! It's poorly designed. I even tried it and I had a hard time! I'm sticking with NUK and Foogo, even though they're more expensive. These were a waste of money!

Review 1: rating 5.0. Exactly what I was looking for I love this warmer because it is easier to change my 19 month olds diapers. She doesn't struggle as much with diaper changes. Review 2: rating 3.0. Good, but... I loved this warmer for my cloth wipes, but then the power cord quit working after about two weeks. I tried and tried to contact the company. They FINALLY called me back after over a month and no questions asked, they sent me a new power cord. So, I hate that it took so long, but they were great to work with.

I use my own wipes made of flannel and I can fit about 15+ folded like disposable wipes. They get very warm. I think another reviewer that said it will o... Review 3: rating 4.0. Great warmer, terrible wipes I thought this was a ridiculous piece of baby gear- until that first night at home when my newborn daughter screamed at the cold wipes. Now, I love having it! My daughter was born in October, and we've used it all winter. (Though I may put it away for the summer). We use it with our own (Green Mountain diapers) cloth wipes that are exactly the right size to just lay in there without folding or rolling. I didn't buy it for the wipes, so I don't much care, ... Review 4: rating 5.0. Excellent product, just keep it clean Baby girl is three months old now and we use this wipes warmer daily. The cloth wipes that came with it are ok, but I prefer the fleece clothes I bought on Etsy. Warm and wet is a perfect breeding ground for bacteria and mold so it is important that you keep the unit clean. I fill the unit with dry clothes and add about 3 cups of warm water with a tablespoon and baby wash and a couple of drops of tea tree oil (natural antibacterial). I use al... Review 5: rating 5.0. Makes life with a new little one much easier You can't really appreciate this until you try carrying a screaming little one in one arm to the bathroom to get warm water for a washcloth in the middle of the night. The first week with our newborn was pretty hectic, but little items like this coming in the mail helped calm things down quite a bit.

This item is a lifesaver. Having pre-warmed wipes right next to you on the changing table saves so much time and frustration for... I do not know what they put in the sponge to make it antimicrobial, bu... Review 13: rating 4.0. about the lid latch Firstly, this product is working fine for us for about a week. Since I've snipped mine off the lid operates easily and silently, and it closes ... Review 14: rating 2.0. I have only had this for about a week and the washcloths that came with it are already fraying. I discovered a month ago that the adapter started to melt if there was less than a quarter inch of standing water in the warmer. I read the reviews about condensation getting the table wet, so put a folded receiving blanket under it, but have never noticed it wet. As to the wipes that come with it, everyone seemed to hate them so I haven't tried them. We u... Review 20: rating 5.0. Works great! Unfortunately I think we only tried to use it once. Baby girl was born at 6lbs and these swaddles were huge for her. We couldn’t get it to actually “swaddle” her. reference_output: rating 2.0. Avoid this monitor. Over-priced for poor quality and not-so-great features... The sound quality is horrible. Even with the volume all the way up I can barely make out what my daughter is saying. SO MUCH WHITE NOISE! Also the video off feature that I assume is supposed to help with battery life is just annoying. What's the point of a video monitor if you can't see any video? I understand doing this at night time when you're sleeping, but I sometimes rely more on the video than the sound when I'm watching her and doing something where I can't hear the monitor (i.e. blow drying my hair). The sound mutes when you pan/tilt which is just annoying even if it's only for a few seconds (and the pan/tilt is very slow which is also annoying). I don't like that there is no sound when in split screen mode using both cameras. This monitor is just lacking a lot of features I need to make it fully functional for our setup and preferences. I would NOT recommend anyone getting this monitor.

It is small which is nice but the shape of it makes it hard to ... I have given this 2 stars because it is so quiet. I have to carry the monitor from room to room. My house is not large and has an openness to it so I should be able to keep it plugged into the living room and hear it in the kitchen. But I can not. I have to unplug and plug in when I am going to a different room. It is small which is nice but the shape of it makes it hard to keep in your pocket when outside. It does ge... Review 20: rating 5.0. This monitor is small, well priced, and was fairly simple to set up (there were several issues with set up, but I'm fairly certain that was operator error on my husband's part, lol). It also picks up sound very well for the size and price! Our house is very small, so we didn'...
persona: This customer values durability and reliability in products they use frequently, especially those that withstand heavy, long-term use; they prioritize consistent performance and ease of replacement, often repurchasing the same item due to proven functionality and seamless integration into their routine.
reference_output: rating 2.0. Poor monitor, way better out there for the price I owned this monitor for a little over a year. Initially it was only used as our back up monitor so it saw only minimal use. About 2 weeks ago our primary monitor went and we started using this one on a daily basis. Well, 2 weeks later and it won't even turn on. No light when we connect our to the charger, nothing. So, this was last draw that pushed me to write the review. I was never thrilled with this monitor. It is mediocre at best. I've had over 10 years of dealing with audio only baby monitors and owned several. While the digital audio is good when it works, depending where I was in my 1600 Sq ft home, I would lose signal and it  would just beep. Also, compared to other monitors, this monitor is not loud at all, even when it's on full volume. Skip this monitor guys, there are better out there.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Bought for the nuna sena play yard. A little ... Bought for the nuna sena play yard. A little big, but put a fitted sheet over it. Held up to machine washing well. I did air dry it though.

Review 2: rating 1.0. Poor quality. Poor quality..washed it before using and it ragged out and looked like it had been used for years. Was also too large. I do not recommend

Review 3: rating 2.0. Not waterproof; it has not the inner cover Probably it was just mine, but it came without the waterproof inner cover, therefore, I had to add an extra layer of sheet for my baby’s bassinet - pack & play. It fits very well and it was as it has to be except that mine is absolutely not as it was claimed. I bought the one for the crib and it came with the waterproof inner cover.

Review 4: rating 1.0. I’m not happy I did not receive the mattress it says delivered but I only got the pack and play.

Review 5: rating 1.0. Doesn’t Fit Way too big, doesn’t fit the Pack N Play mattress at all.

Review 6: rating 1.0. poor quality Placed in gentle wash and hung to dry before the first use and the stitching is coming apart. Its sitting in my laundry room until I can try and find someone to fix it

Review 7: rating 3.0. Doesn't fit pack n play. I ordered this for the Graco pack n play we have in our room where we plan to have our newborn sleep in the beginning. This mattress cover is a little stiff and feels like it will be durable. The cover fit a little better after being washed but it is still too big! The stretchy corners that tuck around the edges cover the velcro patches and buckles so at the play pin stage the whole "mattress" would be unsecured and slip around.

Review 8: rating 1.0. Does not fit pack n play I bought this for a Graco pack n play. The reviews on this product were great, but as soon as I opened the package I didn’t understand why there were so many good reviews. The product is stiff, rough, and is too wide for the pad for the pack n play. Because it’s too wide it doesn’t lay flat and wouldn’t be comfortable for my newborn. Also, I can tell after a few washes it will start to fall apart.

Review 9: rating 1.0. Awful Put the mattress pad in the wash before using, followed washing instructions, one wash and it is shredded, just awful. I trust items to be of good quality when I buy them, so I threw away the packaging as soon as I received it, I have no way to return it now. What a rip off.

Review 10: rating 1.0. Unusable after initial washing I washed this before using and it came out looking like it was ten years old.  It was so pilled up that I could not use it on my pack n play.

Review 11: rating 1.0. Not good quality Baby slept on it for a week and it looks terrible. Haven’t even washed it and it has completely started piling. The material feels like felt. I can’t even imagine what this would have looked like if I had washed it.

Review 12: rating 1.0. Terrible This product it didn’t fit in the pack and play mattress at all me a total waste of money very misleading

Review 13: rating 4.0. Adds padding but not a great fit I bought this to mainly add extra padding to our pack n' play since our daughter would not sleep in it. It dies add extra padding and helps get rid of the noise of her rubbing her feet on the synthetic cover. My one complaint is that it is not a smooth fit. It bulges on top and is bumpy, even after putting sheets on. I wish it was a tighter and smoother fit.

Review 14: rating 1.0. Don’t buy This ain’t water resistant, it started to shed after one use id never buy this again

Review 15: rating 3.0. Perfect fit...not exactly waterproof Very soft and comfy...there is no crinkly plastic layer. Yet waterproof is not how I would describe it. It's like an extra thick mattress protector. The mattress has vinyl covering so I'm not too worried. It fits the mattress perfectly! It's a dream on me mattress for pack n plays to compare sizing

Review 16: rating 1.0. Top fabric frayed after one wash I washed this item in anticipation of my baby's arrival, but the top fabric was already fraying and coming off after one wash! My lint trap consisted of the top fabric material.

Review 17: rating 1.0. You get what you pay for This mattress cover if very cheaply made. The cover is almost felt-like. I washed it before using it and the result was terrible. It came out of the wash all pilled up and no longer had a smooth top surface. Very poor quality.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 4.0. Four Stars I am happy with this product. It helps almost instantly. It did arrive leaking a little bit. Review 2: rating 1.0. One Star Item arrived broken and leaked all through the packaging. Review 3: rating 5.0. Works great and fast for teething pain. Looooove this stuff!
I’m big on essential oils anyway, but this is great. She doesn’t love the taste but she will let me run it on without too big of a fus and it’s almost instant relief from teething pain. Review 4: rating 5.0. This works on adults too! I highly recommend this product! It’s helps out by taking away some of the pain immediately from your mouth. I used this on my other baby and it was the best. I am currently experiencing some tooth pain, and have been using it. My dentist uses some type of clove medicine when I’m at the dentist, so it’s only right that I use this oil. I can’t seem to find it in stores. Review 5: rating 3.0. Ok but not as good as babyganics teething pods We got this to try instead of babyganics teething pods but it does not seem to be as effective. It works well for the more mild teething pain days. Review 6: rating 5.0. Highly recommend this for your teething babies... This stuff works wonders. Works instantly for my daughter. Well worth it. Review 7: rating 1.0. Doesn’t help teething. May cause choking!!! Doesn’t work. The gel is so sticky my baby choked on it. Waste of money and potentially dangerous! Review 8: rating 5.0. Give your baby fast relief.. this definitely works! I was not sure if this was going to work for my little guy as we had tried just about everything but I still ordered it and gave it a try. So glad that we did!!!! Easy to use and definitely works!!! Review 9: rating 5.0. Five Stars Great product, works well in my one-year-old daughter loves it Review 10: rating 5.0. Great stuff I am using this product with my 4th baby. Our pediatrician has approved this product. I have found it to be very effective. I used gel with my other babies , which of course worked fine , but this oil works a lot better . Instant relief. I've been recommending this oil to friends. Review 11: rating 1.0. Wasn’t impressed Didn’t use much seemed to upset my babies stomach- Review 12: rating 2.0. Two Stars Tastes so bad my daughter gags!! It does create a numbing effect though. Review 13: rating 2.0. Baby gums hurt, cried. Did not help Simple as that - made baby cry for an hour Review 14: rating 5.0. It Helps! Once my grandson got used to the taste he loved it and it instantly helps with his teething pain- he's 5 months old. Review 15: rating 1.0. Clove oil not considered safe for babies I bought this hoping for a natural orajel alternative, but then I found out from a licensed aromatherapist that clove oil in any form is unsafe for babies. I’m very disappointed. Will probably keep it to perhaps use on my own tooth aches, since returning a cheap product is a pain.

I guess I’ll stick to frozen teethers, breastmilk pops, and chamomile teething tablets. Review 16: rating 2.0. Not all that helpful We did not find this all that helpful for our baby Review 17: rating 5.0. Best ever Only thing that actually helps my babies teething pain. Review 18: rating 3.0. Not for us I don't know it's just him, but it doesn't seem to do much for my little man. I do like that's its organic, just doesn't work well for us. Every baby is different, and different things work for them. Review 20: rating 1.0. Contains clove oil The information on this was incorrect so didn’t know it has clove oil. I’m not comfortable with putting clove oil in my baby’s mouth. Amazon refunded me so didn’t lose anything

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Perfect! We bought this car seat for our 9 1/2 month old son because you can have it rear or forward facing. It fits in both of our cars very easily, facing either direction and has a ton of padding to give the little guy a comfy seat. The adjustments are easy to alter, but you do have to take the seat out to do so (but I think you have to do that with all seats???). I would definitely buy this seat again! Review 2: rating 4.0. Great Price and Safe This carseat is a great deal. Carseat safety standards are all the same. It doesn't have the bells and whistles that other seats to but it does what it is supposed to do. There are a few small issues that I have with it but generally it is a great seat.

1. The cupholder - Yes, it's flimsy as everyone says but not a big deal.
2. Strap release - The button is along the front of the seat so trying to push it or pull the strap to tighten the harnes... Review 3: rating 2.0. Two Stars Great and light for an airplane, but very cheap and minimal for everyday use. Review 4: rating 5.0. This car seat is great for traveling This car seat is great for traveling, fits right down the airplane aisle without having to lift it (I have it on a two wheeled cart), and fits into the airplane seat well. Review 5: rating 2.0. Not happy: no instruction manual. Very unhappy right now. Opened the box & there is no instruction manual on how to install! Review 6: rating 3.0. It works This car seat is fine. The head pad is stupid and not made of a good material (baby's head sweats against it). It fell off so many times i finally just removed it. We also purchased: Evenflo Tribute LX Convertible Car Seat, Gunther -- and i like that seat much better than this one. There is nothing wrong with it from a safety perspective, and for the price I still consider it worth it. But it's "just ok". Review 7: rating 5.0. Love the long straps! What I like about this car seat above the others we've owned are the long shoulder straps! Makes it so much easier to get nugget into the seat and not have the straps fall under her in the process. Review 8: rating 1.0. Not pleased I returned this because the weight limit is not posted anywhere, but once you buy it you learn the weight limit is only 50 pounds. If this is a convertible car seat, the weight limit should be posted if it's not the normal limit/ Review 9: rating 5.0. Just what we needed! (Install Specifics)
2003 2-Door Pontiac Sunfire
Behind Passenger Seat
Rear Facing
Shoulder/Lap Belt install

(Likes)
Price was perfect (just needed something for a 2nd car that the LO is hardly ever in)
Size is just perfect for our little 2-door POS.
Install was easy
our LO is in the 98th % for height and weight and the seat fits him good.

(Dislikes)
The Latch system straps are too short for use in... Review 10: rating 1.0. DONT WASTE YOUR MONEY! My daughter hates hates hates this sea . She rides in a graco fit 4 me 70 seat. And they are total opposite seats. This one has no back support or head support. She falls over to the dide when she sleeps. Its a very unsafe seat. And yes she is the right size for it. There is just no support anywher . Do not waste your money on this seat. Review 11: rating 2.0. Disappointed; Not User Friendly I decided to get a less expensive car seat for our second vehicle. For example, to route the belt path, you have to remove the seat cover and re-attached. It's not very practical if you want to be able to quickly switch to a different vehicle. I wish I'd have just paid more for something nicer. Review 12: rating 2.0. Did not come with manual- and car seat itself says ... Adequate as a secondary or travel seat, but I would not buy this as my main car seat Our regular car seat is the [[ASIN:B00G34TL2A Britax Pavilion G4 Convertible Car Seat, Blueprint]]. We bought this Evenflo car seat for air travel, as it is significantly lighter (and cheaper). At the time, my in-laws were perplexed that this car seat was available for $60 and we spent $300 on the Britax. But after using this Evenflo for a week on vacation, I am convinced that you get what you pay... Review 14: rating 5.0. Well worth the money, and compares to much more expensive seats We got this seat to be an auxiliary seat and for use with airline travel. We didn't want to spend a lot. When this seat arrived, I was amazed and impressed with the quality. Our other convertible seats are Britax Boulevards, and since the price on those is so much more expensive, I expected that this seat might be visible cheap or flimsy. I was surprised to find that it was not.

What this seat certainly la... Review 15: rating 1.0. Latchbelt Not Attached to Seat The latch belt came not attached to the seat at all - it just pulls right through the back with nothing to stop it from falling out when transitioning the seat between vehicles. We bought this seat for travel so that's kindof a big deal. When we traveled with it we lost the belt and it's no longer usable for us with a latch system. Extremely disappointed that the belt was not permanently attached to the seat as I cannot locate a replacement for it. Review 16: rating 4.0. Very pleased! Very pleased with the purchase. I feel more secure using this with my 3 year old granddaughter than using a full booster seat. Did not see the instructions but called the 800 number. She walked me through the needed adjustments and registered my seat over the phone! Excellent experience! The adjustments are easy once she explained them. I w... Review 17: rating 5.0. Good purchase Easy to install. Perfect size. Comfortable for two people to sit in the back with the car seat in place. Works well for my three year old granddaughter. Not used on a daily basis. Review 18: rating 2.0. Strap for the seat isn't long enough Did not fit into my mom's Ford Taurus. Strap that goes behind the car seat was not long enough to clip into the hooks in the car. When we did manage to get it clipped in (using different hooks), it didn't set well on the seat. We returned it and got the Graco we originally ordered for ourselves and are much happier with the purchase. Review 19: rating 5.0. Great car seat Great car seat! my granddaughter seems very comfortable in it. it was easy to install and it is easy to put her in and out. I am very happy with it. Review 20: rating 4.0. Great car seat for the price Great car seat for the price. We needed a second car seat for my son for the "non-primary" vehicle and we didn't want to spend a lot of money on something he was going to be in minimally. He is almost 2 and has long outgrown his carrier - it does not have a lot of head support or padding, so I would not recommend for a smaller baby although it says it can accommodate one as small as 5 pounds ( I know additional padding can be bought, but it may st...
persona: This customer prioritizes safety, eco-friendly materials, and practical functionality in baby products, values effective solutions for common infant care issues like rashes, and is willing to accept minor design flaws if the product delivers reliable performance and peace of mind.
reference_output: rating 4.0. This seat is a pretty good bang for the buck This seat is a pretty good bang for the buck. There is nothing fancy about it, the padding is minimal compared to the other seats we looked at but, most importantly, it seems to meet the safety requirements. We put our newborn daughter in it on the way back home from the hospital. She is five months old and fits pretty well in it. The only thing that I seem to struggle with is tightening of the straps. One side ends up being looser than the other. I reach towards the back and hold the buckle connecting the straps to make sure they are evenly snug. Also, adjusting the straps up and down is not as easy on this seat as other more expensive ones. Other than that, I recommend this seat for those who are looking to not break the budget.

I would note that they probably exaggerate a bit on how many diapers it can hold (I have zero interest in mashing down the diapers with my hand) so if that matters to you I would subtract about 10 from their suggested coun... Keeps dogs out of trash- can't say anything about smell since newborn is breastfed and diapers don't stink yet . However , overall seems cheaply made and fills up fast, and we bought the large one ! If you’re looking at this diaper pail for scent blocking, look for something else. This pail stinks (literally!) I can smell it even when there are just pee diapers in it. It’s also absorbed odors already even though I’ve only hd it for a month. One of the other reasons I bought this pail was because it said it wouldn’t absorb smells. Wrong!

I previously had 2 diaper genies, but after my husband broke ours for the second time trying to s... Review 8: rating 5.0. Nice diaper pail with great design features This diaper pail is fantastic. 2 months later-use this everyday with a lot of stinky kitty 🐱 litter. Every component still works like BRAND NEW!!! Mine DEFINITELY DOES seal in odors. I wouldn’t have this product in my bedroom if an odor seeped-even a tiny bit.

While my daughter isn't big enough to get into the pail just yet, I appreciate the different locking/latching mechanisms to keep h... Review 20: rating 5.0. For years, I tried different options and searched for something that would be good for my diapers and for keeping the smell down. This is a great diaper pail because it has the foot pedal so I do not have to touch the pail to put in the dirty diaper. Under the outer lid, there is an inner lid which helps control the smell.

I very be...

Review 1: rating 5.0. Good for teething These are good for teething when frozen or just at room temperature. We bought these when my daughter was 4 months and her first two teeth started popping through. The grapes are her favorite and we leave those out on her tray table or play mat for her to chew on whenever. For the watermelon, we wet one half and put it in a baggie in the freezer. when her teeth get bad, we pull it out and let her chew on that. Both are a good size for baby's hands, machine washab... Son's favorite teethers We had tried giving our son plastic and wooden teethers and even frozen washcloths we already had, but he wasn't interested in them for very long. But he will chew on these washcloth teethers for longer, and they seem to help when he is cranky from teething.

You just get them wet and put them in the freezer ahead of time, then pull them out when needed. They also can go through the washing machine on gentle to clean them. They have held up well so ... Sure, you could use a plain old washcloth, but it's nice for baby to have designated cloths that are just for him! Review 12: rating 5.0. Great, practical teethers. These are perfect for my baby to chew on. He's six months now and has loved them since he first got teeth at 4.5 months. I soak them, wring them out, then freeze them. He chews on them while they're frozen and happily sucks on them as they thaw. They don't make a mess because I don't freeze much water in them, so the terry material holds it in as it melts. We have lots of cold teethers, and these are by far my baby's favorites.

reference_output: rating 1.0. Cool concept but dangerous with the opening seams I do not recommend these. As much as my son loves chewing on tags and fabrics, I could not give these to him. Then I thought about how I would clean these. I wasn't going to put them in the laundry or the dishwasher cuz then my son would be sucking on detergent. And I just didn't think hand washing them would be good enough considering how much time he spends chewing on things and drenching them with his saliva.

rating 5.0. Better than medela swing I have the single electric Medela swing pump and this one. This is how they compare.

Ameda Purely Yours

Good suction

louder than the Medela swing

Expensive
Single pump
Milk goes into tube
